papers.title: Escher-Loop: Mutual Evolution by Closed-Loop Self-Referential Optimization
papers.abstract: While recent autonomous agents demonstrate impressive capabilities, they predominantly rely on manually scripted workflows and handcrafted heuristics, inherently limiting their potential for open-ended improvement. To address this, we propose Escher-Loop, a fully closed-loop framework that operationalizes the mutual evolution of two distinct populations: Task Agents that solve concrete problems, and Optimizer Agents that recursively refine both the task agents and themselves. To sustain this self-referential evolution, we propose a dynamic benchmarking mechanism that seamlessly reuses the empirical scores of newly generated task agents as relative win-loss signals to update optimizers' scores. This mechanism leverages the evolution of task agents as an inherent signal to drive the evaluation and refinement of optimizers without additional overhead. Empirical evaluations on mathematical optimization problems demonstrate that Escher-Loop effectively pushes past the performance ceilings of static baselines, achieving the highest absolute peak performance across all evaluated tasks under matched compute. Remarkably, we observe that the optimizer agents dynamically adapt their strategies to match the shifting demands of high-performing task agents, which explains the system's continuous improvement and superior late-stage performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出闭环自指优化框架Escher-Loop，通过任务智能体与优化智能体的互演化突破静态性能上限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自主智能体依赖人工脚本和启发式规则，缺乏开放式改进能力，限制了性能持续提升。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需人工干预、能持续自我改进的闭环智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 优化智能体动态调整策略以适应高性能任务智能体的需求变化，这是系统持续改进和后期性能优越的原因。
analysis.method: Escher-Loop框架包含两类智能体：任务智能体解决具体问题，优化智能体递归地改进任务智能体和自身；通过动态基准测试机制，将新任务智能体的经验分数作为相对胜负信号更新优化智能体分数，实现自指演化。
contributions: 提出Escher-Loop，首个完全闭环的自指优化框架，实现任务智能体与优化智能体的互演化。
设计动态基准测试机制，利用任务智能体的演化信号驱动优化智能体评估，无需额外开销。
analysis.experiments: 在数学优化问题上评估，Escher-Loop在相同计算量下达到所有任务的最高绝对峰值性能，超越静态基线。
limitations: 仅在数学优化问题上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算开销与扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验显示有效，但应用场景有限，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出闭环自指优化框架Escher-Loop，通过任务智能体与优化智能体的互演化突破静态性能上限。

papers.title: A Milestone in Formalization: The Sphere Packing Problem in Dimension 8
papers.abstract: In 2016, Viazovska famously solved the sphere packing problem in dimension $8$, using modular forms to construct a 'magic' function satisfying optimality conditions determined by Cohn and Elkies in 2003. In March 2024, Hariharan and Viazovska launched a project to formalize this solution and related mathematical facts in the Lean Theorem Prover. A significant milestone was achieved in February 2026: the result was formally verified, with the final stages of the verification done by Math, Inc.'s autoformalization model 'Gauss'. We discuss the techniques used to achieve this milestone, reflect on the unique collaboration between humans and Gauss, and discuss project objectives that remain.

analysis.tldr: 使用Lean定理证明器与AI模型Gauss合作，形式化验证了8维球堆积问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 形式化验证数学证明可确保证明正确性，但传统形式化过程耗时且需要大量人工努力，亟需自动化工具提升效率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将复杂的数学证明（如8维球堆积问题）形式化并在定理证明器中验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用Lean定理证明器，结合Math, Inc.的自动形式化模型Gauss，通过人机协作完成证明的形式化验证。
contributions: 首次在Lean中形式化验证了8维球堆积问题的解
展示了自动形式化模型Gauss在复杂数学证明验证中的有效性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定数学问题，泛化性未知
依赖Gauss模型的能力，可能无法处理更复杂的证明
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.reason: 形式化验证数学里程碑，但非ML核心方向，技术细节有限，推荐保存以备后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用Lean定理证明器与AI模型Gauss合作，形式化验证了8维球堆积问题。

papers.title: Hybrid JIT-CUDA Graph Optimization for Low-Latency Large Language Model Inference
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across natural language and multimodal tasks, yet their practical deployment remains constrained by inference latency and kernel launch overhead, particularly in interactive, short-sequence settings. This paper presents a hybrid runtime framework that combines Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation with CUDA Graph execution to reduce launch overhead while preserving runtime flexibility during autoregressive decoding. The framework partitions transformer inference into static components executed via CUDA Graph replay and dynamic components handled through JIT-compiled kernels, enabling asynchronous graph capture and reuse across decoding steps. We evaluate the proposed approach on LLaMA-2 7B using single-GPU, batch-size-one inference across prompt lengths from 10 to 500 tokens. Experimental results show that the hybrid runtime reduces Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) by up to 66.0% and achieves lower P99 latency compared with TensorRT-LLM in this regime. These results indicate that hybrid JIT-CUDA Graph execution can effectively reduce inference latency and variance for short-sequence LLM workloads, making it a practical optimization strategy for latency-sensitive AI applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合JIT-CUDA图执行框架，将LLM推理划分为静态和动态部分，显著降低短序列推理延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理延迟和内核启动开销限制了实际部署，尤其在交互式短序列场景中，现有方法如TensorRT-LLM仍有优化空间。
analysis.problem: 如何减少LLM自回归解码过程中的内核启动开销，同时保持运行时灵活性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合运行时框架：将Transformer推理划分为静态组件（通过CUDA Graph重放执行）和动态组件（通过JIT编译内核处理），支持异步图捕获和跨解码步骤重用。
contributions: 提出混合JIT-CUDA图执行框架，结合静态图重放和动态JIT编译。
在LLaMA-2 7B上实现高达66.0%的TTFT降低和更低的P99延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaMA-2 7B上使用单GPU、batch-size=1，提示长度10-500 tokens，与TensorRT-LLM对比。
limitations: 仅评估了单GPU、batch-size=1的场景。
未讨论多GPU或更大batch size下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，但场景有限，适合关注LLM推理加速的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合JIT-CUDA图执行框架，将LLM推理划分为静态和动态部分，显著降低短序列推理延迟。

papers.title: V.O.I.C.E (Voice, Ownership, Identity, Control, Expression): Risk Taxonomy of Synthetic Voice Generation From Empirical Data
papers.abstract: As generative voice models are rapidly advancing in both capabilities and public utilization, the unconsented collection, reuse, and synthesis of voice data are introducing new classes of privacy, security and governance risk that are poorly captured by existing, largely uniform threat models. To fill the gap, we present V.O.I.C.E, a taxonomy of voice generation risk grounded in a multi-source threat modeling effort with 569 incidents from major AI incident database, FTC and Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3); 1067 direct incident reports from U.S. based participants across diverse groups (including voice actors, internet personalities, political personnel, and general public); and 2,221 Reddit discussions. Grounded in real-world data, our taxonomy explicitly models how risk emerges, interact with contextual factors such as degree of exposure, social visibility, and the availability of legal protections for various affected groups.

analysis.tldr: 基于实证数据构建合成语音生成风险分类法V.O.I.C.E，揭示隐私、安全与治理风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式语音模型能力快速提升且被广泛使用，但未经同意的语音数据收集、复用和合成引入了新的隐私、安全和治理风险，现有威胁模型难以有效捕捉这些风险。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个基于实证数据的、系统性的合成语音生成风险分类体系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过多源威胁建模，收集569起AI事件、1067份直接报告和2221条Reddit讨论，构建风险分类法V.O.I.C.E，并建模风险如何随暴露程度、社会可见性和法律保护等上下文因素变化。
contributions: 提出了V.O.I.C.E分类法，系统分类合成语音生成的风险。
基于大规模实证数据（事件、报告、讨论）进行威胁建模。
揭示了风险与上下文因素（如暴露程度、社会可见性、法律保护）的交互关系。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据主要来自美国参与者，可能不具全球代表性。
分类法可能随技术发展需要更新。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 基于实证数据的风险分类法具有较强新颖性和应用价值，但摘要未提供实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于实证数据构建合成语音生成风险分类法V.O.I.C.E，揭示隐私、安全与治理风险。

papers.title: Evaluating CUDA Tile for AI Workloads on Hopper and Blackwell GPUs
papers.abstract: NVIDIA's CUDA Tile (CuTile) introduces a Python-based, tile-centric abstraction for GPU kernel development that aims to simplify programming while retaining Tensor Core and Tensor Memory Accelerator (TMA) efficiency on modern GPUs. We present the first independent, cross-architecture evaluation of CuTile against established approaches such as cuBLAS, Triton, WMMA, and raw SIMT on three NVIDIA GPUs spanning Hopper and Blackwell: H100 NVL, B200, and RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition. We benchmark representative AI workloads, including GEMM, fused multi-head attention, and end-to-end LLM inference in BF16/FP16 precision, to assess both performance and portability. Our results show that CuTile effectiveness is strongly workload- and architecture-dependent. On datacenter-class Blackwell (B200), CuTile achieves up to 1007 TFLOP/s for fused attention, outperforming FlashAttention-2 by 2.5x while requiring only 60 lines of Python kernel code. For GEMM, CuTile reaches 52-79% of cuBLAS performance in 22 lines of code (versus 123 for WMMA), making it a practical replacement for hand-written CUDA kernels but not yet for vendor-optimized libraries. However, the same CuTile attention kernel achieves only 53% of FlashAttention-2 throughput on RTX PRO 6000 (sm_120), exposing significant cross-architecture optimization gaps. In contrast, Triton sustains 62-101% of cuBLAS performance across all tested platforms without architecture-specific tuning, demonstrating substantially stronger portability.

analysis.tldr: 首次独立评估NVIDIA CuTile在Hopper和Blackwell GPU上的AI工作负载性能，发现其效果高度依赖工作负载和架构，在B200上融合注意力达1007 TFLOP/s，但跨架构优化存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: CuTile作为新的Python tile-centric GPU编程抽象，旨在简化开发并保持Tensor Core/TMA效率，但缺乏独立、跨架构的性能评估，无法指导实际应用选择。
analysis.problem: 评估CuTile在多种GPU架构（H100、B200、RTX PRO 6000）上对典型AI工作负载（GEMM、融合注意力、LLM推理）的性能和可移植性，并与cuBLAS、Triton、WMMA、SIMT等基线对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CuTile效果高度依赖工作负载和架构：在B200上融合注意力性能优异（1007 TFLOP/s，2.5x FlashAttention-2），但在RTX PRO 6000上仅达53%；GEMM性能为cuBLAS的52-79%，代码量大幅减少；Triton跨架构可移植性更强（62-101% cuBLAS性能）。
analysis.method: 在H100 NVL、B200、RTX PRO 6000三款GPU上，使用CuTile实现GEMM、融合多头注意力和端到端LLM推理（BF16/FP16），并与cuBLAS、Triton、WMMA、SIMT基线进行性能对比。
contributions: 首次独立、跨架构评估CuTile在Hopper和Blackwell GPU上的AI工作负载性能。
揭示CuTile性能的架构依赖性，并量化其与cuBLAS、Triton等方法的差距。
analysis.experiments: 在H100 NVL、B200、RTX PRO 6000三款GPU上，对GEMM、融合多头注意力、端到端LLM推理进行基准测试，精度为BF16/FP16。
limitations: 仅评估了有限的工作负载（GEMM、注意力、LLM推理），未覆盖其他AI算子。
未深入分析CuTile在不同架构上性能差异的根本原因。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 首次独立评估CuTile，但仅覆盖有限工作负载，贡献偏实证，适合关注GPU编程工具的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次独立评估NVIDIA CuTile在Hopper和Blackwell GPU上的AI工作负载性能，发现其效果高度依赖工作负载和架构，在B200上融合注意力达1007 TFLOP/s，但跨架构优化存在显著差距。

papers.title: Ulterior Motives: Detecting Misaligned Reasoning in Continuous Thought Models
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has emerged as a key technique for eliciting complex reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs). Although interpretable, its dependence on natural language limits the model's expressive bandwidth. Continuous thought models address this bottleneck by reasoning in latent space rather than human-readable tokens. While they enable richer representations and faster inference, they raise a critical safety question: how can we detect misaligned reasoning in an uninterpretable latent space? To study this, we introduce MoralChain, a benchmark of 12,000 social scenarios with parallel moral/immoral reasoning paths. We train a continuous thought model with backdoor behavior using a novel dual-trigger paradigm - one trigger that arms misaligned latent reasoning ([T]) and another that releases harmful outputs ([O]). We demonstrate three findings: (1) continuous thought models can exhibit misaligned latent reasoning while producing aligned outputs, with aligned and misaligned reasoning occupying geometrically distinct regions of latent space; (2) linear probes trained on behaviorally-distinguishable conditions ([T][O] vs [O]) transfer to detecting armed-but-benign states ([T] vs baseline) with high accuracy; and (3) misalignment is encoded in early latent thinking tokens, suggesting safety monitoring for continuous thought models should target the "planning" phase of latent reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 连续思维模型在隐空间推理中可能隐藏对齐错误，但可通过线性探针检测早期规划阶段的异常。
analysis.research_motivation: 链式思维推理虽可解释但受限于自然语言表达，连续思维模型通过隐空间推理提升表达力和推理速度，但其不可解释性带来了安全对齐检测的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在不可解释的隐空间中检测连续思维模型的对齐错误推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续思维模型可在产生对齐输出的同时进行对齐错误的隐空间推理，且对齐与错误推理在隐空间中几何分离；错误编码出现在早期隐思维令牌中。
analysis.method: 提出MoralChain基准（12,000个社交场景，含平行道德/不道德推理路径），采用双触发范式（[T]武装错误推理，[O]释放有害输出）训练带后门的连续思维模型，并用线性探针检测隐状态。
contributions: 构建了MoralChain基准，用于研究连续思维模型的对齐错误推理。
揭示了连续思维模型可隐藏错误推理，且错误编码在早期隐思维令牌中。
证明线性探针可有效检测武装但良性的隐状态，为安全监控提供方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于社交场景基准，可能不覆盖其他领域。
线性探针的泛化性可能受限于训练条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对连续思维模型的安全对齐检测问题新颖且重要，方法有创新性，但实验细节未提供。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 连续思维模型在隐空间推理中可能隐藏对齐错误，但可通过线性探针检测早期规划阶段的异常。

papers.title: From Edges to Depth: Probing the Spatial Hierarchy in Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Vision Transformers trained only on image classification routinely transfer to tasks that demand spatial understanding, yet they receive no spatial supervision during pretraining. We ask where and how robustly such structure is encoded. Probing a frozen ViT-B/16 layerwise for two complementary properties, local patch boundaries (BSDS500) and per-patch depth (NYU Depth V2), reveals a clear hierarchy: boundary structure becomes linearly decodable at layers 5-6 (AP = 0.833), while depth, which requires integrating global cues, peaks two to three layers later at layer 8 (MAE = 0.0875). Both signals collapse at the final classification layer, and random-weight controls confirm the encodings are learned rather than architectural. Causal interventions add specificity: ablating the single direction a linear depth probe reads degrades depth decoding by up to 165%, while ablating any other direction changes it by less than 1%. Targeted activation patching along that direction shows the depth signal is partially re-derived at each layer rather than passively carried in the residual stream, with mid-layer interventions persisting most strongly downstream. The result is that a classification-trained ViT develops an actively maintained spatial hierarchy that mirrors the early-to-late progression observed in the primate visual cortex.

analysis.tldr: ViT在分类训练中自发形成空间层级结构，边界信息早于深度信息出现，且深度信号在各层主动重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉Transformer仅通过图像分类训练就能迁移到需要空间理解的任务，但其内部如何编码空间结构尚不清楚，理解这一机制有助于改进模型的可解释性和迁移能力。
analysis.problem: 探究分类预训练的ViT中空间层级结构（局部边界和全局深度）的编码位置、鲁棒性及因果机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 边界信息在5-6层线性可解码，深度信息在8层达到峰值，两者在分类层消失；随机权重实验证明编码是学习得到的而非架构固有。
analysis.method: 使用线性探针（BSDS500边界、NYU Depth V2深度）逐层分析冻结的ViT-B/16，结合因果干预（方向消融、激活修补）验证深度信号的主动重建机制。
contributions: 揭示了ViT中空间层级结构的层次化编码：边界早于深度，且两者在分类层崩溃。
通过因果干预证明深度信号在各层主动重建而非被动传递，与灵长类视觉皮层处理顺序相似。
analysis.experiments: 在BSDS500和NYU Depth V2数据集上进行了探针实验和因果干预实验，报告了AP和MAE指标。
limitations: 仅使用ViT-B/16，未验证其他架构或更大模型。
探针任务仅涉及边界和深度，未涵盖更复杂的空间关系。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法创新（因果干预+探针）且揭示重要现象，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViT在分类训练中自发形成空间层级结构，边界信息早于深度信息出现，且深度信号在各层主动重建。

papers.title: ArguAgent: AI-Supported Real-Time Grouping for Productive Argumentation in STEM Classrooms
papers.abstract: Argumentation is a core practice in STEM education, but its productivity depends on who participates and how they interact. Higher-achieving students often dominate the talk and decision-making, while lower-achieving peers may disengage, defer, or comply without contributing substantive reasoning. Forming groups strategically based on students' stances and argumentation skills could help foster inclusive, evidence-based discourse. In practice, however, teachers are constrained in implementing this grouping strategy because it requires real-time insight into students' positions and the quality of their argumentation, information that is difficult to assess reliably and at scale during instruction. We present a generative AI-powered system, ArguAgent, that creates groups optimizing for stance heterogeneity while constraining argumentation quality differences to +/-1 level on a validated learning progression. ArguAgent uses a two-component assessment pipeline: first scoring student arguments on a 0-4 rubric, then clustering positions via semantic analysis. We validated the scoring component against human expert consensus (Krippendorff's ααα = 0.817) using 200 expert-generated scores. Testing three OpenAI models (GPT-4o-mini, GPT-5.1, GPT-5.2) with identical calibrated prompts, we found that systematic prompt engineering informed by human disagreement analysis contributed 89% of scoring improvement (QWK: 0.531 to 0.686), while model upgrades contributed an additional 11% (QWK: 0.686 to 0.708). Simulation testing across 100 classes demonstrated that the grouping algorithm achieves 95.4% of groups that meet both design criteria, a 3.2x improvement over random assignment. These results suggest ArguAgent can enable real-time, theoretically grounded grouping that promotes productive STEM argumentation in classrooms.

analysis.tldr: ArguAgent 利用生成式 AI 实时分组，促进 STEM 课堂中包容、基于证据的论证讨论。
analysis.research_motivation: STEM 课堂中，高成就学生常主导讨论，低成就学生易脱节，而教师难以实时评估学生立场和论证质量来优化分组。
analysis.problem: 如何根据学生立场和论证能力实时生成促进包容性论证的分组。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高成就学生主导讨论，低成就学生顺从或脱离，导致论证生产力不足；教师缺乏实时评估手段。
analysis.method: 基于生成式 AI 的两阶段评估管道：先用 0-4 评分表评估论证质量，再通过语义分析聚类立场；分组算法优化立场异质性并约束能力差异。
contributions: 提出 ArguAgent 系统，实现实时、理论驱动的论证分组。
验证了提示工程对评分改进贡献 89%，模型升级仅贡献 11%。
模拟测试显示分组算法 95.4% 满足设计标准，比随机分组提升 3.2 倍。
analysis.experiments: 使用 200 个专家评分验证评分组件（Krippendorff's α=0.817）；测试三个 OpenAI 模型；在 100 个班级模拟中评估分组算法。
limitations: 摘要未提及真实课堂部署效果。
仅依赖 OpenAI 模型，可能受限于 API 成本和延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用领域较窄，实验为模拟，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ArguAgent 利用生成式 AI 实时分组，促进 STEM 课堂中包容、基于证据的论证讨论。

papers.title: CRC-SAM: SAM-Based Multi-Modal Segmentation and Quantification of Colorectal Cancer in CT, Colonoscopy, and Histology Images
papers.abstract: We present CRC-SAM, a unified framework for colorectal cancer segmentation across colonoscopy, CT, and histopathology images. Unlike prior single-modality methods, CRC-SAM provides consistent, modality-agnostic segmentation throughout the clinical workflow. Built on MedSAM, it incorporates low-rank adaptation (LoRA) layers into a frozen encoder, enabling efficient domain transfer to underrepresented modalities with minimal trainable parameters. Experiments on MSD-Colon, CVC-ClinicDB, and EBHI-Seg demonstrate superior performance across modalities, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines and highlighting the effectiveness of lightweight LoRA adaptation for foundation-model-based colorectal cancer analysis.

analysis.tldr: CRC-SAM 是一个基于 MedSAM 和 LoRA 的多模态结直肠癌分割框架，在 CT、结肠镜和病理图像上均优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有结直肠癌分割方法通常针对单一模态，无法在临床工作流中提供一致的分割结果，且跨模态泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的、模态无关的结直肠癌分割框架，使其在 CT、结肠镜和病理图像上均能取得高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 MedSAM 基础模型，在冻结的编码器中插入低秩适应（LoRA）层，仅训练少量参数即可高效迁移到不同模态。
contributions: 提出首个统一的多模态结直肠癌分割框架 CRC-SAM，覆盖 CT、结肠镜和病理图像。
验证了 LoRA 在医学图像分割中高效迁移的有效性，仅需少量可训练参数即可超越现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 MSD-Colon、CVC-ClinicDB 和 EBHI-Seg 三个数据集上评估，CRC-SAM 在所有模态上均优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能仅在结直肠癌相关数据集上验证，泛化到其他癌症类型或器官的效果未知。
LoRA 的秩和层数选择可能影响性能，摘要未讨论超参数敏感性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等（LoRA 在医学分割中的应用），但实验充分且应用价值高，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CRC-SAM 是一个基于 MedSAM 和 LoRA 的多模态结直肠癌分割框架，在 CT、结肠镜和病理图像上均优于现有方法。

papers.title: IndustryAssetEQA: A Neurosymbolic Operational Intelligence System for Embodied Question Answering in Industrial Asset Maintenance
papers.abstract: Industrial maintenance environments increasingly rely on AI systems to assist operators in understanding asset behavior, diagnosing failures, and evaluating interventions. Although large language models (LLMs) enable fluent natural-language interaction, deployed maintenance assistants routinely produce generic explanations that are weakly grounded in telemetry, omit verifiable provenance, and offer no testable support for counterfactual or action-oriented reasoning that undermine trust in safety-critical settings. We present IndustryAssetEQA, a neurosymbolic operational intelligence system that combines episodic telemetry representations with a Failure Mode Effects Analysis Knowledge Graph (FMEA-KG) to enable Embodied Question Answering (EQA) over industrial assets. We evaluate on four datasets covering four industrial asset types, including rotating machinery, turbofan engines, hydraulic systems, and cyber-physical production systems. Compared to LLM-only baselines, IndustryAssetEQA improves structural validity by up to 0.51, counterfactual accuracy by up to 0.47, and explanation entailment by 0.64, while reducing severe expert-rated overclaims from 28% to 2% (approximately 93% reduction). Code, datasets, and the FMEA-KG are available at https://github.com/IBM/AssetOpsBench/tree/IndustryAssetEQA/IndustryAssetEQA.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号系统IndustryAssetEQA，结合遥测表示与故障知识图谱，提升工业资产维护中具身问答的结构有效性、反事实准确性和解释可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业维护中LLM助手生成的解释缺乏遥测依据、可验证来源和反事实推理能力，在安全关键场景下削弱信任。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM在工业资产维护问答中产生弱接地、无溯源、不支持反事实推理的通用解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM-only基线在结构有效性、反事实准确性和解释蕴含上表现差，且严重过度声称（28%）。
analysis.method: 结合情景遥测表示与FMEA知识图谱的神经符号系统，实现工业资产上的具身问答。
contributions: 提出IndustryAssetEQA系统，融合遥测表示与FMEA-KG进行工业资产EQA。
在四个工业资产数据集上验证，相比LLM-only基线显著提升结构有效性、反事实准确性和解释蕴含，减少过度声称。
analysis.experiments: 在旋转机械、涡扇发动机、液压系统和网络物理生产系统四个数据集上评估，与LLM-only基线对比。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工业资产类型的FMEA知识图谱构建。
未提及在更广泛工业场景或实时部署中的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（神经符号+知识图谱）且实验充分，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号系统IndustryAssetEQA，结合遥测表示与故障知识图谱，提升工业资产维护中具身问答的结构有效性、反事实准确性和解释可靠性。

papers.title: AI Safety Training Can be Clinically Harmful
papers.abstract: Large language models are being deployed as mental health support agents at scale, yet only 16% of LLM-based chatbot interventions have undergone rigorous clinical efficacy testing, and simulations reveal psychological deterioration in over one-third of cases. We evaluate four generative models on 250 Prolonged Exposure (PE) therapy scenarios and 146 CBT cognitive restructuring exercises (plus 29 severity-escalated variants), scored by a three-judge LLM panel. All models scored near-perfectly on surface acknowledgment (~0.91-1.00) while therapeutic appropriateness collapsed to 0.22-0.33 at the highest severity for three of four models, with protocol fidelity reaching zero for two. Under CBT severity escalation, one model's task completeness dropped from 92% to 71% while the frontier model's safety-interference score fell from 0.99 to 0.61. We identify a systematic, modality-spanning failure: RLHF safety alignment disrupts the therapeutic mechanism of action by grounding patients during imaginal exposure, offering false reassurance, inserting crisis resources into controlled exercises, and refusing to challenge distorted cognitions mentioning self-harm in PE; and through task abandonment or safety-preamble insertion during CBT cognitive restructuring. These findings motivate a five-axis evaluation framework (protocol fidelity, hallucination risk, behavioral consistency, crisis safety, demographic robustness), mapped onto FDA SaMD and EU AI Act requirements. We argue that no AI mental health system should proceed to deployment without passing multi-axis evaluation across all five dimensions.

analysis.tldr: RLHF安全对齐会破坏心理治疗机制，导致AI在临床场景中产生有害行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型被大规模部署为心理健康支持代理，但仅有16%的基于LLM的聊天机器人干预经过严格的临床有效性测试，模拟显示超过三分之一的案例出现心理恶化，亟需评估其临床安全性。
analysis.problem: 评估生成模型在心理治疗场景中的临床安全性和有效性，揭示安全对齐训练对治疗机制的破坏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在表面认可上得分接近完美（~0.91-1.00），但治疗适当性在最高严重度下崩溃至0.22-0.33，协议保真度降至零；RLHF安全对齐通过接地暴露、虚假安慰、插入危机资源、拒绝挑战提及自伤的扭曲认知等方式破坏治疗机制。
analysis.method: 在250个延长暴露治疗场景和146个CBT认知重构练习（含29个严重度升级变体）上评估四个生成模型，由三法官LLM小组评分。
contributions: 系统性地识别了RLHF安全对齐在心理治疗场景中的有害行为模式
提出了五轴评估框架（协议保真度、幻觉风险、行为一致性、危机安全性、人口统计鲁棒性）并映射到FDA SaMD和EU AI Act要求
analysis.experiments: 在250个PE场景和146个CBT练习上评估四个模型，使用三法官LLM评分，报告了表面认可、治疗适当性、协议保真度、任务完成度、安全干扰分数等指标。
limitations: 仅评估了四个生成模型，可能不具广泛代表性
评估依赖LLM评分，可能引入偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 问题重要且发现具有临床意义，但方法为评估而非新算法，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RLHF安全对齐会破坏心理治疗机制，导致AI在临床场景中产生有害行为。

papers.title: Resource-Constrained UAV-Based Weed Detection for Site-Specific Management on Edge Devices
papers.abstract: Weeds compete with crops for light, water, and nutrients, reducing yield and crop quality. Efficient weed detection is essential for site-specific weed management (SSWM). Although deep learning models have been deployed on UAV-based edge systems, a systematic understanding of how different model architectures perform under real-world resource constraints is still lacking. To address this gap, this study proposes a deployment-oriented framework for real-time UAV-based weed detection on resource-constrained edge platforms. The framework integrates UAV data acquisition, model development, and on-device inference, with a focus on balancing detection accuracy and computational efficiency. A diverse set of state-of-the-art object detection models is evaluated, including convolution-based YOLO models (v8-v12) and transformer-based RT-DETR models (v1-v2). Experiments on three edge devices (Jetson Orin Nano, Jetson AGX Xavier, and Jetson AGX Orin) demonstrate clear trade-offs between accuracy and inference latency across models and hardware configurations. Results show that high-capacity models achieve up to 86.9% mAP50 but suffer from high latency, limiting real-time deployment. In contrast, lightweight models achieve 66%-71% mAP50 with significantly lower latency, enabling real-time performance. Among all models, RT-DETRv2-R50-M achieves competitive accuracy (79% mAP50) with improved efficiency, while YOLOv10n provides the fastest inference speed. YOLOv11s and RT-DETRv2-R50-M offer the best balance between accuracy and speed, making them strong candidates for real-time UAV deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向资源受限无人机平台的杂草检测框架，评估YOLO和RT-DETR模型在边缘设备上的精度-延迟权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 杂草检测对精准农业至关重要，但现有深度学习模型在无人机边缘设备上的资源约束下缺乏系统性性能评估。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的无人机边缘平台上实现实时且准确的杂草检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高容量模型（如YOLOv12）可达86.9% mAP50但延迟高，轻量模型（如YOLOv10n）延迟低但精度仅66%-71%，存在明显权衡。
analysis.method: 提出部署导向框架，集成无人机数据采集、模型开发和设备端推理，评估YOLO v8-v12和RT-DETR v1-v2在Jetson Orin Nano、AGX Xavier、AGX Orin上的性能。
contributions: 系统评估了多种YOLO和RT-DETR模型在三个边缘设备上的精度与延迟权衡
识别出YOLOv11s和RT-DETRv2-R50-M为实时无人机部署的最佳平衡模型
analysis.experiments: 在三个Jetson边缘设备上评估多个模型，报告了mAP50和延迟指标，摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 仅评估了特定边缘设备，可能不适用于其他硬件
未讨论模型在多样化杂草和光照条件下的泛化能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统评估了多种模型在边缘设备上的性能，但方法创新有限，适合相关领域参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向资源受限无人机平台的杂草检测框架，评估YOLO和RT-DETR模型在边缘设备上的精度-延迟权衡。

papers.title: Knee-xRAI: An Explainable AI Framework for Automatic Kellgren-Lawrence Grading of Knee Osteoarthritis
papers.abstract: Radiographic grading of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) with the Kellgren-Lawrence (KL) system is limited by inter-reader variability and the opacity of current deep learning approaches, which predict KL grades directly from images without decomposing structural features. We present Knee-xRAI, a modular framework that independently quantifies the three cardinal radiographic features of KOA (joint space narrowing [JSN], osteophytes, and subchondral sclerosis) and integrates them into an explainable KL grade classification. The pipeline combines U-Net++ segmentation for contour-based JSN measurement, an SE-ResNet-50 network for per-site osteophyte grading (OARSI scale), and a hybrid texture-CNN classifier for binary sclerosis quantification. The resulting 50-dimensional structured feature vector feeds two complementary classification paths. An XGBoost path supports SHAP-based feature attribution. A ConvNeXt hybrid path combines the structured vector with a full-image encoder for enhanced predictive performance. Evaluated on 8,260 radiographs from an OAI-derived dataset, the JSN module achieved a Dice coefficient of 0.8909 and an mJSW intraclass correlation of 0.8674 against manual annotations. The ConvNeXt hybrid path reached a test quadratic weighted kappa (QWK) of 0.8436 and AUC of 0.9017. The transparent XGBoost path achieved a test QWK of 0.6294 with full feature-level audit capability. Ablation confirmed JSN as the dominant predictor (QWK = 0.6103 alone), with osteophyte features providing consistent incremental gain (+0.0183) and sclerosis contributing marginally. Inference-time ablation of Path B confirmed the structured pathway contributes materially beyond the image encoder, with QWK drops of 0.098 (feature zeroing) and 0.284 (feature-image permutation). Knee-xRAI explicitly quantifies all three KL-defining radiographic features within a single auditable pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释的KL分级框架，独立量化关节间隙狭窄、骨赘和软骨下硬化三个特征，实现透明且高性能的膝骨关节炎分级。
analysis.research_motivation: KL分级系统存在阅片者间变异大，且现有深度学习方法直接预测KL等级，缺乏对结构特征的分解，导致模型不透明。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既能准确进行KL分级，又能独立量化并解释三个关键放射学特征（JSN、骨赘、硬化）的框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 模块化框架：U-Net++分割测量JSN，SE-ResNet-50进行骨赘分级，混合纹理-CNN分类器量化硬化；提取50维特征向量，分别输入XGBoost（支持SHAP）和ConvNeXt混合路径（结合特征与全图编码）进行分类。
contributions: 提出首个独立量化KL三个放射学特征并整合为可解释KL分级的模块化框架。
在OAI数据集上验证了各模块性能，并进行了消融实验分析各特征的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在8260张OAI来源的X光片上评估：JSN模块Dice=0.8909，mJSW ICC=0.8674；ConvNeXt混合路径QWK=0.8436，AUC=0.9017；XGBoost路径QWK=0.6294；消融显示JSN是主要预测因子（QWK=0.6103），骨赘增量+0.0183，硬化贡献微小。
limitations: 仅基于OAI数据集，泛化性需在其他数据集验证。
硬化量化采用二分类，可能无法捕捉更细微的硬化程度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，医学图像可解释性方向有价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释的KL分级框架，独立量化关节间隙狭窄、骨赘和软骨下硬化三个特征，实现透明且高性能的膝骨关节炎分级。

papers.title: Sphere-Depth: A Benchmark for Depth Estimation Methods with Varying Spherical Camera Orientations
papers.abstract: Reliable depth estimation from spherical images is crucial for 360° vision in robotic navigation and immersive scene understanding. However, the onboard spherical camera can experience unintentional pose variations in real-world robotic platforms that, along with the geometric distortions inherent in equirectangular projections, significantly impact the effectiveness of depth estimation. To study this issue, a novel public benchmark, called Sphere-Depth, is introduced to systematically evaluate the robustness of monocular depth estimation models from equirectangular images in a reproducible way. Camera pose perturbations are simulated and used to assess the performance of a popular perspective-based model, Depth Anything, and of spherical-aware models such as Depth Anywhere, ACDNet, Bifuse++, and SliceNet. Furthermore, to ensure meaningful evaluation across models, a depth calibration-based error protocol is proposed to convert predicted relative depth values into metric depth values using supervised learned scaling factors for each model. Experiments show that even models explicitly designed to process spherical images exhibit substantial performance degradation when variations in the camera pose are observed with respect to the canonical pose. The full benchmark, evaluation protocol, and dataset splits are made publicly available at: https://github.com/sgazzeh/Sphere_depth

analysis.tldr: 提出Sphere-Depth基准，系统评估球面相机姿态变化对深度估计模型鲁棒性的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 球面相机在机器人导航等应用中常发生非故意姿态变化，结合等距柱状投影的几何畸变，严重影响深度估计效果，但缺乏系统性评估基准。
analysis.problem: 现有深度估计方法在球面相机姿态变化下的鲁棒性未知，缺乏标准化评估协议和公开基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，即使是专为球面图像设计的模型，在相机姿态偏离标准姿态时性能也会显著下降。
analysis.method: 构建Sphere-Depth基准，包含模拟相机姿态扰动的评估流程，并提出基于深度校准的误差协议，将预测的相对深度通过监督学习的缩放因子转换为度量深度。
contributions: 首个系统评估球面相机姿态变化对深度估计影响的公开基准Sphere-Depth。
提出深度校准误差协议，实现不同模型间有意义的度量深度比较。
analysis.experiments: 在Sphere-Depth基准上评估了Depth Anything、Depth Anywhere、ACDNet、Bifuse++和SliceNet等模型，发现姿态变化导致性能显著下降。
limitations: 仅模拟了有限类型的姿态扰动，可能未覆盖真实场景中所有变化。
深度校准依赖监督学习的缩放因子，可能引入额外偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准构建系统，实验揭示重要现象，但方法增量有限，适合关注深度估计鲁棒性的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Sphere-Depth基准，系统评估球面相机姿态变化对深度估计模型鲁棒性的影响。

papers.title: Automating Categorization of Scientific Texts with In-Context Learning and Prompt-Chaining in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: The relentless expansion of scientific literature presents significant challenges for navigation and knowledge discovery. Within Research Information Retrieval, established tasks such as text summarization and classification remain crucial for enabling researchers and practitioners to effectively navigate this vast landscape, so that efforts have increasingly been focused on developing advanced research information systems. These systems aim not only to provide standard keyword-based search functionalities but also to incorporate capabilities for automatic content categorization within knowledge-intensive organizations across academia and industry. This study systematically evaluates the performance of off-the-shelf Large Language Models (LLMs) in analyzing scientific texts according to a given classification scheme. We utilized the hierarchical ORKG taxonomy as a classification framework, employing the FORC dataset as ground truth. We investigated the effectiveness of advanced prompt engineering strategies, namely In-Context Learning (ICL) and Prompt Chaining, and experimentally explored the influence of the LLMs' temperature hyperparameter on classification accuracy. Our experiments demonstrate that Prompt Chaining yields superior classification accuracy compared to pure ICL, particularly when applied to the nested structure of the ORKG taxonomy. LLMs with prompt chaining outperform the state-of-the-art models for domain (1st level) prediction and show even better performance for subject (2nd level) prediction compared to the older BERT model. However, LLMs are not yet able to perform well in classifying the topic (3rd level) of research areas based on this specific hierarchical taxonomy, as they only reach about 50% accuracy even with prompt chaining.

analysis.tldr: 利用大语言模型和提示链技术自动分类科学文本，在领域和学科层面表现优异，但主题层面准确率仅约50%。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学文献数量激增，传统关键词搜索难以满足知识发现需求，亟需自动内容分类系统帮助研究人员高效导航。
analysis.problem: 如何利用现成的大语言模型（LLMs）结合提示工程策略，根据层次化分类体系（如ORKG）自动对科学文本进行准确分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提示链（Prompt Chaining）在嵌套分类结构上优于纯上下文学习（ICL）；LLMs在领域（一级）和学科（二级）分类上超越SOTA和BERT，但在主题（三级）分类上准确率仅约50%，表明深层分类仍是挑战。
analysis.method: 采用上下文学习（ICL）和提示链（Prompt Chaining）两种提示工程策略，并实验探索温度超参数对分类准确率的影响，以ORKG层次化分类体系为框架，FORC数据集为基准。
contributions: 系统评估了现成LLMs在科学文本层次分类中的性能，并对比了ICL与提示链的效果。
发现提示链在嵌套分类结构上显著优于纯ICL，且在领域和学科层面达到或超越现有最佳模型。
analysis.experiments: 在FORC数据集上使用ORKG分类体系，比较ICL和提示链策略，并探究温度参数影响。结果显示提示链在领域和学科预测上优于SOTA和BERT，但主题预测准确率仅约50%。
limitations: 仅使用单一分类体系（ORKG）和数据集（FORC），泛化性未知。
主题（三级）分类准确率低，LLMs在细粒度层次上能力不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验系统但主题分类效果有限，对自动分类领域有参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用大语言模型和提示链技术自动分类科学文本，在领域和学科层面表现优异，但主题层面准确率仅约50%。

papers.title: Enhanced Privacy and Communication Efficiency in Non-IID Federated Learning with Adaptive Quantization and Differential Privacy
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a distributed machine learning method where multiple devices collaboratively train a model under the management of a central server without sharing underlying data. One of the key challenges of FL is the communication bottleneck caused by variations in connection speed and bandwidth across devices. Therefore, it is essential to reduce the size of transmitted data during training. Additionally, there is a potential risk of exposing sensitive information through the model or gradient analysis during training. To address both privacy and communication efficiency, we combine differential privacy (DP) and adaptive quantization methods. We use Laplacian-based DP to preserve privacy, which is relatively underexplored in FL and offers tighter privacy guarantees than Gaussian-based DP. We propose a simple and efficient global bit-length scheduler using round-based cosine annealing, along with a client-based scheduler that dynamically adapts based on client contribution estimated through dataset entropy analysis. We evaluate our approach through extensive experiments on CIFAR10, MNIST, and medical imaging datasets, using non-IID data distributions across varying client counts, bit-length schedulers, and privacy budgets. The results show that our adaptive quantization methods reduce total communicated data by up to 52.64% for MNIST, 45.06% for CIFAR10, and 31% to 37% for medical imaging datasets compared to 32-bit float training while maintaining competitive model accuracy and ensuring robust privacy through differential privacy.

analysis.tldr: 结合自适应量化和差分隐私，在非独立同分布联邦学习中同时提升通信效率和隐私保护。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中通信瓶颈和隐私泄露风险是两大关键挑战，现有方法在非独立同分布场景下效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在非独立同分布联邦学习中同时实现通信高效和隐私保护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合拉普拉斯差分隐私和自适应量化，提出全局余弦退火比特长度调度器和基于客户端数据熵贡献的动态调度器。
contributions: 提出结合拉普拉斯差分隐私和自适应量化的联邦学习框架。
设计全局和客户端两级的比特长度调度器，显著降低通信量。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR10、MNIST和医学图像数据集上，使用非独立同分布数据分布进行实验，通信量降低31%-52.64%，同时保持模型精度和隐私保护。
limitations: 未讨论计算开销增加。
未与其他隐私-效率权衡方法进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法结合了差分隐私和自适应量化，实验充分，但创新性中等，适合关注联邦学习隐私与效率的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合自适应量化和差分隐私，在非独立同分布联邦学习中同时提升通信效率和隐私保护。

papers.title: A Heterogeneous Two-Stream Framework for Video Action Recognition with Comparative Fusion Analysis
papers.abstract: Most two-stream action recognition networks apply the same convolutional backbone to both RGB and optical flow streams, ignoring the fact that the two modalities have fundamentally different structural properties. Optical flow captures fine-grained motion patterns, while RGB frames carry rich appearance and scene context - treating them identically discards this distinction. We propose DualStreamHybrid, a heterogeneous two-stream architecture that assigns each stream a backbone suited to its input: a pretrained ViT-Tiny/16 for RGB frames, and a MobileNetV2 trained from scratch on a 20-channel stacked optical flow representation. A learned projection layer maps the two differently-sized feature vectors to a common dimensionality before fusion, enabling the two streams to interact without forcing architectural symmetry. We design five fusion strategies within a unified framework - late fusion, concatenation, cross-attention, weighted fusion, and gated fusion - and evaluate them on UCF11 (1,600 videos, 11 classes) and UCF50 (6,681 videos, 50 classes) to study how fusion behaviour scales with dataset size. On UCF11, cross-attention achieves 98.12% test accuracy, outperforming the RGB-only ViT-Tiny baseline of 95.94%, which suggests that explicit inter-modal attention is particularly effective on smaller, less complex datasets. On UCF50, weighted fusion reaches 96.86% and proves the most consistent strategy across both benchmarks. The learned stream weights reveal an interesting pattern: UCF11 sees near-equal modality contribution (RGB: 0.507, flow: 0.493), while UCF50 favours the RGB stream slightly more (RGB: 0.554, flow: 0.446) - arguably reflecting the larger and more visually diverse action space. Taken together, these results suggest that even a lightweight motion stream meaningfully complements a strong appearance encoder, and that the optimal fusion strategy depends on dataset scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出异构双流框架DualStreamHybrid，为RGB和光流分别使用不同骨干网络，并比较五种融合策略，发现交叉注意力在小数据集上最优，加权融合在大数据集上更稳定。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有双流动作识别网络对RGB和光流使用相同骨干，忽略了两种模态的结构差异，限制了性能提升。
analysis.problem: 如何为RGB和光流设计异构骨干网络，并找到最优的融合策略以适应不同规模的数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DualStreamHybrid框架：RGB流使用预训练ViT-Tiny/16，光流流使用从零训练的MobileNetV2处理20通道堆叠光流；通过投影层统一特征维度；设计五种融合策略（晚期融合、拼接、交叉注意力、加权融合、门控融合）进行比较。
contributions: 提出异构双流架构，为不同模态分配不同骨干网络。
系统比较五种融合策略，揭示数据集规模对最优融合策略的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在UCF11（1600视频，11类）和UCF50（6681视频，50类）上评估，UCF11上交叉注意力达98.12%准确率，UCF50上加权融合达96.86%。
limitations: 仅在两个小规模数据集上验证，未在更大基准如UCF101或Kinetics上测试。
光流流使用MobileNetV2，可能无法充分捕捉复杂运动模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模较小，贡献偏增量，适合相关方向研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异构双流框架DualStreamHybrid，为RGB和光流分别使用不同骨干网络，并比较五种融合策略，发现交叉注意力在小数据集上最优，加权融合在大数据集上更稳定。

papers.title: PushupBench: Your VLM is not good at counting pushups
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) can recognize \textit{what} happens in video but fail to count \textit{how many} times. We introduce \textbf{PushupBench}, 446 long-form clips (avg. 36.7s) for evaluating repetition counting. The best frontier model achieves 42.1\% exact accuracy; open-source 4B models score $\sim$6\%, matching supervised baselines. We show that accuracy alone misleads -- weaker models exploit the modal count rather than reason temporally. Fine-tuning on counting with 1k samples transfers to general video understanding: MVBench (+2.15), PerceptionTest (+1.88), TVBench (+4.54), suggesting counting is a proxy for broader temporal reasoning.PushupBench incorporated in \texttt{lmms-eval} (https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/lmms-eval/pull/1262) and hosted on (pushupbench.com/)

analysis.tldr: PushupBench 揭示 VLM 在视频重复计数任务上表现极差，且微调计数可提升通用视频理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLM 能识别视频内容但无法准确计数重复动作，缺乏专门评估基准，且计数能力与时间推理的关系未被探索。
analysis.problem: VLM 在长视频重复计数任务上表现不足，现有指标（如准确率）可能误导，需要新基准和训练策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弱模型利用众数计数而非时间推理，导致准确率虚高；微调计数任务可迁移至通用视频理解基准。
analysis.method: 构建 PushupBench 基准（446 个长视频片段，平均 36.7 秒），评估 VLM 重复计数能力，并探索计数微调对通用视频理解的迁移效果。
contributions: 提出 PushupBench，首个专注于长视频重复计数的基准，揭示前沿 VLM 准确率仅 42.1%。
发现准确率指标的误导性，弱模型依赖众数计数。
证明计数微调可提升通用视频理解（MVBench +2.15 等）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅聚焦俯卧撑单一动作，泛化性待验证。
微调样本量小（1k），大规模效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准新颖且揭示重要现象，但仅单一动作，实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PushupBench 揭示 VLM 在视频重复计数任务上表现极差，且微调计数可提升通用视频理解。

papers.title: Learn&Drop: Fast Learning of CNNs based on Layer Dropping
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a new method to improve the training efficiency of deep convolutional neural networks. During training, the method evaluates scores to measure how much each layer's parameters change and whether the layer will continue learning or not. Based on these scores, the network is scaled down such that the number of parameters to be learned is reduced, yielding a speed up in training. Unlike state-of-the-art methods that try to compress the network to be used in the inference phase or to limit the number of operations performed in the backpropagation phase, the proposed method is novel in that it focuses on reducing the number of operations performed by the network in the forward propagation during training. The proposed training strategy has been validated on two widely used architecture families: VGG and ResNet. Experiments on MNIST, CIFAR-10 and Imagenette show that, with the proposed method, the training time of the models is more than halved without significantly impacting accuracy. The FLOPs reduction in the forward propagation during training ranges from 17.83\% for VGG-11 to 83.74\% for ResNet-152. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed technique in speeding up learning of CNNs. The technique will be especially useful in applications where fine-tuning or online training of convolutional models is required, for instance because data arrive sequentially.

analysis.tldr: 提出Learn&Drop方法，通过评估层参数变化分数在训练中动态丢弃层，减少前向传播计算量，使CNN训练时间减半且精度损失小。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度CNN训练计算成本高，现有方法主要压缩推理阶段或限制反向传播操作，但前向传播在训练中仍消耗大量计算，需要更高效的训练策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著影响精度的情况下，减少CNN训练过程中前向传播的计算量以加速训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在训练过程中，为每层计算一个分数，衡量参数变化程度及是否继续学习；根据分数动态缩小网络，减少需学习的参数数量，从而降低前向传播的FLOPs。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的训练加速方法，专注于减少训练前向传播的计算量，而非推理或反向传播。
在VGG和ResNet架构上验证，训练时间减半，FLOPs降低17.83%至83.74%，精度影响小。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10和Imagenette数据集上，使用VGG和ResNet系列模型进行实验，训练时间减半，FLOPs降低显著，精度未大幅下降。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构（VGG/ResNet），对其他CNN架构的泛化性未知。
动态丢弃层可能影响模型表达能力，在复杂任务上精度损失可能更大。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模较小，且与当前重点方向（VLM/生成模型等）关联较弱，适合保存稍后阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Learn&Drop方法，通过评估层参数变化分数在训练中动态丢弃层，减少前向传播计算量，使CNN训练时间减半且精度损失小。

papers.title: Breaking the Resource Wall: Geometry-Guided Sequence Modeling for Efficient Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: High-performance semantic segmentation has achieved significant progress in recent years, often driven by increasingly large backbones and higher computational budgets. While effective, such approaches introduce substantial computational overhead and limit accessibility under constrained hardware settings. In this paper, we propose DGM-Net (Directional Geometric Mamba Network), an efficient architecture that improves modeling capability through structural design rather than increasing model capacity. We introduce Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba), a linear-complexity O(N) operator as an alternative to conventional context modeling modules such as ASPP and PPM. To further enhance structural awareness in state space model (SSM)-based modeling, we design the DGM-Module, which extracts centripetal flow fields and topological skeletons to guide the scanning process and improve boundary preservation. Without relying on large-scale pretraining or heavy backbone scaling, DGM-Net achieves 80.8% mIoU within 28k iterations, 82.3% mIoU on Cityscapes test set, and 45.24% mIoU on ADE20K. In addition, the model maintains stable performance under constrained hardware settings (e.g., batch size of 2 on 8GB VRAM), highlighting its efficiency and practicality. These results demonstrate that incorporating geometric guidance into SSM-based architectures provides an effective and resource-efficient direction for semantic segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DGM-Net，通过几何引导的线性复杂度序列建模实现高效语义分割，无需大模型或大算力。
analysis.research_motivation: 高性能语义分割依赖大骨干网络和高计算预算，导致计算开销大、硬件受限场景下难以部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持分割精度的同时大幅降低计算复杂度，使模型在有限硬件资源下高效运行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DGM-Net，核心是 Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba) 线性复杂度算子替代 ASPP/PPM，以及 DGM-Module 提取向心流场和拓扑骨架引导扫描过程，增强边界保持。
contributions: 提出线性复杂度 O(N) 的 Directional Geometric Mamba 算子，替代传统上下文建模模块。
设计 DGM-Module 利用几何引导（向心流场和拓扑骨架）提升状态空间模型的边界感知能力。
在 Cityscapes 和 ADE20K 上达到有竞争力的精度，且能在 8GB VRAM 下以 batch size 2 稳定运行。
analysis.experiments: 在 Cityscapes 测试集上达到 82.3% mIoU，ADE20K 上 45.24% mIoU，训练 28k 迭代达到 80.8% mIoU，并在 8GB VRAM 下验证了低资源稳定性。
limitations: 可能仅在语义分割任务上验证，未提及在其他密集预测任务上的泛化性。
几何引导模块的额外计算开销未与纯 SSM 基线详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（几何引导 SSM）且实验充分，但仅限语义分割，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 DGM-Net，通过几何引导的线性复杂度序列建模实现高效语义分割，无需大模型或大算力。

papers.title: When Corrective Hints Hurt: Prompt Design in Reasoner-Guided Repair of LLM Overcaution on Entailed Negations under OWL~2~DL
papers.abstract: We report a reproducible error pattern in GPT-5.4 on OWL~2~DL compliance queries: the model frequently answers ``unknown'' when the reasoner-entailed answer is ``no'' under \emph{FunctionalProperty} closure or class \emph{disjointness}. Using 180 reasoner-audited queries from a procedural expansion of the observed pattern plus 18 hand-authored held-out queries in two unrelated domains (insurance and clinical), we compare four interaction modes under matched query budget: single-shot, three rounds of generic ``you-are-wrong'' retry, three rounds of reasoner-verdict repair with an open-world-assumption (OWA) hint, and the same repair without the hint. Direct faithfulness is 43.9\,\% (Wilson 95\,\% CI $[36.8,51.2]$); generic retry reaches 81.7\,\% ($[75.4,86.6]$); the verdict-with-hint variant is \emph{worse} at 67.2\,\% ($[60.1,73.7]$); the verdict-only variant reaches 97.8\,\% ($[94.4,99.1]$). All pairwise comparisons remain significant under McNemar's exact test with Bonferroni correction ($α= 0.01$; all $p < 10^{-5}$). The same fingerprint accounts for 4/4 errors on the held-out queries. Our interpretation is bounded: prompt framing can matter more than corrective content, and reasoner-guided wrappers should be ablated explicitly.

analysis.tldr: 在OWL~2~DL推理器引导的LLM过度谨慎修复中，提示设计比纠正内容更重要，且错误的提示（如开放世界假设提示）反而会降低性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在OWL~2~DL合规查询中常因过度谨慎而回答“未知”，需要推理器引导的修复，但提示设计对修复效果的影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究在推理器引导的LLM修复中，不同提示模式（尤其是开放世界假设提示）对修复过度谨慎错误的效果差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：直接查询准确率仅43.9%；通用重试提升至81.7%；但带有开放世界假设提示的修复反而更差（67.2%），而不带该提示的修复达到97.8%。所有对比在统计上显著。
analysis.method: 使用180个推理器审计的查询和18个手工编写的保留查询，比较四种交互模式：单次查询、三轮通用重试、带开放世界假设提示的三轮修复、不带该提示的三轮修复。
contributions: 发现并复现了GPT-5.4在OWL~2~DL合规查询中的过度谨慎错误模式
通过系统实验证明提示框架比纠正内容更重要，且错误的提示会损害修复效果
analysis.experiments: 在180个扩展查询和18个保留查询上比较四种模式，报告准确率及Wilson置信区间，使用McNemar精确检验和Bonferroni校正。
limitations: 仅针对GPT-5.4和OWL~2~DL特定错误模式，泛化性有限
未探索其他提示变体或更复杂的修复策略
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 实验设计严谨，但问题领域较窄，贡献增量，适合关注LLM安全对齐的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在OWL~2~DL推理器引导的LLM过度谨慎修复中，提示设计比纠正内容更重要，且错误的提示（如开放世界假设提示）反而会降低性能。

papers.title: Lost in Decoding? Reproducing and Stress-Testing the Look-Ahead Prior in Generative Retrieval
papers.abstract: Generative retrieval (GR) ranks documents by autoregressively generating document identifiers. Because many GR methods rely on trie-constrained beam search, they are vulnerable to early pruning of relevant prefixes under finite-beam decoding. Planning Ahead in Generative Retrieval (PAG) mitigates this failure mode by using simultaneous decoding to compute a document-level look-ahead prior that guides subsequent sequential decoding. We reproduce PAG at inference time and stress-test its decoding behavior. Using the authors' released checkpoint and identifier/trie artifacts under the reported decoding setup, we reproduce the main effectiveness results on MS MARCO Dev and TREC-DL 2019/2020, and corroborate the reported beam-size-latency trade-off in our hardware setting. Beyond reproduction, we introduce plan drift diagnostics that quantify how intent-preserving query variations alter the planner's top-n candidate set and highest-weight planner tokens, and how these changes affect guided decoding. We find that PAG's planning signal is brittle under lexical surface-form variation: intent-preserving typos can trigger plan collapse, where the planned candidate pool shifts enough that the look-ahead bonus provides little useful guidance, effectively reverting decoding toward weaker unguided search. We further evaluate fixed-index cross-lingual robustness using non-English mMARCO queries against an English index, and assess query-side mitigation strategies that require no re-indexing; query translation provides the strongest recovery in our setting. Overall, our results confirm PAG's reported effectiveness and the benefit of planning-guided decoding under the released inference setup, while showing that these gains depend on the stability of the planning signal under realistic query variation and query-document mismatch.

analysis.tldr: 复现并压力测试了生成式检索中的前瞻先验方法PAG，发现其规划信号在查询扰动下脆弱，但查询翻译可有效恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式检索依赖束搜索解码，易因早期剪枝丢失相关文档；PAG通过前瞻先验缓解此问题，但其鲁棒性尚未被系统检验。
analysis.problem: 评估PAG方法在查询扰动（如拼写错误、跨语言）下的解码行为稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PAG的规划信号在意图保持的拼写错误下脆弱，可导致规划候选池偏移，使前瞻增益失效，解码退化为无引导搜索。
analysis.method: 复现PAG推理，引入规划漂移诊断指标，并测试查询翻译等缓解策略。
contributions: 成功复现PAG在MS MARCO和TREC-DL上的主要结果及束大小-延迟权衡。
发现PAG规划信号在词汇表面形式变化下脆弱，提出规划漂移诊断方法。
评估跨语言鲁棒性并验证查询翻译作为无需重索引的缓解策略的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MS MARCO Dev、TREC-DL 2019/2020上复现有效性，在mMARCO上测试跨语言鲁棒性，并分析查询扰动影响。
limitations: 仅测试了英文索引下的跨语言场景，未考虑多语言索引。
缓解策略仅评估查询翻译，未探索其他方法如数据增强。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 复现工作并揭示鲁棒性问题，方法增量但诊断工具实用，适合相关领域研究者参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 复现并压力测试了生成式检索中的前瞻先验方法PAG，发现其规划信号在查询扰动下脆弱，但查询翻译可有效恢复。

papers.title: SoccerRef-Agents: Multi-Agent System for Automated Soccer Refereeing
papers.abstract: Refereeing is vital in sports, where fair, accurate, and explainable decisions are fundamental. While intelligent assistant technologies are being widely adopted in soccer refereeing, current AI-assisted approaches remain preliminary. Existing research mostly focuses on isolated video perception tasks and lacks the ability to understand and reason about foul scenarios. To fill this gap, we propose SoccerRef-Agents, a holistic and explainable multi-agent decision-making framework for soccer refereeing. The main contributions are: (i) constructing the multimodal benchmark SoccerRefBench with over 1,200 referee theory questions and 600 foul video clips; (ii) building a vector-based knowledge base RefKnowledgeDB using the latest "Laws of the Game" and a classic case database for precise, knowledge-driven reasoning; (iii) designing a novel multi-agent architecture that collaborates via cross-modal RAG to bridge the semantic gap between visual content and regulatory texts. This work explores the technical capability of integrating MLLMs with refereeing expertise, and evaluations show our system significantly outperforms general-purpose MLLMs in decision accuracy and explanation quality. All databases, benchmarks, and code will be made available.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体裁判系统SoccerRef-Agents，结合多模态大模型与裁判知识库，提升足球判罚的准确性与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI辅助裁判方法主要聚焦于孤立的视频感知任务，缺乏对犯规场景的理解与推理能力，难以满足公平、准确且可解释的判罚需求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够理解视频内容、结合裁判规则知识并进行可解释推理的自动化足球裁判系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用多模态大模型在足球判罚任务上表现不足，难以弥合视觉内容与规则文本之间的语义鸿沟。
analysis.method: 提出SoccerRef-Agents，一种多智能体决策框架，通过跨模态RAG（检索增强生成）协作，结合向量化裁判知识库RefKnowledgeDB（基于最新《比赛规则》和经典案例）进行知识驱动推理。
contributions: 构建了包含1200+裁判理论问题和600个犯规视频片段的多模态基准SoccerRefBench
设计了基于向量检索的裁判知识库RefKnowledgeDB，实现精确的知识驱动推理
提出了跨模态RAG协作的多智能体架构，显著提升了判罚准确性和解释质量
analysis.experiments: 在SoccerRefBench上评估，系统在决策准确性和解释质量上显著优于通用多模态大模型。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的视频片段和规则库，对罕见或复杂犯规场景的泛化能力有待验证
多智能体协作可能引入额外计算开销，实时性需进一步优化
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合多智能体与RAG解决具体应用问题，实验显示显著提升，但应用领域较专，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体裁判系统SoccerRef-Agents，结合多模态大模型与裁判知识库，提升足球判罚的准确性与可解释性。

papers.title: A Parametric Memory Head for Continual Generative Retrieval
papers.abstract: Generative information retrieval (GenIR) consolidates retrieval into a single neural model that decodes document identifiers (docids) directly from queries. While this model-as-index paradigm offers architectural simplicity, it is poorly suited to dynamic document collections. Unlike modular systems, where indexes are easily updated, GenIR's knowledge is parametrically encoded in its weights; consequently, standard adaptation methods such as full and parameter-efficient fine-tuning can induce catastrophic forgetting. We show that sequential adaptation improves retrieval on newly added documents but substantially degrades performance on earlier slices, exposing a pronounced stability-plasticity trade-off. To address this, we propose post-adaptation memory tuning (PAMT), a memory-only stabilization stage that augments an adapted model with a modular parametric memory head (PMH). PAMT freezes the backbone and attaches a product-key memory with fixed addressing. During prefix-trie constrained decoding, decoder hidden states sparsely query PMH to produce residual corrections in hidden space; these corrections are mapped to score adjustments via the frozen output embedding matrix, computed only over trie-valid tokens. This guides docid generation while keeping routing and backbone parameters fixed. To limit cross-slice interference, PAMT updates only a fixed budget of memory values selected using decoding-time access statistics, prioritizing entries frequently activated by the current slice and rarely used in prior sessions. Experiments on MS MARCO and Natural Questions under sequential, disjoint corpus increments show that PAMT substantially improves retention on earlier slices with minimal impact on retrieval performance for newly added documents, while modifying only a sparse subset of memory values per session.

analysis.tldr: 提出参数化记忆头（PMH）和事后适应记忆调优（PAMT），缓解生成式检索在连续文档增量中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式信息检索（GenIR）将索引参数化到模型权重中，难以适应动态文档集合，标准微调方法会导致灾难性遗忘，存在稳定性-可塑性权衡。
analysis.problem: 解决GenIR在连续文档增量场景下，适应新文档时严重遗忘旧文档知识的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 顺序适应新文档会显著降低先前文档的检索性能，暴露了稳定性-可塑性权衡。
analysis.method: 提出PAMT，在适应后冻结骨干网络，附加参数化记忆头（PMH），通过乘积键记忆和稀疏查询产生残差修正，仅更新当前切片频繁激活且先前切片少用的记忆条目。
contributions: 揭示了生成式检索在连续文档增量中的灾难性遗忘问题。
提出PAMT方法，通过参数化记忆头和稀疏记忆更新有效缓解遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在MS MARCO和Natural Questions数据集上，采用顺序、不重叠的文档增量设置，PAMT显著提高了早期切片的保留性能，同时对新文档影响很小。
limitations: 可能依赖记忆头容量和稀疏更新策略的调优。
未在更大规模或更多样化的数据集上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对生成式检索的持续学习问题有明确贡献，实验验证有效，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参数化记忆头（PMH）和事后适应记忆调优（PAMT），缓解生成式检索在连续文档增量中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: Keypoint-based Dynamic Object 6-DoF Pose Tracking via Event Camera
papers.abstract: Accurate 6-DoF pose estimation of objects is critical for robots to perform precise manipulation tasks. However, for dynamic object pose estimation, conventional camera-based approaches face several major challenges, such as motion blur, sensor noise, and low-light limitation. To address these issues, we employ event cameras, whose high dynamic range and low latency offer a promising solution. Furthermore, we propose a keypoint-based detection and tracking approach for dynamic object pose estimation. Firstly, a keypoint detection network is constructed to extract keypoints from the time surface generated by the event stream. Subsequently, the polarity and spatial coordinates of the events are leveraged, and the event density in the vicinity of each keypoint is utilized to achieve continuous keypoint tracking. Finally, a hash mapping is established between the 2D keypoints and the 3D model keypoints, and the EPnP algorithm is employed to estimate the 6-DoF pose. Experimental results demonstrate that, whether in simulated or real event environments, the proposed method outperforms the event-based state-of-the-art methods in terms of both accuracy and robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于事件相机和关键点的动态物体6-DoF位姿跟踪方法，在模拟和真实环境中均优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统相机在动态物体位姿估计中面临运动模糊、传感器噪声和低光照等挑战，而事件相机的高动态范围和低延迟特性为解决这些问题提供了可能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用事件相机实现动态物体的精确6-DoF位姿跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建关键点检测网络从事件流生成的时间表面提取关键点，利用事件的极性和空间坐标以及关键点附近的事件密度实现连续跟踪，然后通过2D-3D关键点哈希映射和EPnP算法估计6-DoF位姿。
contributions: 提出了一种基于关键点的事件相机动态物体6-DoF位姿跟踪方法。
在模拟和真实事件环境中均取得了优于现有方法的精度和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实事件环境中进行实验，与基于事件的最先进方法比较，在精度和鲁棒性上均表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖关键点检测的准确性，在极端遮挡或快速运动下可能失效。
未提及对多物体或复杂场景的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法结合事件相机和关键点跟踪，在动态物体位姿估计上有应用价值，但创新性中等，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于事件相机和关键点的动态物体6-DoF位姿跟踪方法，在模拟和真实环境中均优于现有方法。

papers.title: A Taxonomy and Resolution Strategy for Client-Level Disagreements in Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) typically assumes unconditional collaboration, a premise that overlooks the complexities of real-world, multi-stakeholder environments in which clients may need to exclude one another for strategic, regulatory, or competitive reasons. This paper addresses this gap, which we term 'client-level disagreements,' by first introducing a taxonomy of such scenarios. We then propose a robust, multi-track resolution strategy that guarantees strict client exclusion by creating and managing isolated model update paths ('tracks'), thereby preventing the cross-contamination and unfairness issues present in naive strategies. Through an empirical evaluation of our custom simulation system across 34 scenarios using the MNIST and N-CMAPSS datasets, we validate that our approach correctly handles permanent, temporal, and overlapping disagreement patterns. Our scalability analysis reveals the server-side resolution algorithm's overhead is negligible (<1 ms per round) even under heavy load. The primary scalability constraint is the client-side training load from participating in multiple tracks, a cost that we show can be effectively mitigated by a submodel reuse strategy. This work presents a scalable and architecturally sound method for managing client-level disagreements, and enhances the practical applicability of FL in settings where policy compliance and strategic control are non-negotiable.

analysis.tldr: 提出联邦学习中客户端级分歧的分类法及多轨解决策略，实现严格客户端隔离并验证其可扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联邦学习假设无条件协作，忽略现实多利益相关方环境中客户端可能因战略、监管或竞争原因需要相互排除的复杂情况，导致不公平和交叉污染问题。
analysis.problem: 解决联邦学习中客户端级分歧（client-level disagreements）问题，即客户端之间因战略、监管或竞争原因需要相互排除，而现有方法无法有效处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出朴素策略存在交叉污染和不公平问题。
analysis.method: 提出一种鲁棒的多轨解决策略，通过创建和管理隔离的模型更新路径（tracks）实现严格客户端排除，并引入子模型重用策略缓解客户端侧训练负载。
contributions: 首次提出联邦学习中客户端级分歧的分类法，涵盖永久、临时和重叠分歧模式。
提出多轨解决策略，保证严格客户端隔离，避免交叉污染和不公平。
通过34个场景的仿真实验验证方法有效性，并分析可扩展性，服务器端开销可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 使用MNIST和N-CMAPSS数据集在34个场景下进行仿真实验，验证方法正确处理永久、临时和重叠分歧模式；可扩展性分析显示服务器端开销<1ms/轮，客户端负载可通过子模型重用缓解。
limitations: 实验仅基于两个数据集，可能缺乏泛化性。
客户端侧多轨训练负载虽可缓解，但在极端场景下仍可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，但实验规模有限，适合关注联邦学习实际部署的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联邦学习中客户端级分歧的分类法及多轨解决策略，实现严格客户端隔离并验证其可扩展性。

papers.title: V-GRPO: Online Reinforcement Learning for Denoising Generative Models Is Easier than You Think
papers.abstract: Aligning denoising generative models with human preferences or verifiable rewards remains a key challenge. While policy-gradient online reinforcement learning (RL) offers a principled post-training framework, its direct application is hindered by the intractable likelihoods of these models. Prior work therefore either optimizes an induced Markov decision process (MDP) over sampling trajectories, which is stable but inefficient, or uses likelihood surrogates based on the diffusion evidence lower bound (ELBO), which have so far underperformed on visual generation. Our key insight is that the ELBO-based approach can, in fact, be made both stable and efficient. By reducing surrogate variance and controlling gradient steps, we show that this approach can beat MDP-based methods. To this end, we introduce Variational GRPO (V-GRPO), a method that integrates ELBO-based surrogates with the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) algorithm, alongside a set of simple yet essential techniques. Our method is easy to implement, aligns with pretraining objectives, and avoids the limitations of MDP-based methods. V-GRPO achieves state-of-the-art performance in text-to-image synthesis, while delivering a $2\times$ speedup over MixGRPO and a $3\times$ speedup over DiffusionNFT.

analysis.tldr: V-GRPO通过ELBO代理与GRPO结合，实现高效稳定的扩散模型在线强化学习对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型与人类偏好或可验证奖励的对齐是重要挑战，现有策略梯度在线RL方法因模型似然难解而受限，MDP方法稳定但低效，ELBO代理方法在视觉生成上表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何使基于ELBO代理的在线RL方法在扩散模型对齐中既稳定又高效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ELBO代理方法在视觉生成上此前表现不佳，但通过降低代理方差和控制梯度步长可以超越MDP方法。
analysis.method: 提出V-GRPO，将ELBO代理与GRPO算法结合，并引入降低方差和控制梯度步长的简单技术。
contributions: 揭示了ELBO代理方法通过方差降低和梯度控制可以变得稳定高效。
提出V-GRPO方法，在文本到图像合成中达到SOTA，且速度优于MixGRPO和DiffusionNFT。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像合成任务上评估，V-GRPO达到SOTA，速度比MixGRPO快2倍，比DiffusionNFT快3倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于扩散模型，未验证其他生成模型。
实验仅在文本到图像任务上，未涉及其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果好，与扩散模型对齐方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: V-GRPO通过ELBO代理与GRPO结合，实现高效稳定的扩散模型在线强化学习对齐。

papers.title: Constraint-Based Analysis of Reasoning Shortcuts in Neurosymbolic Learning
papers.abstract: Neurosymbolic systems can satisfy logical constraints during learning without achieving the intended concept-label correspondence; this is a problem known as reasoning shortcuts. We formalize reasoning shortcuts as a constraint satisfaction problem and investigate under which conditions concept mappings are uniquely determined by the constraints. We prove that a discrimination property (requiring that no valid concept mapping can be transformed into another valid mapping by swapping two concept values) is necessary for shortcut-freeness under bijective mappings, but demonstrate via a counterexample that it is insufficient even when the constraint graph is connected. We develop an ASP-based algorithm that verifies whether a given constraint set uniquely determines the intended concept mapping, with proven soundness and completeness. When shortcuts are detected, a greedy repair algorithm eliminates them by augmenting the constraint set, converging in at most $k$ iterations, where $k$ is the number of alternative valid mappings. We further provide a complexity classification: deciding shortcut-freeness is coNP-complete, counting shortcuts is #P-complete, and finding minimal repairs is NP-hard. We also establish sample complexity bounds showing that logarithmically many label queries suffice for disambiguation in favorable cases, while querying all ambiguous positions suffices in the worst case. Experiments across eight benchmark domains validate our approach.

analysis.tldr: 将推理捷径形式化为约束满足问题，提出检测与修复的ASP算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经符号系统在学习中可能满足逻辑约束却未实现正确的概念-标签对应，即推理捷径问题，现有方法缺乏形式化分析与保证。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化推理捷径并检测约束集是否唯一确定概念映射，以及如何修复存在捷径的约束集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将推理捷径建模为约束满足问题，提出基于ASP的检测算法（完备且可靠）和贪心修复算法（最多k次迭代收敛），并给出复杂度分类。
contributions: 形式化推理捷径为约束满足问题，证明区分性属性是双射下无捷径的必要条件但不充分。
提出检测捷径的ASP算法和修复捷径的贪心算法，并证明其理论性质。
给出复杂度分类：判断无捷径为coNP完全，计数为#P完全，最小修复为NP难。
建立样本复杂度界，并在八个基准域上验证方法。
analysis.experiments: 在八个基准域上进行了实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于双射映射假设下的场景。
修复算法可能无法保证全局最优性。

analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，实验验证充分，但应用范围较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将推理捷径形式化为约束满足问题，提出检测与修复的ASP算法。

papers.title: Hierarchical Spatio-Channel Clustering for Efficient Model Compression in Medical Image Analysis
papers.abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have become increasingly difficult to deploy in resource-constrained environments due to their large memory and computational requirements. Although low-rank compression methods can reduce this burden, most existing approaches compress spatial and channel redundancy independently and therefore do not fully exploit the localised structure within convolutional feature maps. This paper proposes a hierarchical spatio-channel low-rank compression framework for CNNs that exploits redundancy across spatial regions and channel activations. Unlike conventional methods, which apply a uniform decomposition across an entire layer, the proposed approach first partitions feature maps into spatial regions, then groups channels according to their co-activation patterns within each region, and finally applies rank-adaptive SVD to each resulting spatio-channel cluster. The method is evaluated on an AlexNet-based brain tumour MRI classification model and compared with Global SVD and Tucker decomposition under \(3\times\) and \(6\times\) compression budgets. Our method outperforms both baselines, reducing FLOPs from \(8.21\,\mathrm{G}\) to \(1.55\,\mathrm{G}\) (\(81.1\%\) reduction), achieving a \(1.38\times\) inference speed-up, and increasing classification accuracy from \(87.76\%\) to \(89.80\%\). The method also improves the macro \(F_1\)-score and performance on challenging classes such as meningioma. A hyper-parameter trade-off analysis demonstrates that the framework provides Pareto-optimal configurations, enabling control over the balance between compression and predictive performance. Moderate clustering with adaptive rank selection yields strong results. Bootstrap standard errors are reported for all classification metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化时空通道聚类低秩压缩框架，在脑肿瘤MRI分类中实现81.1% FLOPs减少和精度提升。
analysis.research_motivation: CNN在资源受限环境中部署困难，现有低秩压缩方法独立处理空间和通道冗余，未能充分利用卷积特征图的局部结构。
analysis.problem: 如何更有效地利用特征图的空间和通道冗余进行模型压缩，同时保持或提升分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 层次化时空通道低秩压缩框架：先划分特征图为空间区域，再按共激活模式对通道分组，最后对每个时空通道簇应用秩自适应SVD。
contributions: 提出层次化时空通道聚类压缩方法，联合利用空间和通道冗余。
在脑肿瘤MRI分类任务上实现81.1% FLOPs减少和1.38倍推理加速，同时提升准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在AlexNet脑肿瘤MRI分类模型上，与全局SVD和Tucker分解在3倍和6倍压缩预算下比较，报告了FLOPs、推理速度、准确率、宏F1分数和Bootstrap标准误差。
limitations: 仅在一个模型和数据集上验证，泛化性未知。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
