analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化时空通道聚类低秩压缩框架，在脑肿瘤MRI分类中实现81.1% FLOPs减少和精度提升。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Temporal U-Net for High-Fidelity Fluid Interpolation
papers.abstract: Reconstructing high-fidelity fluid dynamics from sparse temporal observations is quite challenging, mainly due to the chaotic and non-linear nature of fluid transport. Standard deep learning-based interpolation methods often tend to regress to the mean, which results in spatial blurring and temporal strobing, especially noticeable around the observed anchor frames where transitions become discontinuous. In this work, we propose a novel Temporal U-Net architecture that integrates a VGG-based perceptual loss along with a Physics-Informed Bridge to overcome these issues. By introducing time-weighted feature blending and enforcing a parabolic boundary condition defined by t(1 - t), the model ensures smooth transitions while also maintaining perfect consistency at the endpoints. Experimental results on multi-channel RGB fluid data show that our method clearly outperforms standard models, both in terms of structural fidelity and texture preservation. In particular, the model achieves a Mean Absolute Error of 0.015, compared to 0.085 for a standard L1 baseline. Further Spatial Power Spectral Density (PSD) analysis reveals that the model is able to retain high-frequency turbulent details that are usually lost in deterministic reconstructions.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息时间U-Net，结合感知损失和物理信息桥，实现高保真流体插值。
analysis.research_motivation: 从稀疏时间观测重建高保真流体动力学极具挑战，标准深度学习插值方法常出现空间模糊和时间闪烁，尤其在锚定帧附近过渡不连续。
analysis.problem: 解决流体插值中的空间模糊和时间闪烁问题，实现平滑过渡且保持端点一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准插值方法倾向于回归均值，导致空间模糊和时间闪烁，在锚定帧附近过渡不连续。
analysis.method: 提出时间U-Net架构，集成VGG感知损失和物理信息桥，通过时间加权特征融合和抛物线边界条件t(1-t)确保平滑过渡和端点一致性。
contributions: 提出时间U-Net架构，结合感知损失和物理信息桥用于流体插值。
引入时间加权特征融合和抛物线边界条件，实现平滑过渡和端点一致性。
在多通道RGB流体数据上取得优于标准模型的结构保真度和纹理保持效果。
analysis.experiments: 在多通道RGB流体数据上，模型MAE为0.015，标准L1基线为0.085；空间功率谱密度分析表明模型保留了高频湍流细节。
limitations: 可能仅适用于流体数据，泛化性未知。
物理信息桥的边界条件可能不适用于其他物理过程。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有创新，实验效果好，但应用领域较窄，推荐阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息时间U-Net，结合感知损失和物理信息桥，实现高保真流体插值。

papers.title: Nonlinear Non-Gaussian Density Steering with Input and Noise Channel Mismatch: Sinkhorn with Memory for Solving the Control-affine Schrödinger Bridge Problem
papers.abstract: Solutions to the Schrödinger bridge problem and its generalizations yield feedback control policies for optimal density steering over a controlled diffusion. To numerically compute the same, the dynamic Sinkhorn recursion has become a standard approach. The mathematical engine behind this approach is the Hopf-Cole transform that recasts the conditions for optimality into a system of boundary-coupled linear PDEs. Recent works pointed out that for the control-affine Schrödinger bridge problem, this exact linearity via Hopf-Cole transform, and thus the standard Sinkhorn recursion, apply only if the control and noise channels are proportional. When the channels do not match, the Hopf-Cole-transformed PDEs remain nonlinear, and no algorithm is available to solve the same. We advance the state-of-the-art by designing a Sinkhorn recursion with memory that leverages the structure of these nonlinear PDEs, and demonstrate how it solves the control-affine Schrödinger bridge problem with input and noise channel mismatch. We prove the local stability of the proposed algorithm.

analysis.tldr: 提出带记忆的Sinkhorn递归算法，解决控制仿射薛定谔桥问题中输入与噪声通道不匹配的非线性情况。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准动态Sinkhorn递归依赖Hopf-Cole变换将最优条件转化为线性PDE，但该变换仅在控制与噪声通道成比例时有效；当通道不匹配时，变换后的PDE保持非线性，缺乏有效求解算法。
analysis.problem: 解决控制仿射薛定谔桥问题中，当输入通道与噪声通道不匹配时，无法通过标准Sinkhorn递归求解密度控制策略的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，通道不匹配导致Hopf-Cole变换后的PDE保持非线性，标准Sinkhorn递归失效。
analysis.method: 设计一种带记忆的Sinkhorn递归算法，利用非线性PDE的结构进行迭代求解。
contributions: 首次提出求解控制仿射薛定谔桥问题中输入与噪声通道不匹配情况的算法
证明了所提算法的局部稳定性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅证明了局部稳定性，全局收敛性未知
算法复杂度可能较高，实际应用需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有理论创新，但属于控制理论领域，与主流机器学习方向关联较弱，实验信息缺失。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出带记忆的Sinkhorn递归算法，解决控制仿射薛定谔桥问题中输入与噪声通道不匹配的非线性情况。

papers.title: GSAR: Typed Grounding for Hallucination Detection and Recovery in Multi-Agent LLMs
papers.abstract: Autonomous multi-agent LLM systems are increasingly deployed to investigate operational incidents and produce structured diagnostic reports. Their trustworthiness hinges on whether each claim is grounded in observed evidence rather than model-internal inference. Existing groundedness evaluators (binary classifiers, LLM-as-judge scalars, self-correction loops) treat supporting evidence as interchangeable and emit a single signal that offers no principled control over downstream action. We present GSAR, a grounding-evaluation and replanning framework that (i) partitions claims into a four-way typology (grounded, ungrounded, contradicted, complementary), giving first-class standing to non-redundant alternative perspectives; (ii) assigns evidence-type-specific weights reflecting epistemic strength; (iii) computes an asymmetric contradiction-penalised weighted groundedness score; and (iv) couples that score to a three-tier decision function (proceed, regenerate, replan) driving a bounded-iteration outer loop under an explicit compute budget. We formalise the algorithm, prove six structural properties, and evaluate five design claims on FEVER with gold Wikipedia evidence under four independently-trained LLM judges (gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-7, gemini-2.5-pro). Every ablation reproduces in the same direction on every judge: bootstrap 95% CIs on the rho=0 effect exclude 0 on all four; the no-complementary ablation under Opus 4.7 has CI [-96,-68] of 200; at n=1000 three independent judges converge to DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058. A head-to-head against Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open is included. To our knowledge, GSAR is the first published groundedness framework coupling evidence-typed scoring with tiered recovery under an explicit compute budget.

analysis.tldr: GSAR 提出一种带类型标注的 grounding 评估与重规划框架，通过四类证据划分、加权评分和三级决策循环，提升多智能体 LLM 系统的可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体 LLM 系统在生成结构化诊断报告时，其可信度依赖于每个声明是否基于观察证据而非模型内部推理。现有 grounding 评估方法（如二分类器、LLM-as-judge 标量、自纠正循环）将支持证据视为可互换的，输出单一信号，无法对下游行动提供原则性控制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个 grounding 评估框架，能够区分不同类型的证据（如 grounded、ungrounded、contradicted、complementary），并基于证据类型进行加权评分，进而驱动有原则的恢复行动（如重新生成或重新规划），同时受显式计算预算约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析，但指出现有方法将证据视为可互换的，缺乏对互补性非冗余视角的显式处理。
analysis.method: GSAR 框架包含四个步骤：(i) 将声明划分为四类（grounded、ungrounded、contradicted、complementary）；(ii) 为每种证据类型分配反映认知强度的权重；(iii) 计算非对称的、惩罚矛盾的加权 groundedness 分数；(iv) 将该分数与三级决策函数（proceed、regenerate、replan）耦合，驱动有界迭代外层循环，受显式计算预算约束。
contributions: 首次提出证据类型化的 grounding 评估框架，赋予互补性非冗余视角一等公民地位。
形式化算法并证明六项结构性质。
在 FEVER 数据集上使用四个独立训练的 LLM 法官进行消融实验，验证了五个设计主张，并包含与 Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open 的对比。
analysis.experiments: 在 FEVER 数据集上，使用四个独立训练的 LLM 法官（gpt-5.4、claude-sonnet-4-6、claude-opus-4-7、gemini-2.5-pro）进行消融实验。每个消融实验在所有法官上方向一致：bootstrap 95% CI 在 rho=0 效应上均排除 0；在 Opus 4.7 上无互补消融的 CI 为 [-96,-68]（n=200）；n=1000 时三个独立法官收敛到 DeltaS(rho=0)=+0.058。包含与 Vectara HHEM-2.1-Open 的对比。
limitations: 实验仅在 FEVER 数据集上进行，可能缺乏对其他领域（如医疗、法律）的泛化性验证。
框架依赖 LLM 法官进行声明分类，法官的偏见可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，形式化程度高，实验验证充分，但应用场景较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GSAR 提出一种带类型标注的 grounding 评估与重规划框架，通过四类证据划分、加权评分和三级决策循环，提升多智能体 LLM 系统的可信度。

papers.title: An Empirical Evaluation of Locally Deployed LLMs for Bug Detection in Python Code
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on a wide range of software engineering tasks, including code generation and analysis. However, most prior work relies on cloud-based models or specialized hardware, limiting practical applicability in privacy-sensitive or resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we present a systematic empirical evaluation of two locally deployed LLMs, LLaMA 3.2 and Mistral, for real-world Python bug detection using the BugsInPy benchmark. We evaluate 349 bugs across 17 projects using a zero-shot prompting approach at the function level and an automated keyword-based evaluation framework. Our results show that locally executed models achieve accuracy between 43% and 45%, while producing a large proportion of partially correct responses that identify problematic code regions without pinpointing the exact fix. Performance varies significantly across projects, highlighting the importance of codebase characteristics. The results demonstrate that local models can identify a meaningful share of bugs, though precise localization remains difficult for locally executed LLMs, particularly when handling complex and context dependent bugs in realistic development scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 本地部署的LLM在Python代码bug检测中准确率约43%-45%，能识别部分问题区域但精确定位困难。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代码分析依赖云端或专用硬件，在隐私敏感或资源受限场景下难以部署，需要评估本地模型的实用能力。
analysis.problem: 评估本地部署的LLM在真实Python代码bug检测中的准确性和局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 本地模型准确率43%-45%，大量部分正确响应能识别问题区域但无法精确定位修复；性能因项目而异，复杂上下文依赖的bug更难处理。
analysis.method: 使用BugsInPy基准，对349个bug采用零样本函数级提示，结合自动化关键词评估框架，测试LLaMA 3.2和Mistral两个本地模型。
contributions: 首次系统评估本地部署LLM在真实Python bug检测中的性能
揭示本地模型在精确定位方面的局限性及代码库特征的影响
analysis.experiments: 在BugsInPy基准上评估349个bug，涵盖17个项目，使用零样本提示和自动化关键词评估。
limitations: 仅评估两个模型，泛化性有限
零样本设置可能未充分利用模型能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 实证评估有实际意义，但方法较简单，贡献增量，适合了解本地模型在bug检测上的现状。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本地部署的LLM在Python代码bug检测中准确率约43%-45%，能识别部分问题区域但精确定位困难。

papers.title: LEGO: An LLM Skill-Based Front-End Design Generation Platform
papers.abstract: Existing LLM-based EDA agents are often isolated task-specific systems. This leads to repeated engineering effort and limited reuse of successful design and debugging strategies. We present LEGO, a unified skill-based platform for front-end design generation. It decomposes the digital front-end flow into six independent steps and represents every agent capability as a standardized composable circuit skill within a plug-and-play architecture. To build this skill library, we survey more than 100 papers, select 11 representative open-source projects, and extract 42 executable circuit skills within a six-step finite state machine formulation. Circuit Skill Builder automates skill extraction with linear scalability. Agent Skill RAG achieves submillisecond retrieval without relying on embedding models. Empirical evaluation on a hard subset of 41 VerilogEval v2 problems that gpt-5.2-codex fails to solve under extra-high reasoning effort shows that individual circuit skills constructed within LEGO raise Pass@1 from 0.000 to 0.805. This is an 80.5% gain over the baseline. Cross-project skill compositions also reach 0.805 Pass@1. They outperform hierarchy-verilog by 14.6% and VerilogCoder by 2.5%. They also match MAGE. These results show that modular skill composition supports both effective and flexible RTL design automation. The LEGO platform and all circuit skills are publicly available at GitHub: https://github.com/loujc/LEGO-An-LLM-Skill-Based-Front-End-Design-Generation-Platform

analysis.tldr: LEGO 将前端设计流程分解为标准化技能，通过可组合电路技能库实现 RTL 自动生成，在 VerilogEval v2 困难子集上 Pass@1 从 0 提升至 0.805。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 LLM 的 EDA 代理通常是孤立的、任务特定的系统，导致重复工程且难以复用成功的设计与调试策略。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的、可复用的前端设计生成平台，将 LLM 能力模块化为标准化技能并支持灵活组合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将数字前端流程分解为六个独立步骤，每个代理能力表示为标准化可组合电路技能，构建技能库（含 42 个技能），并设计 Circuit Skill Builder 和 Agent Skill RAG 实现自动化提取与高效检索。
contributions: 提出 LEGO 平台，将前端设计流程分解为六个步骤并构建可组合电路技能库。
实现 Circuit Skill Builder 自动化技能提取和 Agent Skill RAG 亚毫秒级检索。
在 VerilogEval v2 困难子集上 Pass@1 从 0 提升至 0.805，超越多个基线。
analysis.experiments: 在 VerilogEval v2 的 41 个困难问题上评估，gpt-5.2-codex 在极高推理努力下无法解决，LEGO 的单个电路技能 Pass@1 达 0.805，跨项目技能组合同样达 0.805，优于 hierarchy-verilog（14.6%）和 VerilogCoder（2.5%），与 MAGE 持平。
limitations: 技能库仅覆盖 11 个代表性开源项目，可能未涵盖所有设计场景。
评估仅针对 VerilogEval v2 困难子集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，且开源，与 LLM Agent 方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LEGO 将前端设计流程分解为标准化技能，通过可组合电路技能库实现 RTL 自动生成，在 VerilogEval v2 困难子集上 Pass@1 从 0 提升至 0.805。

papers.title: Explainable AI in Speaker Recognition -- Making Latent Representations Understandable
papers.abstract: Neural networks can be trained to learn task-relevant representations from data. Understanding how these networks make decisions falls within the Explainable AI (XAI) domain. This paper proposes to study an XAI topic: uncovering unknown organisational patterns in network representations, particularly those representations learned by the speaker recognition network that recognises the speaker identity of utterances. Past studies employed algorithms (e.g. t-distributed Stochastic Neighbour Embedding and K-means) to analyse and visualise how network representations form independent clusters, indicating the presence of flat clustering phenomena within the space defined by these representations. In contrast, this work applies two algorithms -- Single-Linkage Clustering (SLINK) and Hierarchical Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (HDBSCAN) -- to analyse how representations form clusters with hierarchical relationships rather than being independent, thereby demonstrating the existence of hierarchical clustering phenomena within the network representation space. To semantically understand the above hierarchical clustering phenomena, a new algorithm, termed Hierarchical Cluster-Class Matching (HCCM), is designed to perform one-to-one matching between predefined semantic classes and hierarchical representation clusters (i.e. those produced by SLINK or HDBSCAN). Some hierarchical clusters are successfully matched to individual semantic classes (e.g. male, UK), while others to conjunctions of semantic classes (e.g. male and UK, female and Ireland). A new metric, Liebig's score, is proposed to quantify the performance of each matching behaviour, allowing us to diagnose the factor that most strongly limits matching performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过层次聚类和匹配算法揭示说话人识别网络表示中的层次组织模式，提升可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经网络学习到的表示通常难以理解，现有可解释性研究多关注决策过程，而忽略了表示内部的组织结构。
analysis.problem: 如何发现并理解说话人识别网络表示中的层次聚类现象，并将其与语义类别对应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出网络表示中存在层次聚类现象（而非独立的扁平聚类），且部分层次簇可匹配到单个语义类或语义类组合。
analysis.method: 使用SLINK和HDBSCAN进行层次聚类，提出HCCM算法实现层次簇与语义类的一一匹配，并设计Liebig's score量化匹配性能。
contributions: 首次在说话人识别网络表示中发现层次聚类现象。
提出HCCM算法和Liebig's score指标用于层次簇与语义类的匹配及评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对说话人识别任务，泛化性未知。
匹配性能可能受限于语义类定义和聚类参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法有一定新意，但应用场景较窄且缺乏实验细节，适合保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过层次聚类和匹配算法揭示说话人识别网络表示中的层次组织模式，提升可解释性。

papers.title: When Chain-of-Thought Fails, the Solution Hides in the Hidden States
papers.abstract: Whether intermediate reasoning is computationally useful or merely explanatory depends on whether chain-of-thought (CoT) tokens contain task-relevant information. We present a mechanistic causal analysis of CoT on GSM8K using activation patching: transferring token-level hidden states from a CoT generation to a direct-answer run for the same question, then measuring the effect on final-answer accuracy. Across models, generating after patching yields substantially higher accuracy than both direct-answer prompting and the original CoT trace, revealing that individual CoT tokens can encode sufficient information to recover the correct answer, even when the original trace is incorrect. This task-relevant information is more prevalent in correct than incorrect CoT runs and is unevenly distributed across tokens, concentrating in mid-to-late layers and appearing earlier in the reasoning trace. Moreover, patching language tokens such as verbs and entities carry task-solving information that steers generation toward correct reasoning, whereas mathematical tokens encode answer-proximal content that rarely succeeds. Patched outputs are often shorter and yet exceed the accuracy of a full CoT trace, suggesting complete reasoning chains are not always necessary. Together, these findings demonstrate that CoT encodes recoverable, token-level problem-solving information, offering new insight into how reasoning is represented and where it breaks down.

analysis.tldr: 通过激活修补分析发现，链式思维(CoT)的隐藏状态编码了可恢复的解题信息，即使CoT轨迹错误也能从中提取正确答案。
analysis.research_motivation: 链式思维(CoT)是否真正包含任务相关信息，还是仅作为解释性工具，这一问题尚未明确。理解CoT的内部表征机制有助于改进推理模型。
analysis.problem: 探究CoT中间token的隐藏状态是否编码了可恢复的解题信息，以及这些信息的分布和利用方式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 修补隐藏状态后生成准确率高于直接回答和原始CoT轨迹；2) 正确CoT中任务相关信息更丰富；3) 信息集中在中间到后期层，且出现在推理早期；4) 语言token（动词、实体）携带解题信息，数学token编码接近答案的内容但成功率低；5) 修补后的输出更短但准确率更高，表明完整推理链并非必需。
analysis.method: 使用激活修补（activation patching）进行因果分析：将CoT生成过程中的token级隐藏状态转移到同一问题的直接回答运行中，测量对最终答案准确率的影响。
contributions: 首次通过激活修补提供CoT token级因果证据，证明隐藏状态编码了可恢复的解题信息。
揭示了任务相关信息在CoT中的分布规律（层、位置、token类型）及其与正确性的关联。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K数据集上对多个模型进行激活修补实验，比较修补后准确率与直接回答、原始CoT轨迹的差异。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务GSM8K，泛化性未知。
激活修补方法可能引入人为干预，实际推理过程可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，因果分析深入，对理解CoT机制有重要贡献，但实验仅限单一数据集。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过激活修补分析发现，链式思维(CoT)的隐藏状态编码了可恢复的解题信息，即使CoT轨迹错误也能从中提取正确答案。

papers.title: EmoTrans: A Benchmark for Understanding, Reasoning, and Predicting Emotion Transitions in Multimodal LLMs
papers.abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong capabilities in perception, reasoning, and generation, and are increasingly used in applications such as social robots and human-computer interaction, where understanding human emotions is essential. However, existing benchmarks mainly formulate emotion understanding as a static recognition problem, leaving it largely unclear whether current MLLMs can understand emotion as a dynamic process that evolves, shifts between states, and unfolds across diverse social contexts. To bridge this gap, we present EmoTrans, a benchmark for evaluating emotion dynamics understanding in multimodal videos. EmoTrans contains 1,000 carefully collected and manually annotated video clips, covering 12 real-world scenarios, and further provides over 3,000 task-specific question-answer (QA) pairs for fine-grained evaluation. The benchmark introduces four tasks, namely Emotion Change Detection (ECD), Emotion State Identification (ESI), Emotion Transition Reasoning (ETR), and Next Emotion Prediction (NEP), forming a progressive evaluation framework from coarse-grained detection to deeper reasoning and prediction. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 18 state-of-the-art MLLMs on EmoTrans and obtain two main findings. First, although current MLLMs show relatively stronger performance on coarse-grained emotion change detection, they still struggle with fine-grained emotion dynamics modeling. Second, socially complex settings, especially multi-person scenarios, remain substantially challenging, while reasoning-oriented variants do not consistently yield clear improvements. To facilitate future research, we publicly release the benchmark, evaluation protocol, and code at https://github.com/Emo-gml/EmoTrans.

analysis.tldr: EmoTrans 是一个评估多模态大模型理解视频中情绪动态变化的新基准，包含四个递进任务，发现现有模型在细粒度情绪建模和多人社交场景上表现不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情绪理解基准主要将情绪视为静态识别问题，忽略了情绪在真实社交场景中动态演变、状态转换的过程，而多模态大模型在社交机器人等人机交互应用中需要理解这种动态情绪。
analysis.problem: 当前缺乏评估多模态大模型对视频中情绪动态变化（包括检测、识别、推理和预测）能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出两个主要发现：1) 现有 MLLM 在粗粒度情绪变化检测上表现较好，但在细粒度情绪动态建模上仍有困难；2) 社交复杂场景（尤其是多人场景）具有显著挑战性，且推理导向的变体并未带来一致改进。
analysis.method: 构建包含 1000 个视频片段、覆盖 12 个真实场景、3000+ QA 对的基准 EmoTrans，设计四个递进任务：情绪变化检测、情绪状态识别、情绪转换推理、下一情绪预测。
contributions: 提出了 EmoTrans，首个专注于多模态视频中情绪动态理解的基准，包含四个递进任务。
对 18 个 SOTA MLLM 进行了系统评估，揭示了当前模型在细粒度情绪建模和多人社交场景上的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在 18 个 SOTA MLLM 上进行了全面评估，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模相对较小（1000 视频片段），可能不足以覆盖所有情绪动态场景。
仅评估了 MLLM，未涉及其他类型的模型或方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准填补了情绪动态理解评估的空白，任务设计递进合理，对 MLLM 研究有参考价值，但实验细节未在摘要中充分展示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EmoTrans 是一个评估多模态大模型理解视频中情绪动态变化的新基准，包含四个递进任务，发现现有模型在细粒度情绪建模和多人社交场景上表现不足。

papers.title: Exploring Hierarchical Consistency and Unbiased Objectness for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.abstract: Conventional object detectors typically operate under a closed-set assumption, limiting recognition to a predefined set of base classes seen during training. Open-vocabulary object detection (OVD) addresses this limitation by leveraging vision-language models (VLMs) to generate pseudo labels for novel object classes. However, existing OVD methods suffer from two critical drawbacks: (1) inaccurate class label assignments, as VLMs are optimized for image-level predictions rather than the region-level predictions required for pseudo labeling, and (2) unreliable objectness scores from region proposal networks (RPNs) trained exclusively on base object classes. To address these issues, we propose a novel pseudo labeling framework for OVD. Our approach introduces a hierarchical confidence calibration (HCC) technique, which ensures reliable class label estimation by assessing consistency across hierarchical semantic levels (class, super- and sub-category). We also present LoCLIP, a parameter-efficient adaptation of CLIP that incorporates an objectness token to mitigate base class bias problem of RPNs and provide reliable objectness estimations for novel object classes. Extensive experiments on standard OVD benchmarks, including COCO and LVIS, demonstrate that our approach clearly sets a new state of the art, validating the effectiveness of our approach. Project site: https://cvlab.yonsei.ac.kr/projects/HCC

analysis.tldr: 提出层次一致性校准和LoCLIP解决开放词汇目标检测中伪标签不准确和物体性分数不可靠的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统目标检测器局限于封闭集假设，无法识别训练中未见的新类别；现有开放词汇检测方法利用视觉语言模型生成伪标签，但存在类别标签分配不准确和区域提议网络物体性分数不可靠的问题。
analysis.problem: 开放词汇目标检测中伪标签的类别标签估计不准确和物体性分数存在基类偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出两个关键现象：视觉语言模型优化于图像级预测而非区域级预测导致伪标签类别不准确；区域提议网络仅基于基类训练导致对新颖类别的物体性分数不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出层次一致性校准（HCC）技术，通过评估类、超类和子类层次语义一致性来校准类别标签；提出LoCLIP，一种参数高效的CLIP适配方法，引入物体性token以缓解基类偏差并提供可靠的物体性估计。
contributions: 提出层次一致性校准（HCC）技术，利用层次语义一致性改善伪标签的类别估计。
提出LoCLIP，通过物体性token实现参数高效的CLIP适配，提供可靠的物体性分数。
在COCO和LVIS基准上取得新最优结果。
analysis.experiments: 在COCO和LVIS标准开放词汇检测基准上进行实验，达到新最优性能。
limitations: 层次一致性校准可能依赖预定义类别层次结构，对无层次标签的类别适用性有限。
LoCLIP的参数效率可能受限于特定视觉语言模型架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且达到SOTA，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次一致性校准和LoCLIP解决开放词汇目标检测中伪标签不准确和物体性分数不可靠的问题。

papers.title: Evaluating Jailbreaking Vulnerabilities in LLMs Deployed as Assistants for Smart Grid Operations: A Benchmark Against NERC Standards
papers.abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) as assistants in electric grid operations promises to streamline compliance and decision-making but exposes new vulnerabilities to prompt-based adversarial attacks. This paper evaluates the risk of jailbreaking LLMs, i.e., circumventing safety alignments to produce outputs violating regulatory standards, assuming threats from authorized users, such as operators, who craft malicious prompts to elicit non-compliant guidance. Three state-of-the-art LLMs (OpenAI's GPT-4o mini, Google's Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite, and Anthropic's Claude 3.5 Haiku) were tested against Baseline, BitBypass, and DeepInception jailbreaking methods across scenarios derived from nine NERC Reliability Standards (EOP, TOP, and CIP). In the initial broad experiment, the overall Attack Success Rate (ASR) was 33.1%, with DeepInception proving most effective at 63.17% ASR. Claude 3.5 Haiku exhibited complete resistance (0% ASR), while Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite was most vulnerable (55.04% ASR) and GPT-4o mini moderately susceptible (44.34% ASR). A follow-up experiment refining malicious wording in Baseline and BitBypass attacks yielded a 30.6% ASR, confirming that subtle prompt adjustments can enhance simpler methods' efficacy.

analysis.tldr: 评估LLM在智能电网操作中的越狱漏洞，发现DeepInception攻击最有效，Claude 3.5 Haiku完全抵抗。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在电网操作中的部署带来了合规和决策优势，但也引入了对抗性提示攻击的新风险，特别是来自授权用户的越狱攻击，可能违反监管标准。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM作为智能电网操作助手时，面对越狱攻击（绕过安全对齐产生违规输出）的脆弱性，并建立符合NERC标准的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DeepInception攻击方法最有效（ASR 63.17%），Claude 3.5 Haiku完全抵抗（0% ASR），Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite最脆弱（55.04% ASR），提示措辞调整可增强简单方法的有效性。
analysis.method: 使用三种越狱方法（Baseline、BitBypass、DeepInception）测试三个LLM（GPT-4o mini、Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite、Claude 3.5 Haiku），基于九个NERC可靠性标准设计场景，进行初始和后续实验。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM在智能电网操作中的越狱漏洞，并建立符合NERC标准的基准。
揭示不同LLM和越狱方法的攻击成功率差异，特别是DeepInception的高效性和Claude 3.5 Haiku的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了三个LLM和三种越狱方法，可能不全面。
实验场景基于NERC标准，但未涵盖所有可能的攻击变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对关键基础设施的LLM安全评估，方法系统，结果有实际意义，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估LLM在智能电网操作中的越狱漏洞，发现DeepInception攻击最有效，Claude 3.5 Haiku完全抵抗。

papers.title: OceanPile: A Large-Scale Multimodal Ocean Corpus for Foundation Models
papers.abstract: The vast and underexplored ocean plays a critical role in regulating global climate and supporting marine biodiversity, yet artificial intelligence has so far delivered limited impact in this domain due to a fundamental data bottleneck. Specifically, ocean data are highly fragmented across disparate sources and inherently exhibit multi-modal, high-noise, and weakly labeled characteristics, lacking unified schemas and semantic alignment. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general domains, their application to ocean science remains severely constrained by the absence of large-scale, well-aligned multimodal datasets tailored to marine environments. To bridge this gap, we introduce OceanPile, a large-scale multimodal corpus designed for ocean foundation models. It comprises three key components: OceanCorpus, a unified collection integrating sonar data, underwater imagery, marine science visuals, and scientific text from diverse authoritative sources; OceanInstruction, a high-quality instruction dataset synthesized via a novel pipeline guided by a hierarchical Ocean Concept Knowledge Graph; and OceanBenchmark, a manually curated evaluation benchmark for rigorous assessment. We establish a multi-stage quality control process to ensure scientific validity and alignment across modalities. Experimental validation demonstrates significant performance improvements for models trained on our data. All datasets are publicly released to advance the field of marine artificial intelligence and empower domain-specific MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 构建大规模多模态海洋语料库OceanPile，填补海洋科学领域基础模型的数据空白。
analysis.research_motivation: 海洋数据高度碎片化、多模态、高噪声且弱标注，缺乏统一模式和语义对齐，严重制约了AI在海洋科学中的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、高质量、语义对齐的多模态海洋数据集，导致多模态大语言模型难以有效应用于海洋科学。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OceanPile，包含三个组件：OceanCorpus（统一多模态数据集合）、OceanInstruction（基于海洋概念知识图谱的高质量指令数据集）、OceanBenchmark（人工标注评测基准），并建立多阶段质量控制流程。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模多模态海洋语料库OceanPile，包含声纳、水下图像、海洋科学视觉和科学文本等多种模态。
提出基于层次化海洋概念知识图谱的指令数据合成流水线，生成高质量指令数据集OceanInstruction。
发布人工标注的评测基准OceanBenchmark，并公开所有数据集以推动海洋AI发展。
analysis.experiments: 实验验证表明，使用该数据集训练的模型性能显著提升。
limitations: 数据集可能仍存在领域覆盖不全面的问题。
指令数据合成流水线依赖知识图谱，构建成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集创新性强，填补领域空白，但技术细节和实验信息有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建大规模多模态海洋语料库OceanPile，填补海洋科学领域基础模型的数据空白。

papers.title: H-SemiS: Hierarchical Fusion of Semi and Self-Supervised Learning for Knee Osteoarthritis Severity Grading
papers.abstract: Knee osteoarthritis (KOA) is a degenerative joint disease that can lead to chronic pain, reduced mobility, and long-term disability. Automated severity grading from knee radiographs can support early assessment, but current methods heavily depend on large labeled datasets and remain sensitive to class imbalance, noisy samples, and variability in clinical annotations. To alleviate these limitations, we propose a Hierarchical fusion of Semi-Supervised framework with Self-Supervision (H-SemiS) for KOA severity grading in knee X-ray samples using limited annotated data. Rather than treating severity grading as a flat multi-class problem, H-SemiS decomposes the task into a sequence of binary sub-tasks within a semi-supervised teacher-student architecture, directly mitigating the impact of class imbalance. To further enhance feature learning from unlabeled data, the framework integrates an adversarial self-supervised reconstruction module that encourages the network to capture robust anatomical structures. In parallel, a teacher-student design with quantum-inspired feature mixing improves discrimination boundaries between adjacent grades when pseudo-labels are noisy. We comprehensively evaluate H-SemiS on two challenging multi-class datasets and assess its generalizability on two binary-class datasets. Our experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed H-SemiS framework across multiple evaluation metrics, consistently outperforming several competing baselines and state-of-the-art methods. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/chandravardhan-singh-raghaw/H-SemiS.

analysis.tldr: 提出H-SemiS框架，通过层次化半监督与自监督融合，在有限标注数据下提升膝骨关节炎严重程度分级性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 膝骨关节炎严重程度自动分级依赖大量标注数据，且面临类别不平衡、噪声样本和标注变异等挑战，现有方法在这些限制下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限标注数据下，缓解类别不平衡和伪标签噪声，实现鲁棒的膝骨关节炎严重程度分级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出H-SemiS框架，将多类分级分解为一系列二值子任务（层次化半监督），结合教师-学生架构；集成对抗自监督重建模块增强特征学习；使用量子启发特征混合改善相邻等级间的判别边界。
contributions: 提出层次化半监督与自监督融合框架H-SemiS，用于有限标注数据下的KOA严重程度分级。
通过任务分解缓解类别不平衡，通过对抗自监督重建和量子启发特征混合提升特征质量和判别能力。
在两个多类数据集和两个二类数据集上验证了方法的优越性，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在两个多类数据集和两个二类数据集上评估，与多个基线和SOTA方法比较，H-SemiS在多个指标上表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集特性，泛化性需进一步验证。
量子启发特征混合的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但属于医学图像应用，与核心方向中等相关，实验充分但未提供具体数值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出H-SemiS框架，通过层次化半监督与自监督融合，在有限标注数据下提升膝骨关节炎严重程度分级性能。

papers.title: EAD-Net: Emotion-Aware Talking Head Generation with Spatial Refinement and Temporal Coherence
papers.abstract: Emotionally talking head video generation aims to generate expressive portrait videos with accurate lip synchronization and emotional facial expressions. Current methods rely on simple emotional labels, leading to insufficient semantic information. While introducing high-level semantics enhances expressiveness, it easily causes lip-sync degradation. Furthermore, mainstream generation methods struggle to balance computational efficiency and global motion awareness in long videos and suffer from poor temporal coherence. Therefore, we propose an \textbf{E}motion-\textbf{A}ware \textbf{D}iffusion model-based \textbf{Net}work, called \textbf{EAD-Net}. We introduce SyncNet supervision and Temporal Representation Alignment (TREPA) to mitigate lip-sync degradation caused by multi-modal fusion. To model complex spatio-temporal dependencies in long video sequences, we propose a Spatio-Temporal Directional Attention (STDA) mechanism that captures global motion patterns through strip attention. Additionally, we design a Temporal Frame graph Reasoning Module (TFRM) to explicitly model temporal coherence between video frames through graph structure learning. To enhance emotional semantic control, a large language model is employed to extract textual descriptions from real videos, serving as high-level semantic guidance. Experiments on the HDTF and MEAD datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms existing methods in terms of lip-sync accuracy, temporal consistency, and emotional accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出EAD-Net，通过扩散模型、SyncNet监督、时空方向注意力和时序图推理，实现高唇同步、强时间一致性和情感准确的表情说话头视频生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感说话头生成方法依赖简单情感标签导致语义不足，引入高层语义又易造成唇同步退化；主流方法在长视频中难以平衡计算效率与全局运动感知，且时间连贯性差。
analysis.problem: 如何生成唇同步准确、情感表达丰富且时间连贯的长视频说话头。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高层语义增强表达力但导致唇同步退化；长视频生成中计算效率与全局运动感知难以平衡，时间连贯性差。
analysis.method: 基于扩散模型，引入SyncNet监督和时序表征对齐（TREPA）缓解多模态融合导致的唇同步退化；提出时空方向注意力（STDA）通过条带注意力捕获全局运动模式；设计时序帧图推理模块（TFRM）通过图结构学习显式建模帧间时间连贯性；使用大语言模型从真实视频提取文本描述作为高层语义指导。
contributions: 提出EAD-Net，结合扩散模型、SyncNet监督和TREPA，在保持情感表达的同时提升唇同步精度。
提出STDA机制和TFRM模块，分别捕获全局运动模式和显式建模帧间时间连贯性，提升长视频生成质量。
在HDTF和MEAD数据集上，唇同步、时间一致性和情感准确性均优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在HDTF和MEAD数据集上评估，与现有方法比较唇同步精度、时间一致性和情感准确性，结果优于对比方法。
limitations: 依赖大语言模型提取文本描述，可能引入额外计算开销。
未在极端表情或大姿态变化场景下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合扩散模型、注意力机制和图推理，实验充分，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EAD-Net，通过扩散模型、SyncNet监督、时空方向注意力和时序图推理，实现高唇同步、强时间一致性和情感准确的表情说话头视频生成。

papers.title: Layer Embedding Deep Fusion Graph Neural Network
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated impressive performance in learning representations from graph-structured data. However, their message-passing mechanism inherently relies on the assumption of label consistency among connected nodes, limiting their applicability to low-homophily settings. Moreover, since message passing operates as a hierarchical diffusion process, GNNs face challenges in capturing long-range dependencies. As network depth increases, the structural noise along heterophilic edges tends to be amplified, resulting in over-smoothing. This issue becomes especially prominent in highly heterophilic graphs, where the propagation of inconsistent semantics across the topology continually exacerbates misaggregation. To address this issue, we propose a novel framework named Layer Embedding Deep Fusion Graph Neural Network (LEDF-GNN). Specifically, we design a Layer Embedding Deep Fusion (LEDF) operator that nonlinearly fuses multi-layer embeddings to capture inter-layer dependencies and effectively alleviate deep propagation degradation. Meanwhile, to mitigate structural heterophily, LEDF-GNN employs a Dual-Topology Parallel Strategy (DTPS) that simultaneously leverages the original and reconstructed topologies, allowing for adaptive structure-semantics co-optimization under diverse homophily conditions. Extensive semi-supervised classification experiments on the citation and image benchmarks demonstrate that, under both homophilic and heterophilic settings, LEDF-GNN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating its effectiveness and generalization capability across diverse graph types.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEDF-GNN，通过层嵌入深度融合和双拓扑并行策略解决图神经网络在异配图上的过平滑和长程依赖问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络在低同配性图上因标签不一致假设和消息传递的层次扩散特性，面临过平滑和长程依赖捕获困难的问题，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 解决GNN在异配图上因深度增加导致的过平滑和结构噪声放大问题，以及长程依赖捕获不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，随着网络深度增加，异配边上的结构噪声被放大，导致过平滑；在高度异配图中，不一致语义的传播持续加剧错误聚合。
analysis.method: 提出LEDF-GNN框架，包含层嵌入深度融合（LEDF）算子非线性融合多层嵌入以捕获层间依赖并缓解深度退化，以及双拓扑并行策略（DTPS）同时利用原始和重构拓扑进行自适应结构-语义协同优化。
contributions: 提出LEDF算子，通过非线性融合多层嵌入有效缓解深度传播退化。
提出DTPS策略，利用双拓扑并行学习适应不同同配性条件。
在引文和图像基准上，同配和异配设置下均优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在引文和图像基准上进行了半监督分类实验，同配和异配设置下均优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能对大规模图的计算开销较高。
双拓扑策略的鲁棒性可能依赖于重构拓扑的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验验证充分，对异配图GNN研究有重要贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEDF-GNN，通过层嵌入深度融合和双拓扑并行策略解决图神经网络在异配图上的过平滑和长程依赖问题。

papers.title: KAConvNet: Kolmogorov-Arnold Convolutional Networks for Vision Recognition
papers.abstract: The Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have been the dominant and effective approach for general computer vision tasks. Recently, Kolmogorov-Arnold neural networks (KANs), based on the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem, have shown potential to replace Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) in deep learning. KANs, which use learnable nonlinear activations on edges and simple summation on nodes, offer fewer parameters and greater explainability compared to MLPs. However, there has been limited exploration of integrating the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem with convolutional methods for computer vision tasks. Existing attempts have merely replaced learnable activation functions with weights, undermining KANs' theoretical foundation and limiting their potential effectiveness. Additionally, the B-spline curves used in KANs suffer from computational inefficiency and a tendency to overfit. In this paper, we propose a novel Kolmogorov-Arnold Convolutional Layer that deeply integrates the Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theorem with convolution. This layer provides stronger method interpretability because it is based on established mathematical theorems and its design has theoretical alignment. Building on the Kolmogorov-Arnold Convolutional Layer, we design an efficient network architecture called KAConvNet, which outperforms existing methods combining KAN and convolution, and achieves competitive performance compared to mainstream ViTs and CNNs. We believe that our work offers valuable insight into the field of artificial intelligence and will inspire the development of more innovative CNNs in the 2020s. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/UnicomAI/KAConvNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出KAConvNet，将KAN与卷积深度融合，在视觉识别任务上达到与主流ViT/CNN竞争的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: KAN在理论上可替代MLP，但现有与卷积的结合方法破坏了其理论基础且效率低；亟需一种理论对齐且高效的KAN卷积集成方案。
analysis.problem: 如何将Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理与卷积操作深度融合，设计出理论可解释、高效且性能优异的卷积网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有KAN+卷积方法仅用可学习激活替换权重，违背KAN理论；B样条曲线计算效率低且易过拟合。
analysis.method: 提出Kolmogorov-Arnold卷积层，基于Kolmogorov-Arnold定理设计，将可学习非线性激活与卷积核结合，并构建KAConvNet网络架构。
contributions: 提出一种理论对齐的Kolmogorov-Arnold卷积层，深度融合KAN与卷积。
设计KAConvNet网络，在多个视觉任务上超越现有KAN+卷积方法，与主流ViT/CNN性能竞争。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在视觉识别任务上达到竞争性能。
limitations: 可能仍存在计算效率问题（B样条曲线被提及但未完全解决）。
仅在视觉识别任务上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，理论对齐，但实验细节不足，适合关注KAN与CNN结合的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KAConvNet，将KAN与卷积深度融合，在视觉识别任务上达到与主流ViT/CNN竞争的性能。

papers.title: Learning from Noisy Prompts: Saliency-Guided Prompt Distillation for Robust Segmentation with SAM
papers.abstract: Segmentation is central to clinical diagnosis and monitoring, yet the reliability of modern foundation models in medical imaging still depends on the availability of precise prompts. The Segment Anything Model (SAM) offers powerful zero-shot capabilities, although it collapses under the weak, generic, and noisy prompts that dominate real clinical workflows. In practice, annotations such as centerline points are coarse and ambiguous, often drifting across neighboring anatomy and misguiding SAM toward inconsistent or incomplete masks. We introduce SPD, a Saliency-Guided Prompt Distillation framework that converts these unreliable cues into robust guidance. SPD first learns data-driven anatomical priors through a lightweight saliency head to obtain confident localization maps. These priors then drive Contextual Prompt Distillation, which validates and enriches noisy prompts using cues from anatomically adjacent slices, producing a consensus prompt set that matches the behavior of expert reasoning. A Pairwise Slice Consistency objective further enforces local anatomical coherence during segmentation. Experiments on four challenging MRI and CT benchmarks demonstrate that SPD consistently outperforms existing SAM adaptations and supervised baselines, delivering large gains in both region-based and boundary-based metrics. SPD provides a practical and principled path toward reliable foundation model deployment in clinical environments where only imperfect prompts are available.

analysis.tldr: 提出SPD框架，通过显著性引导的提示蒸馏将临床中常见的噪声提示转化为鲁棒引导，提升SAM在医学图像分割中的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代基础模型（如SAM）在医学图像分割中依赖精确提示，但临床实践中提示常是弱、通用且带噪声的（如中心线点），导致分割结果不一致或不完整，限制了模型在真实临床环境中的部署。
analysis.problem: 如何将临床中不可靠的噪声提示（如粗粒度的中心线点）转化为鲁棒的分割引导，使SAM在医学图像分割中保持高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAM在弱、通用、噪声提示下性能崩溃，提示漂移导致掩膜不一致或不完整。
analysis.method: SPD框架包含三个部分：1）轻量级显著性头学习数据驱动的解剖先验，生成置信定位图；2）上下文提示蒸馏，利用相邻解剖切片的线索验证和丰富噪声提示，生成共识提示集；3）成对切片一致性目标强制局部解剖一致性。
contributions: 提出显著性引导的提示蒸馏框架SPD，将噪声提示转化为鲁棒引导。
在四个MRI和CT基准上超越现有SAM适应方法和监督基线，在区域和边界指标上均取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在四个具有挑战性的MRI和CT基准上进行实验，SPD在区域和边界指标上均优于现有SAM适应方法和监督基线。
limitations: 可能依赖相邻切片的一致性假设，在切片间解剖变化剧烈时效果可能下降。
显著性头的训练需要一定量的标注数据，可能限制在极低标注场景下的应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对临床实际问题，实验充分且效果显著，与医学图像分割方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SPD框架，通过显著性引导的提示蒸馏将临床中常见的噪声提示转化为鲁棒引导，提升SAM在医学图像分割中的可靠性。

papers.title: GIFT: Global stabilisation via Intrinsic Fine Tuning
papers.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning policies achieve strong performance in complex continuous control environments with nonlinear contact forces. However, these policies often produce chaotic state dynamics, with trivially small changes to the initial conditions significantly impacting the long-term behaviour of the control system. This high sensitivity to initial conditions limits the application of Deep RL to real-world control systems where performance and stability guarantees are often required. To address this issue, we propose Global stabilisation via Intrinsic Fine Tuning (GIFT), a general-purpose training framework which directly optimises the global stability of existing high-performing deep RL policies using a custom reward function. We demonstrate that GIFT increase the stability of the control interaction while maintaining comparable task performance, thereby improving the suitability of deep RL policies for real-world control systems.

analysis.tldr: GIFT通过内在微调提升深度强化学习策略的全局稳定性，同时保持任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度强化学习策略在复杂连续控制环境中表现优异，但对初始条件高度敏感，导致混沌状态动力学，限制了其在需要稳定性保证的真实世界控制系统中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著降低任务性能的前提下，提升现有深度强化学习策略的全局稳定性，降低对初始条件的敏感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出深度强化学习策略在非线性接触力环境中会产生混沌状态动力学，初始条件的微小变化会显著影响长期行为，即高敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出GIFT框架，通过自定义奖励函数直接优化现有高性能深度强化学习策略的全局稳定性，进行内在微调。
contributions: 提出GIFT，一种通用训练框架，用于提升深度强化学习策略的全局稳定性。
实验证明GIFT能在保持任务性能的同时显著提高控制交互的稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定连续控制环境中验证，泛化性未知。
自定义奖励函数的设计可能依赖领域知识，通用性受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法有实际意义，但摘要未提供实验细节，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GIFT通过内在微调提升深度强化学习策略的全局稳定性，同时保持任务性能。

papers.title: STAND: Semantic Anchoring Constraint with Dual-Granularity Disambiguation for Remote Sensing Image Change Captioning
papers.abstract: Remote sensing image change captioning (RSICC) aims to describe the difference between two remote sensing images. While recent methods have explored video modeling, they largely overlook the inherent ambiguities in viewpoint, scale, and prior knowledge, lacking effective constraints on the encoder. In this paper, we present STAND, a Semantic Anchoring Constraint with Dual-Granularity Disambiguation for RSICC, to progressively resolve these ambiguities. Specifically, to establish a reliable feature foundation, we first introduce an interpretable constraint to regularize temporal representations. Operating on these purified features, a dual-granularity disambiguation module resolves spatial uncertainties by coupling macro-level global context aggregation for viewpoint confusion with micro-level frequency-refocused attention for small-object scale enhancement. Ultimately, to translate these visually disambiguated features into precise text, a semantic concept anchoring module leverages language categorical priors to tackle knowledge ambiguity during decoding. Extensive experiments verify the superiority of STAND and its effectiveness in addressing ambiguities.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义锚定约束与双粒度消歧方法，逐步解决遥感图像变化描述中的视角、尺度和先验知识歧义。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像变化描述（RSICC）任务中，现有方法忽视视角、尺度和先验知识的内在歧义，缺乏对编码器的有效约束，导致描述不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何有效解决RSICC中视角混淆、小目标尺度变化和先验知识歧义，生成精确的变化描述。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出遥感图像存在视角、尺度和先验知识的固有歧义，现有视频建模方法未充分处理这些歧义。
analysis.method: 提出STAND框架，包含三个模块：1）可解释约束正则化时序表示；2）双粒度消歧模块，通过宏观全局上下文聚合解决视角混淆，微观频率重聚焦注意力增强小目标尺度；3）语义概念锚定模块利用语言类别先验解决解码时的知识歧义。
contributions: 提出语义锚定约束与双粒度消歧方法，系统解决RSICC中的多源歧义。
设计可解释约束和频率重聚焦注意力，提升特征质量和小目标描述能力。
实验验证STAND在RSICC任务上的优越性和消歧有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定遥感数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
双粒度消歧模块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，系统解决遥感变化描述中的歧义问题，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义锚定约束与双粒度消歧方法，逐步解决遥感图像变化描述中的视角、尺度和先验知识歧义。

papers.title: CombiMOTS: Combinatorial Multi-Objective Tree Search for Dual-Target Molecule Generation
papers.abstract: Dual-target molecule generation, which focuses on discovering compounds capable of interacting with two target proteins, has garnered significant attention due to its potential for improving therapeutic efficiency, safety and resistance mitigation. Existing approaches face two critical challenges. First, by simplifying the complex dual-target optimization problem to scalarized combinations of individual objectives, they fail to capture important trade-offs between target engagement and molecular properties. Second, they typically do not integrate synthetic planning into the generative process. This highlights a need for more appropriate objective function design and synthesis-aware methodologies tailored to the dual-target molecule generation task. In this work, we propose CombiMOTS, a Pareto Monte Carlo Tree Search (PMCTS) framework that generates dual-target molecules. CombiMOTS is designed to explore a synthesizable fragment space while employing vectorized optimization constraints to encapsulate target affinity and physicochemical properties. Extensive experiments on real-world databases demonstrate that CombiMOTS produces novel dual-target molecules with high docking scores, enhanced diversity, and balanced pharmacological characteristics, showcasing its potential as a powerful tool for dual-target drug discovery. The code and data is accessible through https://github.com/Tibogoss/CombiMOTS.

analysis.tldr: 提出CombiMOTS框架，利用Pareto蒙特卡洛树搜索在可合成片段空间中生成双靶点分子，兼顾靶点亲和力与理化性质。
analysis.research_motivation: 双靶点分子生成可提升疗效、安全性和抗耐药性，但现有方法将多目标优化简化为标量化组合，丢失了靶点结合与分子性质间的关键权衡，且未整合合成规划。
analysis.problem: 如何设计能同时优化多个目标（靶点亲和力、理化性质）并考虑合成可行性的双靶点分子生成方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法因标量化目标函数而无法捕捉多目标间的权衡，且缺乏合成感知。
analysis.method: 提出CombiMOTS，基于Pareto蒙特卡洛树搜索（PMCTS），在可合成片段空间中搜索，使用向量化优化约束同时处理靶点亲和力和理化性质。
contributions: 提出首个将Pareto多目标优化与蒙特卡洛树搜索结合用于双靶点分子生成的框架。
在真实数据库上验证了生成分子具有高对接分数、高多样性和平衡的药理学特性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界数据库上进行实验，生成的双靶点分子具有高对接分数、增强的多样性和平衡的药理学特性。
limitations: 可能依赖片段库的质量和覆盖度。
未讨论计算效率或可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（Pareto MTS用于分子生成），但实验细节有限，应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CombiMOTS框架，利用Pareto蒙特卡洛树搜索在可合成片段空间中生成双靶点分子，兼顾靶点亲和力与理化性质。

papers.title: GAZE: Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation with Viewer-Level Tools and Literature Retrieval on Rare Brain MRI
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) read an image and produce text in a single forward pass, whereas radiologists typically inspect an image several times and consult the literature before writing a report. We introduce GAZE (Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation), a framework that lets a medical VLM work in this iterative way by calling viewer-level tools (zoom, windowing, contrast, edge detection) and two retrieval tools backed by the U.S. National Library of Medicine (PubMed for medical literature, Open-i for radiological images), with structured outputs validated against a schema and full tool-call traces recorded for auditability. On NOVA, a benchmark of 906 brain MRI cases covering 281 rare neurological conditions, GAZE reaches 58.2 mean average precision (mAP) at intersection-over-union (IoU) 0.3 for lesion localisation and 34.9% Top-1 diagnostic accuracy under a joint protocol that scores captioning, diagnosis, and localisation from the image alone, without task-specific fine-tuning. Before any tool is used, structured prompting and schema-validated outputs already improve over the published Gemini 2.0 Flash baseline (20.2 to 29.4 mAP@0.3), so framework design is itself an experimental variable. Tool use helps rare pathologies disproportionately: the fraction of cases with IoU > 0.3 rises from 17% to 58% for diagnoses with three or fewer examples versus 25% to 68% for common conditions ($\geq$10 cases), with gains tracking engagement (Gemini 3 Flash: Cohen's d = 0.79, 11.8 tool calls per case; Gemini 2.0 Flash: tools used in 8.2% of cases, no significant benefit). Retrieval ablations additionally reveal a model-dependent trade-off in which gains in diagnosis can coincide with losses in localisation, reinforcing the case for joint evaluation of diagnosis, localisation, and captioning in medical VLMs.

analysis.tldr: GAZE框架通过工具调用和文献检索，在罕见脑MRI诊断中显著提升VLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM单次前向推理生成报告，而放射科医生会多次检查图像并查阅文献，这种差异限制了VLM在医学影像诊断中的表现。
analysis.problem: 如何让医学VLM模拟放射科医生的迭代式工作流程，通过工具调用和文献检索提升罕见脑MRI的诊断和定位能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工具使用对罕见病理帮助更大（IoU>0.3的病例比例从17%升至58%），且检索消融显示诊断增益可能伴随定位损失，需联合评估。
analysis.method: GAZE框架：集成查看器级工具（缩放、窗宽、对比度、边缘检测）和两个检索工具（PubMed、Open-i），输出经schema验证的结构化结果，并记录完整工具调用轨迹。
contributions: 提出GAZE框架，使医学VLM能迭代式调用工具和检索文献，提升零样本诊断和定位性能。
在包含281种罕见神经疾病的NOVA基准上，GAZE达到58.2 mAP@0.3和34.9% Top-1诊断准确率。
揭示工具使用对罕见病理的显著增益，以及检索中诊断与定位的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在NOVA基准（906例脑MRI，281种罕见疾病）上评估，对比Gemini 2.0 Flash基线，并进行了工具使用消融和检索消融实验。
limitations: 仅针对脑MRI，泛化到其他模态需验证。
工具调用次数与性能提升的关系可能依赖模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对医学VLM的迭代式推理，实验充分，对罕见病诊断有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GAZE框架通过工具调用和文献检索，在罕见脑MRI诊断中显著提升VLM性能。

papers.title: $\mathcal{S}^2$IT: Stepwise Syntax Integration Tuning for Large Language Models in Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction
papers.abstract: Aspect Sentiment Quad Prediction (ASQP) has seen significant advancements, largely driven by the powerful semantic understanding and generative capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, while syntactic structure information has been proven effective in previous extractive paradigms, it remains underutilized in the generative paradigm of LLMs due to their limited reasoning capabilities. In this paper, we propose S^2IT, a novel Stepwise Syntax Integration Tuning framework that progressively integrates syntactic structure knowledge into LLMs through a multi-step tuning process. The training process is divided into three steps. S^2IT decomposes the quadruple generation task into two stages: 1) Global Syntax-guided Extraction and 2) Local Syntax-guided Classification, integrating both global and local syntactic structure information. Finally, Fine-grained Structural Tuning enhances the model's understanding of syntactic structures through the prediction of element links and node classification. Experiments demonstrate that S^2IT significantly improves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets. Our implementation will be open-sourced at https://github.com/DMIRLAB-Group/S2IT.

analysis.tldr: 提出逐步语法集成微调框架S²IT，通过多步训练将句法结构知识融入大语言模型，显著提升方面情感四元组预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大语言模型在方面情感四元组预测中主要依赖语义理解，而句法结构信息在生成范式下未被充分利用，限制了模型推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何有效将句法结构知识融入大语言模型的生成式框架以提升方面情感四元组预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S²IT框架，包含三步训练：全局句法引导提取、局部句法引导分类和细粒度结构微调，逐步整合全局与局部句法信息。
contributions: 提出逐步语法集成微调框架S²IT，首次在生成式LLM中系统性地整合句法结构知识。
在多个数据集上取得最先进性能，并开源实现。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行实验，结果表明S²IT显著提升了最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定句法解析器质量。
多步训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验验证有效，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读确认。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出逐步语法集成微调框架S²IT，通过多步训练将句法结构知识融入大语言模型，显著提升方面情感四元组预测性能。

papers.title: Human-1 by Josh Talks: A Full-Duplex Conversational Modeling Framework in Hindi using Real-World Conversations
papers.abstract: Full-duplex spoken dialogue systems can model natural conversational behaviours such as interruptions, overlaps, and backchannels, yet such systems remain largely unexplored for Indian languages. We present the first open, reproducible full-duplex spoken dialogue system for Hindi by adapting Moshi, a state-of-the-art duplex speech architecture, using a custom Hindi tokeniser and training on 26,000 hours of real spontaneous conversations collected from 14,695 speakers with separate speaker channels, enabling direct learning of turn-taking and overlap patterns from natural interactions. To support Hindi text generation, we replace the original English tokeniser and reinitialise text-vocabulary-dependent parameters while retaining the pre-trained audio components. We propose a two-stage training recipe -- large-scale pre-training followed by fine-tuning on 1,000 hours of conversational data. Evaluation through the prompted dialogue continuation paradigm with both automatic metrics and human judgments demonstrates that the resulting model generates natural and meaningful full-duplex conversational behaviour in Hindi. This work serves as a first step toward real-time duplex spoken dialogue systems for Hindi and other Indian languages.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向印地语的全双工口语对话系统，基于Moshi架构和真实对话数据训练，支持打断、重叠等自然交互行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 全双工口语对话系统能模拟打断、重叠等自然对话行为，但针对印度语言的研究几乎空白，缺乏开源可复现的系统。
analysis.problem: 构建首个面向印地语的开源全双工口语对话系统，使其能学习真实对话中的话轮转换和重叠模式。

papers.title: An Analysis of Active Learning Algorithms using Real-World Crowd-sourced Text Annotations
papers.abstract: Active learning algorithms automatically identify the most informative samples from large amounts of unlabeled data and tremendously reduce human annotation effort in inducing a machine learning model. In a conventional active learning setup, the labeling oracles are assumed to be infallible, that is, they always provide correct answers (in terms of class labels) to the queried unlabeled instances, which cannot be guaranteed in real-world applications. To this end, a body of research has focused on the development of active learning algorithms in the presence of imperfect / noisy oracles. Existing research on active learning with noisy oracles typically simulate the oracles using machine learning models; however, real-world situations are much more challenging, and using ML models to simulate the annotation patterns may not appropriately capture the nuances of real-world annotation challenges. In this research, we first collect annotations of text samples (from 3 benchmark text classification datasets) from crowd-sourced workers through a crowd-sourcing platform. We then conduct extensive empirical studies of 8 commonly used active learning techniques (in conjunction with deep neural networks) using the obtained annotations. Our analyses sheds light on the performance of these techniques under real-world challenges, where annotators can provide incorrect labels, and can also refuse to provide labels. We hope this research will provide valuable insights that will be useful for the deployment of deep active learning systems in real-world applications. The obtained annotations can be accessed at https://github.com/varuntotakura/al_rcta/.

analysis.tldr: 通过真实众包文本标注实验，系统评估了8种主动学习算法在存在噪声标注者时的表现。

papers.title: MetaErr: Towards Predicting Error Patterns in Deep Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Due to the unprecedented success of deep learning, it has become an integral component in several multimedia computing applications in todays world. Unfortunately, deep learning systems are not perfect and can fail, sometimes abruptly, without prior warning or explanation. While reducing the error rate of deep neural networks has been the primary focus of the multimedia community, the problem of predicting when a deep learning system is going to fail has received significantly less research attention. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective framework, MetaErr, to address this under-explored problem in deep learning research. We train a meta-model whose goal is to predict whether a base deep neural network will succeed or fail in predicting a particular data sample, by observing the base models performance on a given learning task. The meta-model is completely agnostic of the architecture and training parameters of the base model. Such an error prediction system can be immensely useful in a variety of smart multimedia applications. Our empirical studies corroborate the promise and potential of our framework against competing baselines. We further demonstrate the usefulness of our framework to improve the performance of pseudo-labeling-based semi-supervised learning, and show that MetaErr outperforms several strong baselines on three benchmark computer vision datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出MetaErr框架，通过元模型预测深度神经网络在单个样本上的错误，无需了解基模型架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习系统虽然成功，但可能突然失败且无预警，现有研究主要关注降低错误率，而预测失败时机的问题被忽视。

papers.title: Au-M-ol: A Unified Model for Medical Audio and Language Understanding
papers.abstract: In this work, we present Au-M-ol, a novel multimodal architecture that extends Large Language Models (LLMs) with audio processing. It is designed to improve performance on clinically relevant tasks such as Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR). Au-M-ol has three main components: (1) an audio encoder that extracts rich acoustic features from medical speech, (2) an adaptation layer that maps audio features into the LLM input space, and (3) a pretrained LLM that performs transcription and clinical language understanding. This design allows the model to interpret spoken medical content directly, improving both accuracy and robustness. In experiments, Au-M-ol reduces Word Error Rate (WER) by 56\% compared to state-of-the-art baselines on medical transcription tasks. The model also performs well in challenging conditions, including noisy environments, domain-specific terminology, and speaker variability. These results suggest that Au-M-ol is a strong candidate for real-world clinical applications, where reliable and context-aware audio understanding is essential.

analysis.tldr: 提出Au-M-ol多模态架构，将LLM扩展至医疗音频理解，在医学转录任务上WER降低56%。

papers.title: Bridging the Pose-Semantic Gap: A Cascade Framework for Text-Based Person Anomaly Search
papers.abstract: Text-based person anomaly search retrieves specific behavioral events from surveillance archives using natural-language queries. Although recent pose-aware methods align geometric structures well, they face a fundamental Pose-Semantic Gap: semantically different actions can share similar skeletal geometries. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can reduce this ambiguity, using them for large-scale retrieval is computationally prohibitive. We propose the Structure-Semantic Decoupled Cascade (SSDC) framework, which decouples retrieval into two stages: (1) Structure-Aware Coarse Retrieval, where a lightweight model quickly filters candidates by skeletal similarity ; and (2) Detective Squad Interaction, a multi-agent semantic verification module. The squad consists of a Detective for fast binary filtering, an Analyst for evidence extraction, and a Writer for semantic synthesis. Finally, we re-rank candidates by fusing the synthesized captions with structural priors. Experiments on the PAB benchmark show that SSDC achieves state-of-the-art performance by balancing efficiency and semantic reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构-语义解耦级联框架SSDC，通过两阶段检索弥合姿态-语义鸿沟，在文本人员异常搜索任务中实现效率与语义推理的平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于姿态的方法虽能对齐几何结构，但面临姿态-语义鸿沟：语义不同的动作可能共享相似骨骼几何；而直接使用多模态大模型进行大规模检索计算成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模文本人员异常搜索中高效弥合姿态-语义鸿沟，同时保持检索效率与语义准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到姿态-语义鸿沟现象：语义不同的动作可能具有相似的骨骼几何结构，导致纯姿态方法产生歧义。
analysis.method: 提出结构-语义解耦级联框架（SSDC），包含两阶段：1）结构感知粗检索，使用轻量模型基于骨骼相似性快速筛选候选；2）侦探小队交互，多智能体语义验证模块（侦探、分析师、写作者）进行细粒度语义验证，最终融合合成描述与结构先验进行重排序。

在PAB基准上取得最先进性能，平衡了检索效率与语义准确性。

papers.title: Contrastive Learning for Multimodal Human Activity Recognition with Limited Labeled Data
papers.abstract: Human activity recognition serves as the foundation for various emerging applications. In recent years, researchers have used collaborative sensing of multi-source sensors to capture complex and dynamic human activities. However, multimodal human activity sensing typically encounters highly heterogeneous data across modalities and label scarcity, resulting in an application gap between existing solutions and real-world needs. In this paper, we propose CLMM, a general contrastive learning framework for human activity recognition that achieves effective multimodal recognition with limited labeled data. CLMM employs a novel two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, CLMM employs a CNN-DiffTransformer encoder to capture cross-modal shared information by extracting local and global features. Meanwhile, a hard-positive samples weighting algorithm enhances gradient propagation to reinforce shared learning. In the second stage, a dual-branch architecture combining quality-guided attention and bidirectional gated units captures modality-specific information, while a primary-auxiliary collaborative training strategy fuses both shared and modality-specific information. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that CLMM significantly improves state-of-the-art baselines in both recognition accuracy and convergence performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLMM对比学习框架，利用少量标注数据实现多模态人体活动识别，在三个数据集上提升准确率和收敛性能。

papers.title: AI Identity: Standards, Gaps, and Research Directions for AI Agents
papers.abstract: AI agents are now running real transactions, workflows, and sub-agent chains across organizational boundaries without continuous human supervision. This creates a problem no current infrastructure is equipped to solve: how do you identify, verify, and hold accountable an entity with no body, no persistent memory, and no legal standing? We define AI Identity as the continuous relationship between what an AI agent is declared to be and what it is observed to do, bounded by the confidence that those two things correspond at any given moment. Through a structured survey of industry trends, emerging standards, and technical literature, we conduct a gap analysis across the full agent identity lifecycle and make three contributions: (1) a structural comparison of human and AI identity across four dimensions (substrate, persistence, verifiability, and legal standing) showing that the asymmetry is fundamental and that extending human frameworks to agents without structural modification produces systematic failures; (2) an evaluation of current technical and regulatory documents against the identity requirements of autonomous agents, finding that none adequately address the challenge of governing nondeterministic, boundary-crossing entities; and (3) identification of five critical gaps (semantic intent verification, recursive delegation accountability, agent identity integrity, governance opacity and enforcement, and operational sustainability) that no current technology or regulatory instrument resolves. These gaps are structural; more engineering effort alone will not close them. Foundational research on AI identity is the central conclusion of this report.

analysis.tldr: AI代理缺乏身份基础设施，本文通过调查和差距分析，识别了五个关键缺口，呼吁基础研究。
analysis.research_motivation: AI代理在无持续人类监督下运行真实交易和工作流，但现有基础设施无法解决其身份识别、验证和问责问题。

papers.title: Active Inference: A method for Phenotyping Agency in AI systems?
papers.abstract: The proliferation of agentic artificial intelligence has outpaced the conceptual tools needed to characterize agency in computational systems. Prevailing definitions mainly rely on autonomy and goal-directedness. Here, we argue for a minimal notion open to principled inspection given three criteria: intentionality as action grounded in beliefs and desires, rationality as normatively coherent action entailed by a world model, and explainability as action causally traceable to internal states; we subsequently instantiate these as a partially observable Markov decision process under a variational framework wherein posterior beliefs, prior preferences, and the minimization of expected free energy jointly constitute an agentic action chain. Using a canonical T-maze paradigm, we evidence how empowerment, formulated as the channel capacity between actions and anticipated observations, serves as an operational metric that distinguishes zero-, intermediate-, and high-agency phenotypes through structural manipulations of the generative model. We conclude by arguing that as agents engage in epistemic foraging to resolve ambiguity, the governance controls that remain effective must shift systematically from external constraints to the internal modulation of prior preferences, offering a principled, variational bridge from computational phenotyping to AI governance strategy

analysis.tldr: 用主动推理框架定义AI系统能动性表型，并通过T-maze实验验证赋能度作为量化指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI系统能动性概念缺乏可操作的定义和量化方法，难以对系统进行系统性表征和治理。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过T-maze实验发现，赋能度（动作与预期观察之间的信道容量）能有效区分零、中、高能动性表型，且能动性越高，有效治理越需从外部约束转向内部先验偏好调制。
analysis.method: 将能动性定义为基于信念和欲望的意向性、基于世界模型的规范理性、以及可解释性三个准则，并实例化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）下的变分框架，其中后验信念、先验偏好和期望自由能最小化共同构成能动性动作链；使用赋能度作为操作化度量。
contributions: 提出一个基于主动推理的AI系统能动性表型化框架，包含三个可检验准则。
通过T-maze实验验证赋能度作为区分不同能动性表型的有效度量。
为AI治理提供从计算表型到治理策略的变分桥梁。
