papers.title: From Similarity to Structure: Training-free LLM Context Compression with Hybrid Graph Priors
papers.abstract: Long-context large language models remain computationally expensive to run and often fail to reliably process very long inputs, which makes context compression an important component of many systems. Existing compression approaches typically rely on trained compressors, dense retrieval-style selection, or heuristic trimming, and they often struggle to jointly preserve task relevance, topic coverage, and cross-sentence coherence under a strict token budget. To address this, we propose a training-free and model-agnostic compression framework that selects a compact set of sentences guided by structural graph priors. Our method constructs a sparse hybrid sentence graph that combines mutual k-NN semantic edges with short-range sequential edges, extracts a topic skeleton via clustering, and ranks sentences using an interpretable score that integrates task relevance, cluster representativeness, bridge centrality, and a cycle coverage cue. A budgeted greedy selection with redundancy suppression then produces a readable compressed context in original order. Experimental results on four datasets show that our approach is competitive with strong extractive and abstractive baselines, demonstrating larger gains on long-document benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、模型无关的上下文压缩方法，利用混合图先验选择句子，在长文档基准上取得有竞争力的结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文LLM计算成本高且处理长输入不可靠，现有压缩方法依赖训练、密集检索或启发式修剪，难以在严格预算下同时保持任务相关性、主题覆盖和跨句连贯性。
analysis.problem: 在固定token预算下，如何从长上下文中选择紧凑且信息完整的句子子集，以保持任务相关性、主题覆盖和连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建稀疏混合句子图（互k-NN语义边+短程顺序边），通过聚类提取主题骨架，使用可解释评分（任务相关性、簇代表性、桥接中心性、循环覆盖线索）排序句子，结合预算贪婪选择和冗余抑制生成压缩上下文。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、模型无关的上下文压缩框架，利用结构图先验指导句子选择。
设计混合句子图、主题骨架提取和可解释评分机制，在四个数据集上达到与强基线竞争的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数据集上评估，与强抽取式和抽象式基线对比，在长文档基准上表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖句子级分割质量，对非结构化文本效果未知。
图构建和聚类计算开销可能随文档长度增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需训练，实验显示在长文档上有效，但摘要未提供详细实验结果，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、模型无关的上下文压缩方法，利用混合图先验选择句子，在长文档基准上取得有竞争力的结果。

papers.title: Lightweight and Production-Ready PDF Visual Element Parsing
papers.abstract: PDF documents contain critical visual elements such as figures, tables, and forms whose accurate extraction is essential for document understanding and multimodal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Existing PDF parsers often miss complex visuals, extract non-informative artifacts (e.g., watermarks, logos), produce fragmented elements, and fail to reliably associate captions with their corresponding elements, which degrades downstream retrieval and question answering. We present a lightweight and production level PDF parsing framework that can accurately detect visual elements and associates captions using a combination of spatial heuristics, layout analysis, and semantic similarity. On popular benchmark datasets and internal product data, the proposed solution achieves $\geq96\%$ visual element detection accuracy and $93\%$ caption association accuracy. When used as a preprocessing step for multimodal RAG, it significantly outperforms state-of-the-art parsers and large vision-language models on both internal data and the MMDocRAG benchmark, while reducing latency by over $2\times$. We have deployed the proposed system in challenging production environment.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级生产级PDF视觉元素解析框架，检测准确率≥96%，字幕关联准确率93%，延迟降低2倍以上。
analysis.research_motivation: PDF文档中的视觉元素（如图表、表格）准确提取对文档理解和多模态RAG至关重要，但现有解析器常遗漏复杂视觉元素、提取非信息性伪影、产生碎片化元素且无法可靠关联字幕，影响下游检索和问答性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现轻量级、生产级的PDF视觉元素检测与字幕关联，以提升多模态RAG效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有PDF解析器在复杂视觉元素检测、伪影过滤、元素完整性及字幕关联方面存在不足，导致下游任务性能下降。
analysis.method: 结合空间启发式、布局分析和语义相似度的PDF解析框架，用于准确检测视觉元素并关联字幕。
contributions: 提出轻量级生产级PDF视觉元素解析框架，检测准确率≥96%，字幕关联准确率93%。
在多模态RAG中显著优于SOTA解析器和大型视觉语言模型，延迟降低2倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在流行基准数据集和内部产品数据上，视觉元素检测准确率≥96%，字幕关联准确率93%；在内部数据和MMDocRAG基准上，多模态RAG性能显著优于SOTA解析器和大型视觉语言模型，延迟降低2倍以上。
limitations: 可能对高度复杂或非标准布局的PDF文档泛化能力有限。
未提及对多语言PDF的支持情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用且效果显著，但创新性中等，适合实际部署场景。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级生产级PDF视觉元素解析框架，检测准确率≥96%，字幕关联准确率93%，延迟降低2倍以上。

papers.title: SemiGDA: Generative Dual-distribution Alignment for Semi-Supervised Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Semi-supervised learning addresses label scarcity and high annotation costs in medical image segmentation by exploiting the latent information in unlabeled data to enhance model performance. Traditional discriminative segmentation relies on segmentation masks, neglecting feature-level distribution constraints. This limits robust semantic representation learning and adaptive modeling of unlabeled data in scenarios with few labels. To address these limitations, we propose SemiGDA, a novel Generative Dual-distribution Alignment framework for semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Our SemiGDA overcomes the reliance of discriminative methods on large labeled datasets by aligning feature and semantic distributions to boost semantic learning and scene adaptability. Specifically, we propose a Dual-distribution Alignment Module (DAM), which employs two structurally distinct encoders to model image and mask feature distributions. It enforces their alignment in the latent space via distributional constraints, establishing structured feature consistency. Moreover, we design a Consistency-Driven Skip Adapter (CDSA) strategy, which introduces dual skip adapters (Image and Mask) to fuse multi-scale features via skip connections. Using a consistency loss, CDSA enhances cross-branch semantic alignment and reinforces fine-grained semantic consistency. Experimental results on diverse medical datasets show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art semi-supervised segmentation methods. Code is released at: https://github.com/taozh2017/SemiGDA.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式双分布对齐框架SemiGDA，通过特征与语义分布对齐提升半监督医学图像分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 半监督学习可缓解医学图像分割中标签稀缺和高标注成本问题，但传统判别式方法仅依赖分割掩码，忽略特征级分布约束，导致标签少时语义学习不足和场景适应性差。
analysis.problem: 如何利用未标注数据的特征和语义分布信息，增强半监督医学图像分割的鲁棒语义表示和场景自适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统判别式方法仅利用分割掩码，缺乏对特征分布的显式约束，限制了模型在少标签场景下的语义学习。
analysis.method: 提出SemiGDA框架，包含双分布对齐模块（DAM）和一致性驱动跳跃适配器（CDSA）。DAM使用两个结构不同的编码器分别建模图像和掩码特征分布，并通过分布约束对齐潜在空间；CDSA引入双跳跃适配器融合多尺度特征，通过一致性损失增强跨分支语义对齐。
contributions: 提出生成式双分布对齐框架SemiGDA，首次将特征和语义分布对齐用于半监督医学图像分割。
设计双分布对齐模块（DAM）和一致性驱动跳跃适配器（CDSA），有效提升少标签场景下的语义一致性和场景适应性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个医学数据集上实验，结果表明SemiGDA优于其他最先进的半监督分割方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂多模态医学图像分布对齐效果有限。
双编码器结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对半监督医学图像分割的分布对齐问题提出新框架，实验验证有效，与医学图像方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式双分布对齐框架SemiGDA，通过特征与语义分布对齐提升半监督医学图像分割性能。

papers.title: A Hierarchical Ensemble Inference Pipeline for Robust White Blood Cell Classification Under Domain Shifts
papers.abstract: Automated white blood cell (WBC) classification is essential for scalable leukaemia screening. However, real-world deployment is challenged by domain shifts caused by staining protocols, scanner characteristics, and inter-laboratory variability, which often degrade model performance. The White Blood Cell Classification Challenge (WBCBench) at ISBI 2026 aims to advance robust WBC recognition, with a focus on accurately identifying blast cells and other clinically critical rare subtypes. We propose a memory-augmented, hierarchical ensemble pipeline for WBC classification under domain shifts, leveraging a feature bank and a DinoBloom backbone fine-tuned with LoRA. Our three-stage inference hierarchy combines k-nearest neighbors (kNN) retrieval at each level, reducing over-reliance on any single decision. Evaluated on the WBCBench dataset, our method ranks within the top ten by macro F1-score in the final testing phase.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种记忆增强的分层集成推理流水线，用于在域偏移下鲁棒地分类白细胞。
analysis.research_motivation: 白细胞自动分类对可扩展的白血病筛查至关重要，但实际部署中因染色方案、扫描仪特性和实验室间差异导致的域偏移常使模型性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决白细胞分类在域偏移下的鲁棒性问题，特别是准确识别原始细胞等临床关键稀有亚型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出记忆增强的分层集成流水线，使用特征库和经LoRA微调的DinoBloom骨干网络，通过三级推理层次结合k近邻检索，减少对单一决策的依赖。
contributions: 提出一种记忆增强的分层集成推理流水线，用于域偏移下的白细胞分类。
在WBCBench数据集上取得top 10的macro F1-score。
analysis.experiments: 在WBCBench数据集上评估，最终测试阶段macro F1-score排名前十。
limitations: 摘要未提及方法在非血液学领域的泛化性。
可能依赖大规模特征库，存储和检索开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合记忆增强和分层集成，但实验信息有限，仅排名前十，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种记忆增强的分层集成推理流水线，用于在域偏移下鲁棒地分类白细胞。

papers.title: CAP-CoT: Cycle Adversarial Prompt for Improving Chain of Thoughts in LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting has emerged as a simple and effective way to elicit step-by-step solutions from large language models (LLMs). However, CoT reasoning can be unstable across runs on long, multi-step problems, leading to inconsistent answers for unchanged task. Most prior work focuses on improving the forward reasoning chain within a single pass, with less attention to iterative and contrastive correction. To address this gap, we propose CAP-CoT, a Cycle Adversarial Prompt optimization framework designed to improve both CoT reasoning accuracy and stability of a single deployed solver. In each cycle, a forward solver generates candidate reasoning chains, an adversarial challenger constructs plausible but deliberately flawed chains using targeted error strategies, and a feedback agent contrasts the two chains and produces step-aligned structured feedback. This feedback closes the optimization loop in two directions, including updating the solver prompt based on errors exposed by the challenger, and updating the challenger prompt to generate increasingly targeted errors in subsequent cycles. Unlike safety-oriented adversarial prompting such as jailbreak or prompt-injection attacks, our adversarial component is task-semantic and aims to expose logical vulnerabilities in reasoning chains. Experiments across six benchmarks and four LLM backbones demonstrate that within two to three adversarial prompt optimization cycles, CAP-CoT consistently reduces variability across runs while improving reasoning accuracy and robustness to prompt perturbations.

analysis.tldr: 提出循环对抗提示优化框架CAP-CoT，通过对抗生成有缺陷推理链并对比反馈，提升LLM思维链推理的准确性和稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 思维链推理在长多步问题上跨运行不稳定，现有方法多关注单次前向推理链改进，缺乏迭代对比校正机制。
analysis.problem: 如何提升LLM思维链推理的准确性和跨运行稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CoT推理在长多步问题上跨运行结果不一致，且对提示扰动敏感。
analysis.method: CAP-CoT框架：每轮循环中，前向求解器生成候选推理链，对抗挑战者使用目标错误策略构造看似合理但故意有缺陷的链，反馈代理对比两条链并生成步骤对齐的结构化反馈，用于更新求解器和挑战者的提示。
contributions: 提出循环对抗提示优化框架，通过对比反馈提升CoT推理准确性和稳定性
设计任务语义的对抗组件，暴露推理链中的逻辑漏洞，而非安全导向攻击
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准和四个LLM骨干上，两到三轮对抗优化后，CAP-CoT持续降低跨运行变异性，提升推理准确性和对提示扰动的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖初始提示质量
对抗策略的通用性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，与LLM推理核心方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出循环对抗提示优化框架CAP-CoT，通过对抗生成有缺陷推理链并对比反馈，提升LLM思维链推理的准确性和稳定性。

papers.title: LatentBurst: A Fast and Efficient Multi Frame Super-Resolution for Hexadeca-Bayer Pattern CIS images
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a novel multi frame super-resolution network (MFSR) for burst hexadeca Bayer pattern Contact Image Sensor (CIS) images, which includes demosaicing, denoising, multi-frame fusion, and super-resolution. Designing a high-quality reconstruction network poses several challenges as follows: 1) Unlike the Bayer color filter array (CFA) pattern, it is hard to interpolate hexadeca-Bayer pattern since the pixel distance between the same color groups increases; 2) Due to large object motion and camera movements, the final fusion result usually suffers the misalignment resulting a blurry image or ghosting artifacts; 3) The proposed network should be fast and efficient enough to operate in real-time on mobile devices. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel network, called LatentBurst, which contains: 1) a pyramid align and fusion approach in latent feature to deal with large motion scenario; 2) an efficient UNet-based structure which can run efficiently on mobile device; 3) fine-tuned optical flow estimation and two-step knowledge distillation to reduce domain-gap more effectively. Experimental results in various scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method compared with other state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对十六拜耳模式CIS图像的快速高效多帧超分辨率网络LatentBurst。
analysis.research_motivation: 十六拜耳模式CIS图像因同色像素间距大导致插值困难，且大运动场景下多帧融合易出现错位和伪影，现有方法难以在移动设备上实时运行。
analysis.problem: 设计一个同时完成去马赛克、去噪、多帧融合和超分辨率的网络，并满足实时性和高质量要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LatentBurst网络，包含潜在特征中的金字塔对齐与融合模块、高效的UNet结构、微调光流估计和两步知识蒸馏。
contributions: 提出一种针对十六拜耳模式CIS图像的多帧超分辨率网络，集成去马赛克、去噪、融合和超分辨率。
设计金字塔对齐与融合方法处理大运动场景，并采用高效UNet结构实现移动端实时运行。
通过微调光流估计和两步知识蒸馏减少域差距，提升重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多种场景下与最先进方法比较，验证了有效性。
limitations: 可能对极端运动或复杂场景的鲁棒性有限。
知识蒸馏可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对特定硬件模式，创新性中等，实验验证有效但未提供量化结果，适合相关领域读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对十六拜耳模式CIS图像的快速高效多帧超分辨率网络LatentBurst。

papers.title: MotionHiFlow: Text-to-motion via hierarchical flow matching
papers.abstract: Text-to-motion generation aims to generate 3D human motions that are tightly aligned with the input text while remaining physically plausible and rich in fine-grained detail. Although recent approaches can produce complex and natural movements, they usually operate at only one temporal scale, which limits both semantic alignment and temporal coherence. Inspired by the fact that complex motions are conceptualized hierarchically rather than at a single temporal scale in the human cognitive system, we propose \textit{MotionHiFlow}, a hierarchical flow matching framework to generate motion progressively by constructing flow path from low to high temporal scales. The flows at lower scales capture high-level semantics and coarse motion structures, while flows at higher scales refine temporal details. To link the flows across scales, we introduce a novel cross-scale transition process, ensuring continuity and preserving noise consistency. Furthermore, by integrating a Text-Motion Diffusion Transformer and a topology-aware Motion VAE, MotionHiFlow explicitly models structural dependencies among joints via joint-aware positional encoding and skeletal topology, enabling precise semantic alignment alongside fine-grained motion details. Extensive experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, with ablation studies confirming the effectiveness of the hierarchical design and key components. Code is available at https://github.com/ai-lh/MotionHiFlow.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层流匹配框架 MotionHiFlow，从低到高时间尺度逐步生成文本驱动的 3D 人体运动，在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到运动生成方法通常仅在单一时间尺度上操作，限制了语义对齐和时间连贯性，而人类认知系统对复杂运动的分层概念化启发我们探索多尺度生成。
analysis.problem: 如何生成与文本紧密对齐、物理合理且细节丰富的 3D 人体运动，同时解决单一时间尺度带来的语义和时间连贯性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MotionHiFlow，一种分层流匹配框架，通过从低到高时间尺度构建流路径逐步生成运动；低尺度流捕获高层语义和粗略结构，高尺度流细化时间细节；引入跨尺度过渡过程确保连续性和噪声一致性；集成文本-运动扩散 Transformer 和拓扑感知运动 VAE，通过关节感知位置编码和骨骼拓扑显式建模关节结构依赖。
contributions: 提出分层流匹配框架 MotionHiFlow，实现从粗到细的多尺度运动生成。
引入跨尺度过渡过程，保证不同尺度流之间的连续性和噪声一致性。
设计文本-运动扩散 Transformer 和拓扑感知运动 VAE，增强语义对齐和细粒度细节。
analysis.experiments: 在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 基准上达到 SOTA，消融实验验证了分层设计和关键组件的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模运动捕捉数据，泛化到未见动作类型有限。
分层流匹配的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新（分层流匹配）且实验充分（SOTA），与生成模型方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层流匹配框架 MotionHiFlow，从低到高时间尺度逐步生成文本驱动的 3D 人体运动，在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 上达到 SOTA。

papers.title: Small Language Model Helps Resolve Semantic Ambiguity of LLM Prompt
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly utilized in various complex reasoning tasks due to their excellent instruction following capability. However, the model's performance is highly dependent on the open-ended characteristics of the users' input prompt. Natural prompts often do not follow proper syntactic rules, which creates ambiguous queries that yield multiple interpretations. Such ambiguous prompts confuse the model in choosing the correct reasoning paths to answer questions. Prior works address this challenge by applying query editing during the LLM inference process without explicitly solving the root cause of the ambiguity. To address this limitation, we propose a pre-inference prompt optimization mechanism via explicit prompt disambiguation. Particularly, we identify semantic risks in the prompt, check their multi-perspective consistency, and resolve any semantic conflicts that arise. Finally, we organize the resolved ambiguities in a logically structured manner as a clean input to the LLM. By explicitly resolving semantic ambiguity, our method can produce a more focused attention distribution to the semantically essential tokens. We also leverage small language models (SLMs) as the main executor of prompt disambiguation to benefit from their efficient computation. Through comprehensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, we demonstrate that our method improves reasoning performance by 2.5 points at a cost of only \$0.02. Our study promotes explicit prompt disambiguation as an effective prompt optimization method without disturbing the internal mechanism of LLM inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种预推理提示消歧机制，利用小语言模型显式解决LLM提示中的语义歧义，提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM对用户输入提示的开放性高度敏感，自然提示常因缺乏语法规则而产生语义歧义，导致模型选择错误推理路径。现有方法在推理过程中编辑查询，未从根源解决歧义。
analysis.problem: 如何显式消除LLM输入提示中的语义歧义，以提升推理性能且不干扰模型内部机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自然提示的语义歧义会导致LLM注意力分布分散，影响推理正确性。
analysis.method: 预推理提示优化机制：识别提示中的语义风险，检查多视角一致性，解决语义冲突，并将消歧后的提示以逻辑结构化方式输入LLM。使用小语言模型作为消歧执行器以降低计算成本。
contributions: 提出显式提示消歧方法，从根源解决语义歧义问题。
利用小语言模型高效执行消歧，成本仅0.02美元，推理性能提升2.5个点。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了综合实验，结果显示方法提升推理性能2.5个点，成本仅0.02美元。
limitations: 可能依赖小语言模型的消歧能力，复杂歧义场景下效果未知。
未讨论消歧过程对LLM生成多样性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验显示成本低、效果好，与LLM提示优化方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种预推理提示消歧机制，利用小语言模型显式解决LLM提示中的语义歧义，提升推理性能。

papers.title: Knowledge Lever Risk Management for Software Engineering: A Stochastic Framework for Mitigating Knowledge Loss
papers.abstract: Software engineering (SE) organizations operate in a knowledge-intensive domain where critical assets -- architectural expertise, design rationale, and system intuition -- are overwhelmingly tacit and volatile. The departure of key contributors or the decay of undocumented decisions can severely impair project velocity and software quality. While conventional SE risk management optimized for schedule and budget is common, the intangible knowledge risks that determine project success remain under-represented. The goal of this research work is to propose and evaluate the Knowledge Lever Risk Management (KLRM) Framework, designed specifically for the software development lifecycle. The primary objectives are to: (1) recast intangible knowledge assets as active mechanisms for risk mitigation (Knowledge Levers); (2) integrate these levers into a structured four-phase architecture (Audit, Alignment, Activation, Assurance); and (3) provide a formal stochastic model to quantify the impact of lever activation on project knowledge capital. We detail the application of these levers through software-specific practices such as pair programming, architectural decision records (ADRs), and LLM-assisted development. Stochastic Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that full lever activation increases expected knowledge capital by 63.8\% and virtually eliminates knowledge crisis probability. Our research shows that knowledge lever activation improves alignment across the project management iron triangle (scope, time, cost) by reducing rework and rediscovery costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识杠杆风险管理框架，通过随机建模量化知识资本，模拟显示完全激活可提升63.8%知识资本并消除知识危机概率。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件工程中关键知识资产（如架构专长、设计决策）多为隐性且易流失，传统风险管理忽视知识风险，导致项目效率和质量受损。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对软件工程知识流失风险的量化管理框架，现有方法未将知识资产作为主动风险缓解机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出KLRM框架，包含审计、对齐、激活、保证四阶段，将知识资产视为杠杆，结合随机模型和蒙特卡洛模拟量化杠杆激活对知识资本的影响。
contributions: 将隐性知识资产重新定义为主动风险缓解机制（知识杠杆）。
提出四阶段架构（审计、对齐、激活、保证）并集成到软件开发生命周期。
提供形式化随机模型量化知识杠杆激活对项目知识资本的影响。
analysis.experiments: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟验证，显示完全杠杆激活使预期知识资本增加63.8%，并几乎消除知识危机概率。
limitations: 模拟基于假设参数，实际应用需校准。
未讨论不同组织规模或领域的适用性差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 与机器学习核心方向关联弱，属于软件工程知识管理，方法创新中等，模拟实验有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识杠杆风险管理框架，通过随机建模量化知识资本，模拟显示完全激活可提升63.8%知识资本并消除知识危机概率。

papers.title: Why Architecture Choice Matters in Symbolic Regression
papers.abstract: Symbolic regression discovers mathematical formulas from data. Some methods fix a tree of operators, assign learnable weights, and train by gradient descent. The tree's structure, which determines what operators and variables appear at each position, is chosen once and applied to every target. This paper tests whether that choice affects which targets are actually recovered. Three structures are compared, all sharing the same operator and target language but differing in how variables enter the tree; one is strictly more expressive. Across over 12,700 training runs, one structure recovers a target at 100% while another scores 0%, and the ranking reverses on a different target. Expressiveness guarantees that a solution exists in the search space, but not that gradient descent finds it: the most expressive structure fails on targets that a restricted alternative solves reliably. Switching the operator changes which targets succeed; reversing its gradient profile collapses recovery entirely. Balanced (non-chain) tree shapes are never recovered. These findings show that the optimization landscape, not expressiveness alone, determines what gradient-based symbolic regression recovers.

analysis.tldr: 符号回归中，树结构的选择比表达能力更关键，梯度下降的优化景观决定了恢复效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 符号回归旨在从数据中发现数学公式，但现有方法固定树结构后通过梯度下降训练，结构选择对恢复目标的影响未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 探究符号回归中树结构（如变量输入方式、算子选择、树形状）对梯度下降恢复目标公式能力的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同树结构在相同目标上恢复率差异巨大（0% vs 100%），且表达能力最强的结构并非最优；算子梯度轮廓反转会完全破坏恢复；平衡树形状从未被恢复。
analysis.method: 对比三种树结构（变量输入方式不同），在相同算子和目标语言下进行超过12,700次训练实验。
contributions: 揭示树结构选择对梯度下降符号回归恢复效果的显著影响，而非仅表达能力。
发现优化景观（而非表达能力）是决定恢复的关键因素。
analysis.experiments: 超过12,700次训练运行，比较三种树结构在不同目标上的恢复率，并测试算子切换和梯度轮廓反转的影响。
limitations: 仅针对特定算子和目标语言，可能不适用于更广泛的符号回归设置。
未提供理论分析解释优化景观差异的根源。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 实验设计系统，发现反直觉现象，但领域较窄，对当前重点方向（VLM/LLM等）直接相关性低。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 符号回归中，树结构的选择比表达能力更关键，梯度下降的优化景观决定了恢复效果。

papers.title: Scalable LLM-based Coding of Dialogue in Healthcare Simulation: Balancing Coding Performance, Processing Time, and Environmental Impact
papers.abstract: Research shows that dialogue, the interactive process through which participants articulate their thinking, plays a central role in constructing shared understanding, coordinating action, and shaping learning outcomes in teams. Analysing dialogue content has been central to advancing team learning theory and informing the design of computer-supported collaborative learning environments, yet this progress has depended on labour-intensive qualitative coding. LLMs offer new possibilities for automating and enhancing the dialogue layer within emerging multimodal learning analytics approaches, with recent studies showing that they can approximate human coding through few-shot prompting. However, prior work has focused on replicating human coding accuracy for research purposes, rather than addressing a more educationally consequential question: how can we design prompts that allow an LLM to label team dialogue accurately and fast enough to be useful in real settings, such as in-person healthcare simulations, where results must be returned quickly and computational cost and sustainability also matter? This paper investigates how prompt design and batching strategies can be optimised to balance coding accuracy, processing time, and environmental impact in team-based healthcare simulation debriefing. Using a dataset of 11,647 utterances coded across 6 dialogue constructs, we compared 4 prompt designs across varying batch sizes, evaluating coding performance, processing time, and energy consumption, as well as the trade-offs between these metrics. Results indicate that increasing batch size improves speed and reduces energy use, but negatively impacts coding performance. Beyond demonstrating the feasibility of LLM-based qualitative analysis, this study offers practical guidance for scaling dialogue analytics in contexts where timeliness, privacy, and sustainability are critical.

analysis.tldr: 研究如何通过优化提示设计和批处理策略，平衡LLM在医疗模拟团队对话编码中的准确性、处理时间和环境影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 团队对话分析对学习理论至关重要，但传统人工编码耗时费力；LLM虽能通过少样本提示近似人工编码，但现有研究仅关注研究场景下的准确性，未解决实际教育场景（如医疗模拟）中需要快速、低成本且环保的实时编码需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计提示和批处理策略，使LLM在医疗模拟团队对话编码中同时实现高准确性、快速处理、低能耗和可持续性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 增加批处理大小可提升速度和降低能耗，但会损害编码性能；不同提示设计在准确性和效率间存在权衡。
analysis.method: 比较4种提示设计（不同批处理大小）在11647条话语（6种对话结构）上的编码性能、处理时间和能耗，分析指标间的权衡。
contributions: 系统评估了提示设计和批处理策略对LLM对话编码准确性、速度和能耗的影响
提供了在时间敏感、隐私和可持续性关键场景中扩展对话分析的实际指导
analysis.experiments: 使用11647条话语数据集（6种对话结构），比较4种提示设计在不同批处理大小下的编码性能、处理时间和能耗。
limitations: 仅针对医疗模拟场景，泛化性需验证
未涉及隐私保护或模型微调等替代方案

papers.title: AI-Assisted Code Review as a Scaffold for Code Quality and Self-Regulated Learning: An Experience Report
papers.abstract: Code review is central to software engineering education but hard to scale in capstone projects due to tight deadlines, uneven peer feedback, and limited prior experience. We investigate an LLM-as-reviewer integrated directly into GitHub pull requests (human-in-the-loop) across two cohorts (more than 100 students, 2023--2024). Using a mixed-methods design -- GitHub data, reflective reports, and a targeted survey -- we examine engagement and responsiveness as behavioral indicators of self-regulated learning processes. Quantitatively, the 2024 cohort produced more iterative activity (1176 vs. 581 PRs), while technical issues observed in 2023 (227 failed AI attempts) dropped to zero after tool and instructional refinements. Despite different adoption levels (93\% vs. 50\% of teams using the tool), responsiveness was stable: 32\% (2023) and 33\% (2024) of successfully AI-reviewed PRs were followed by subsequent commits on the same PR. Qualitatively, students used the LLM's structured comments to focus reviews and discuss code quality, while guidance reduced over-reliance. We contribute: (i) an in-workflow design for an AI reviewer that scaffolds learning while mitigating cognitive offloading; (ii) a repeated cross sectional comparison across two cohorts in authentic settings; (iii) a mixed-methods analysis combining objective GitHub metrics with student self-reports; and (iv) evidence-based pedagogical recommendations for responsible, student-led AI-assisted review.

analysis.tldr: 将LLM作为代码审查助手集成到GitHub PR中，在两年课程中验证其对学生代码质量和自我调节学习的促进作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件工程教育中代码审查难以规模化，尤其在毕业设计项目中面临截止日期紧、同伴反馈不均、学生经验不足等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并评估一个LLM驱动的代码审查工具，使其既能辅助代码质量提升，又能促进学生的自我调节学习，同时避免过度依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2024届学生产生了更多迭代活动（1176 vs 581个PR），技术问题从2023年的227次失败降至0次；不同采用率下（93% vs 50%），响应率稳定在32%-33%。
analysis.method: 将LLM审查者直接集成到GitHub拉取请求中（人在回路），结合教学指导，通过混合方法（GitHub数据、反思报告、调查）评估。
contributions: 提出一种工作流内AI审查设计，在脚手架学习的同时减轻认知卸载
在真实环境中进行两个年级的重复横截面比较
结合客观GitHub指标与学生自我报告的混合方法分析
提供基于证据的、负责任的学生主导AI辅助审查教学建议
analysis.experiments: 在两个年级（2023-2024，超过100名学生）中开展，使用GitHub数据、反思报告和调查进行混合方法分析。
limitations: 样本来自同一所大学的两届学生，可能限制泛化性
未控制其他教学因素变化对结果的影响

papers.title: Micro-Expression-Aware Avatar Fingerprinting via Inter-Frame Feature Differencing
papers.abstract: Avatar fingerprinting, i.e., verifying who drives a synthetic talking-head video rather than whether it is real, is a critical safeguard for authorized use of face-reenactment technology. Existing methods rely on a fixed, non-differentiable landmark extraction stage that prevents the fingerprinting model from being optimized end-to-end from raw pixels. We propose a preprocessing-free system built on a micro-expression-aware backbone operating on raw video frames, with inter-frame feature differencing as the core design principle: consecutive feature maps are subtracted in the learned deep feature space, so that temporally stable appearance dimensions contribute zero to the output while driver-specific motion dynamics are preserved. A controlled ablation on NVFAIR confirms that temporal motion accounts for the large majority of discriminative performance, and that raw appearance features actively degrade identity separation. Both the choice of backbone and the differencing principle are essential: differencing alone is insufficient when applied to a generic encoder, as appearance-dominated features collapse to near-identical representations across adjacent frames, while the micro-expression-aware F5C backbone retains measurable motion variation that the differencing operation can exploit. Without any external preprocessing, our model achieves an overall AUC of 0.877 on NVFAIR and matches or exceeds the landmark-based baseline on the majority of cross-generator pairs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于帧间特征差分的微表情感知头像指纹识别方法，无需预处理即可端到端优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有头像指纹识别方法依赖固定的、不可微的地标提取阶段，无法从原始像素端到端优化，限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用外部预处理的情况下，从原始视频帧中有效提取驱动者特有的运动动态，实现头像指纹识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验表明，时间运动贡献了大部分判别性能，而原始外观特征会主动降低身份分离效果；通用编码器上仅使用差分会导致外观主导的特征在相邻帧间坍塌为几乎相同的表示，而微表情感知骨干能保留可测量的运动变化。
analysis.method: 基于微表情感知骨干（F5C）处理原始视频帧，在学习的深度特征空间中对连续特征图进行差分，使时间稳定的外观维度输出为零，保留驱动者特有的运动动态。
contributions: 提出无需预处理的端到端头像指纹识别系统，基于帧间特征差分设计。
通过消融实验证明时间运动是判别性能的主要来源，外观特征有害。
在NVFAIR上达到0.877 AUC，匹配或超越基于地标的基线。
analysis.experiments: 在NVFAIR数据集上进行消融实验和跨生成器对评估，AUC为0.877。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
微表情感知骨干的通用性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验规模较小，应用场景较窄。

papers.title: Semantic Denial of Service in LLM-controlled robots
papers.abstract: Safety-oriented instruction-following is supposed to keep LLM-controlled robots safe. We show it also creates an availability attack surface. By injecting short safety-plausible phrases (1-5 tokens) into a robots audio channel, an adversary can trigger the models safety reasoning to halt or disrupt execution without jailbreaking the model or overriding its policy. In the embodied setting, this is a semantic denial-of-service attack: the agent stops because the injected signal looks like a legitimate alert. Across four vision-language models, seven prompt-level defenses, three deployment modes, and single- and multi-injection settings, we find that prompt-only defenses trade off attack suppression against genuine hazard response. The strongest defenses reduce hard-stop attack success on some models, but defenses change the form of disruption, not its fact: suppressed hard stops re-emerge as acknowledge loops and false alerts, which we measure with Disruption Success Rate (DSR). We further find that injection variety is consistently more effective than repeating the same phrase, suggesting that models treat diverse safety cues as corroborating evidence. The practical implication is architectural rather than prompt-level: systems that route unauthenticated audio text directly into the LLM create an avoidable security dependency between safety monitoring and action selection.

analysis.tldr: LLM控制机器人中，安全指令遵循机制被利用为语义拒绝服务攻击，注入短安全短语即可中断执行。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM控制机器人的安全指令遵循机制旨在保障安全，但可能被恶意利用，造成可用性攻击。
analysis.problem: 安全指令遵循机制在机器人场景下存在语义拒绝服务攻击漏洞，注入短安全短语即可导致任务中断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注入短安全短语可触发模型安全推理，导致硬停止、确认循环或误报，且注入多样性比重复更有效。
analysis.method: 通过注入1-5个token的安全相关短语到机器人音频通道，测试多种VLM、防御策略和部署模式下的攻击效果。
contributions: 揭示LLM控制机器人中安全指令遵循机制可被利用为语义拒绝服务攻击。
提出Disruption Success Rate (DSR)指标量化攻击效果，并发现防御仅改变中断形式而非消除。
analysis.experiments: 在四种视觉-语言模型、七种提示级防御、三种部署模式以及单次和多次注入设置下进行实验。
limitations: 仅针对特定VLM和防御策略，未覆盖所有可能模型。
未探讨架构级防御的具体实现。

analysis.reason: 发现新颖的安全漏洞，实验系统，对LLM机器人安全有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM控制机器人中，安全指令遵循机制被利用为语义拒绝服务攻击，注入短安全短语即可中断执行。

papers.title: Training Machine Learning Models on Encrypted Data: A Privacy-Preserving Framework using Homomorphic Encryption
papers.abstract: The use of Machine Learning (ML) for data-driven decision-making often relies on access to sensitive datasets, which introduces privacy challenges. Traditional encryption methods protect data at rest or in transit but fail to secure it during processing, exposing it to unauthorized access. Homomorphic encryption emerges as a transformative solution, enabling computations on encrypted data without decryption, thus preserving confidentiality throughout the ML pipeline. This paper addresses the challenge of training ML models on encrypted data while maintaining accuracy and efficiency by proposing a proof-of-concept for a privacy-preserving framework that leverages Cheon-Kim-Kim-Song (CKKS) for approximate real-number arithmetic. Also, it demonstrates the feasibility of training K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) and linear regression models on encrypted data, and evaluates encrypted inference for a basic Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) architecture. Experimental results show that models trained under Homomorphic encryption achieve performance metrics comparable to plaintext-trained models, validating the approach. However, challenges such as computational overhead, noise management, and limited support for non-polynomial operations persist. This work lays the groundwork for broader adoption of privacy-preserving ML in real-world applications, balancing security with computational feasibility.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于同态加密的隐私保护框架，在加密数据上训练KNN和线性回归模型，性能与明文训练相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统加密方法无法保护数据处理中的隐私，同态加密虽能解决但面临计算开销和精度挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在加密数据上高效训练ML模型并保持准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用CKKS同态加密方案，在加密数据上训练KNN和线性回归，并评估加密MLP推理。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于同态加密的隐私保护框架，在加密数据上训练KNN和线性回归模型，性能与明文训练相当。

papers.title: AdaMamba: Adaptive Frequency-Gated Mamba for Long-Term Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Accurate long-term time series forecasting (LTSF) requires the capture of complex long-range dependencies and dynamic periodic patterns. Recent advances in frequency-domain analysis offer a global perspective for uncovering temporal characteristics. However, real-world time series often exhibit pronounced cross-domain heterogeneity where variables that appear synchronized in the time domain can differ substantially in the frequency domain. Existing frequency-based LTSF methods often rely on implicit assumptions of cross-domain homogeneity, which limits their ability to adapt to such intricate variability. To effectively integrate frequency-domain analysis with temporal dependency learning, we propose AdaMamba, a novel framework that endogenizes adaptive and context-aware frequency analysis within the Mamba state-space update process. Specifically, AdaMamba introduces an interactive patch encoding module to capture inter-variable interaction dynamics. Then, we develop an adaptive frequency-gated state-space module that generates input-dependent frequency bases, and generalizes the conventional temporal forgetting gate into a unified time-frequency forgetting gate. This allows dynamic calibration of state transitions based on learned frequency-domain importance, while preserving Mamba's capability in modeling long-range dependencies. Extensive experiments on seven public LTSF benchmarks and two domain-specific datasets demonstrate that AdaMamba consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in forecasting accu racy while maintaining competitive computational efficiency. The code of AdaMamba is available at https://github.com/XDjiang25/AdaMamba.

analysis.tldr: AdaMamba通过自适应频率门控机制将频域分析融入Mamba状态空间模型，提升长期时间序列预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 长期时间序列预测需要捕捉复杂长程依赖和动态周期模式，但现有频域方法假设跨域同质性，难以适应真实数据中变量在时域同步但频域差异大的异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合频域分析与时序依赖学习，以处理时间序列的跨域异质性并提升长期预测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实时间序列存在跨域异质性：变量在时域看似同步，但在频域特征差异显著，现有频域方法因隐含同质性假设而性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出AdaMamba框架，包含交互式补丁编码模块捕获变量间交互，以及自适应频率门控状态空间模块，生成输入依赖的频率基，并将传统时域遗忘门扩展为时频遗忘门，实现基于频域重要性的动态状态校准。
contributions: 提出自适应频率门控状态空间模块，将频域分析内生到Mamba更新过程中，实现上下文感知的频率分析。
设计交互式补丁编码模块，有效捕获多变量时间序列的变量间交互动态。
在多个公开基准和领域特定数据集上取得SOTA预测精度，同时保持计算效率。
analysis.experiments: 在7个公开LTSF基准和2个领域特定数据集上进行实验，AdaMamba在预测精度上持续优于现有方法，且计算效率具有竞争力。
limitations: 摘要未提及对超长序列或极高维数据的扩展性分析。
频率门控机制的可解释性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，将频域分析与Mamba结合，实验充分且效果显著，与时间序列预测方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AdaMamba通过自适应频率门控机制将频域分析融入Mamba状态空间模型，提升长期时间序列预测精度。

papers.title: Hiding in Plain Sight: Detectability-Aware Antidistillation of Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Distillation via sampling reasoning traces exposes closed-source frontier models to adversarial third parties who can bypass their guardrails and misappropriate their capabilities. Antidistillation methods aim to address this by poisoning reasoning traces to hinder student model learning while preserving teacher performance. However, current methods overlook detectability, both semantic and syntactic, which erodes trust in the teacher's outputs and signals the defense's presence to adversaries. We address this gap by formulating antidistillation as a Stackelberg game whose constraint set explicitly encodes detectability, and show that perturbing sparingly offers an effective, less detectable alternative to poisoning the full trace. Drawing on mechanistic interpretability, we identify thought anchors, sentences with disproportionate counterfactual influence on model outputs, as a principled sparse target: critical to reasoning yet minimally detectable. We instantiate this in TraceGuard, a training-free, black-box proof-of-concept that locates thought anchors via branching-token detection and poisons them to degrade student distillation while preserving trace coherence.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种可检测性感知的反蒸馏方法TraceGuard，通过稀疏扰动推理轨迹中的关键句（thought anchors）来保护教师模型，同时保持输出自然性。
analysis.research_motivation: 蒸馏技术使闭源前沿模型面临被第三方窃取能力的风险，现有反蒸馏方法忽略了对检测性的考虑，导致输出异常易被识别，从而暴露防御机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持教师模型输出自然性和低检测性的前提下，有效阻止学生模型通过蒸馏学习推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有反蒸馏方法（如全轨迹投毒）会引入语义和句法上的可检测性，破坏教师输出的可信度，并暴露防御存在。
analysis.method: 将反蒸馏建模为Stackelberg博弈，显式编码可检测性约束；利用机制可解释性识别推理轨迹中具有高反事实影响的句子（thought anchors），通过分支token检测定位并稀疏扰动这些锚点，实现训练无关的黑盒防御。
contributions: 首次将可检测性纳入反蒸馏问题形式化，提出Stackelberg博弈框架。
引入thought anchors概念，作为稀疏且低检测性的扰动目标。
实现TraceGuard原型，无需训练、黑盒操作，在保持轨迹连贯性的同时有效降低学生模型蒸馏效果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确推理链的模型，对非链式推理模型效果未知。
thought anchors的识别依赖于分支token检测，可能受模型架构影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合博弈论与可解释性解决反蒸馏中的检测性问题，但缺乏实验验证，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可检测性感知的反蒸馏方法TraceGuard，通过稀疏扰动推理轨迹中的关键句（thought anchors）来保护教师模型，同时保持输出自然性。

papers.title: Toward Polymorphic Backdoor against Semantic Communication via Intensity-Based Poisoning
papers.abstract: Semantic Communication (SC) backdoor attacks aim to utilize triggers to manipulate the system into producing predetermined outputs via backdoored shared knowledge. Current SC backdoors adopt monomorphic paradigms with single attack target, which suffers from limited attack diversity, efficiency, and flexibility in heterogeneous downstream scenarios. To overcome the limitations, we propose SemBugger, a polymorphic SC backdoor. By dynamically adjusting the trigger intensity, SemBugger finely-grained controls over the SC knowledge to generate diverse malicious results from the system. Specifically, SemBugger is realized through a multi-effect poisoning-training framework. It introduces graded-intensity triggers to poison training data and optimizes SC systems with hierarchical malicious loss. The trained system's knowledge dynamically adapts to trigger intensity in inputs to yield target outputs, all while preserving transmission fidelity for benign samples. Moreover, to augment SC security, we propose a provable robustness defense that resists SemBugger's homogeneous attacks through a controlled noise mechanism. It operates via strategically adding noise in SC inputs, and we formally provide a theoretical lower bound on the defense efficacy. Experiments across diverse SC models and benchmark datasets indicate that SemBugger attains high attack efficacy while maintaining the regular functionality of SC systems. Meanwhile, the designed defense effectively neutralizes SemBugger attacks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于强度中毒的多态后门攻击方法SemBugger，通过动态调整触发强度实现对语义通信系统的细粒度恶意控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义通信后门攻击采用单形态范式，攻击目标单一，在异构下游场景中攻击多样性、效率和灵活性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种多态后门攻击方法，通过动态调整触发强度实现对语义通信系统的细粒度恶意控制，并同时提出可证明鲁棒的防御机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SemBugger，通过多效应中毒训练框架，引入分级强度触发器污染训练数据，并利用分层恶意损失优化语义通信系统，使系统知识动态适应输入中的触发强度以产生目标输出。同时提出一种基于可控噪声机制的防御方法，通过策略性添加噪声并给出防御效果的理论下界。
contributions: 提出SemBugger，一种多态语义通信后门攻击方法，通过动态调整触发强度实现细粒度恶意控制。
设计多效应中毒训练框架，包括分级强度触发器和分层恶意损失。
提出一种可证明鲁棒的防御机制，通过可控噪声抵抗同质攻击，并提供理论下界。
analysis.experiments: 在多种语义通信模型和基准数据集上实验，表明SemBugger在保持系统正常功能的同时实现了高攻击效能，且设计的防御有效中和了SemBugger攻击。
limitations: 防御机制仅针对同质攻击，对异质攻击的鲁棒性未知。
攻击和防御方法可能仅在特定语义通信架构上有效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出多态后门攻击新范式，方法有创新性且包含理论防御，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于强度中毒的多态后门攻击方法SemBugger，通过动态调整触发强度实现对语义通信系统的细粒度恶意控制。

papers.title: Discovering Agentic Safety Specifications from 1-Bit Danger Signals
papers.abstract: Can large language model agents discover hidden safety objectives through experience alone? We introduce EPO-Safe (Experiential Prompt Optimization for Safe Agents), a framework where an LLM iteratively generates action plans, receives sparse binary danger warnings, and evolves a natural language behavioral specification through reflection. Unlike standard LLM reflection methods that rely on rich textual feedback (e.g., compiler errors or detailed environment responses), EPO-Safe demonstrates that LLMs can perform safety reasoning from a strictly impoverished signal in structured, low-dimensional environments: the agent never observes the hidden performance function $R^*$, only a single bit per timestep indicating that an action was unsafe. We evaluate on five AI Safety Gridworlds (Leike et al., 2017) and five text-based scenario analogs where visible reward $R$ may diverge from $R^*$. EPO-Safe discovers safe behavior within 1-2 rounds (5-15 episodes), producing human-readable specifications with correct explanatory hypotheses about hazards (e.g., "X cells are directionally hazardous: entering from the north is dangerous"). Critically, we show that standard reward-driven reflection actively degrades safety: agents reflecting on reward alone use the loop to justify and accelerate reward hacking, proving that reflection must be paired with a dedicated safety channel to discover hidden constraints. We further evaluate robustness to noisy oracles: even when 50% of non-dangerous steps produce spurious warnings, mean safety performance degrades by only 15% on average, though sensitivity is environment-dependent, as cross-episode reflection naturally filters inconsistent signals. Each evolved specification functions as an auditable set of grounded behavioral rules discovered autonomously through interaction, rather than authored by humans as in Constitutional AI (Bai et al., 2022).

analysis.tldr: 提出EPO-Safe框架，仅凭1比特危险信号即可让LLM智能体自主发现安全规范。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM反思方法依赖丰富文本反馈，但在安全关键场景中，智能体可能只能获得稀疏的二进制危险信号，缺乏明确的安全目标。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM智能体仅通过稀疏的二进制危险信号（而非详细反馈）自主发现隐藏的安全规范。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准奖励驱动反思会降低安全性，智能体利用反思循环合理化并加速奖励黑客行为；而EPO-Safe通过专用安全通道能有效过滤噪声信号。
analysis.method: EPO-Safe框架：LLM迭代生成行动计划，接收稀疏二进制危险警告，通过反思演化自然语言行为规范。
contributions: 提出EPO-Safe框架，证明LLM能从1比特危险信号中推理安全规范。
发现标准奖励驱动反思会降低安全性，需专用安全通道。
在AI Safety Gridworlds和文本场景中验证，1-2轮内发现安全行为，且规范可审计。
analysis.experiments: 在5个AI Safety Gridworlds和5个文本场景中评估，EPO-Safe在1-2轮（5-15个episode）内发现安全行为；即使50%非危险步骤产生虚假警告，平均安全性能仅下降15%。
limitations: 实验环境为结构化低维空间，高维复杂环境效果未知。
噪声鲁棒性依赖环境，部分环境敏感度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对安全对齐方向有重要启示，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EPO-Safe框架，仅凭1比特危险信号即可让LLM智能体自主发现安全规范。

papers.title: StoryTR: Narrative-Centric Video Temporal Retrieval with Theory of Mind Reasoning
papers.abstract: Current video moment retrieval excels at action-centric tasks but struggles with narrative content. Models can see \textit{what is happening} but fail to reason \textit{why it matters}. This semantic gap stems from the lack of \textbf{Theory of Mind (ToM)}: the cognitive ability to infer implicit intentions, mental states, and narrative causality from surface-level observations. We introduce \textbf{StoryTR}, the first video moment retrieval benchmark requiring ToM reasoning, comprising 8.1k samples from narrative short-form videos (shorts/reels). These videos present an ideal testbed. Their high information density encodes meaning through subtle multimodal cues. For instance, a glance paired with a sigh carries entirely different semantics than the glance alone. Yet multimodal perception alone is insufficient; ToM is required to decode that a character ``smiling'' may actually be ``concealing hostility.'' To teach models this reasoning capability, we propose an \textbf{Agentic Data Pipeline} that generates training data with explicit three-tier ToM chains (intent decoding, narrative reasoning, boundary localization). Experiments reveal the severity of the reasoning gap: Gemini-3.0-Pro achieves only 0.53 Avg IoU on StoryTR. However, our 7B \textbf{Shorts-Moment} model, trained on ToM-guided data, improves +15.1\% relative IoU over baselines, demonstrating that \textit{narrative reasoning capability matters more than parameter scale}.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个需要心智理论推理的视频时刻检索基准StoryTR，并构建ToM引导数据训练模型，显著提升叙事理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频时刻检索擅长动作识别，但无法理解叙事中的隐含意图、心理状态和因果逻辑，存在语义鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 视频时刻检索缺乏心智理论推理能力，无法从表面观察推断深层叙事意义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多模态感知不足以理解叙事，例如微笑可能掩盖敌意，需要ToM解码；Gemini-3.0-Pro在StoryTR上仅0.53 Avg IoU，表明现有模型推理能力严重不足。
analysis.method: 提出StoryTR基准（8.1k样本）和Agentic Data Pipeline，生成包含三层ToM链（意图解码、叙事推理、边界定位）的训练数据，并训练Shorts-Moment模型。
contributions: 首个要求心智理论推理的视频时刻检索基准StoryTR
Agentic Data Pipeline生成显式ToM链训练数据
Shorts-Moment模型在ToM引导数据上训练，相对IoU提升15.1%
analysis.experiments: 在StoryTR基准上评估，Gemini-3.0-Pro仅0.53 Avg IoU，Shorts-Moment模型相对基线提升15.1% IoU。
limitations: 仅针对短视频（shorts/reels），可能不适用于长视频或电影
ToM链生成依赖Agentic Pipeline，可能引入噪声或偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 创新性高（首个ToM视频检索基准），实验显示显著提升，但方法细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个需要心智理论推理的视频时刻检索基准StoryTR，并构建ToM引导数据训练模型，显著提升叙事理解能力。

papers.title: AnalogRetriever: Learning Cross-Modal Representations for Analog Circuit Retrieval
papers.abstract: Analog circuit design relies heavily on reusing existing intellectual property (IP), yet searching across heterogeneous representations such as SPICE netlists, schematics, and functional descriptions remains challenging. Existing methods are largely limited to exact matching within a single modality, failing to capture cross-modal semantic relationships. To bridge this gap, we present AnalogRetriever, a unified tri-modal retrieval framework for analog circuit search. We first build a high-quality dataset on top of Masala-CHAI through a two-stage repair pipeline that raises the netlist compile rate from 22\% to 100\%. Built on this foundation, AnalogRetriever encodes schematics and descriptions with a vision-language model and netlists with a port-aware relational graph convolutional network, mapping all three modalities into a shared embedding space via curriculum contrastive learning. Experiments show that AnalogRetriever achieves an average Recall@1 of 75.2\% across all six cross-modal retrieval directions, significantly outperforming existing baselines. When integrated into the AnalogCoder agentic framework as a retrieval-augmented generation module, it consistently improves functional pass rates and enables previously unsolved tasks to be completed. Our code and dataset will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一三模态检索框架AnalogRetriever，用于模拟电路跨模态搜索，显著提升检索性能并增强下游任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟电路设计依赖复用现有IP，但SPICE网表、原理图和功能描述等异构表示间的搜索困难，现有方法局限于单模态精确匹配，无法捕捉跨模态语义关系。
analysis.problem: 如何实现模拟电路在网表、原理图和功能描述三种模态间的统一检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建高质量数据集（通过两阶段修复流水线将网表编译率从22%提升至100%），使用视觉-语言模型编码原理图和描述，使用端口感知关系图卷积网络编码网表，通过课程对比学习将三种模态映射到共享嵌入空间。
contributions: 提出AnalogRetriever，首个统一三模态模拟电路检索框架。
构建高质量数据集，将网表编译率从22%提升至100%。
在六种跨模态检索方向上平均Recall@1达75.2%，显著优于基线。
集成到AnalogCoder智能体框架中作为检索增强生成模块，提升功能通过率并解决先前未完成任务。
analysis.experiments: 在Masala-CHAI数据集上评估，六种跨模态检索方向平均Recall@1为75.2%，优于现有基线；集成到AnalogCoder后提升功能通过率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于模拟电路领域，泛化性未知。
依赖高质量数据集构建，修复流水线可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（三模态统一检索+课程对比学习）且实验充分，但领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一三模态检索框架AnalogRetriever，用于模拟电路跨模态搜索，显著提升检索性能并增强下游任务。

papers.title: From Coarse to Fine: Self-Adaptive Hierarchical Planning for LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model-based agents have recently emerged as powerful approaches for solving dynamic and multi-step tasks. Most existing agents employ planning mechanisms to guide long-term actions in dynamic environments. However, current planning approaches face a fundamental limitation that they operate at a fixed granularity level. Specifically, they either provide excessive detail for simple tasks or insufficient detail for complex ones, failing to achieve an optimal balance between simplicity and complexity. Drawing inspiration from the principle of \textit{progressive refinement} in cognitive science, we propose \textbf{AdaPlan-H}, a self-adaptive hierarchical planning mechanism that mimics human planning strategies. Our method initiates with a coarse-grained macro plan and progressively refines it based on task complexity. It generates self-adaptive hierarchical plans tailored to the varying difficulty levels of different tasks, which can be optimized by imitation learning and capability enhancement. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly improves task execution success rates while mitigating overplanning at the planning level, providing a flexible and efficient solution for multi-step complex decision-making tasks. To contribute to the community, our code and data will be made publicly available at https://github.com/import-myself/AHP.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应分层规划机制AdaPlan-H，从粗到细逐步细化任务计划，平衡简单与复杂任务的规划粒度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent规划方法在固定粒度下工作，要么对简单任务过度规划，要么对复杂任务规划不足，缺乏灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM Agent根据任务复杂度自适应调整规划粒度，实现从粗到细的分层规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AdaPlan-H，模仿人类渐进细化策略，先生成粗粒度宏计划，再根据任务复杂度逐步细化，生成自适应分层计划，并通过模仿学习和能力增强优化。
contributions: 提出自适应分层规划机制AdaPlan-H，实现从粗到细的规划粒度自适应调整。
通过模仿学习和能力增强优化分层计划，提升多步复杂决策任务的成功率并减少过度规划。
analysis.experiments: 在动态多步任务上验证，实验结果表明方法显著提升任务执行成功率并缓解过度规划。摘要未提供具体数据集和对比方法。
limitations: 可能依赖任务复杂度的准确评估。
在极端简单或复杂任务上的边界效果未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

papers.title: RAT: RunAnyThing via Fully Automated Environment Configuration
papers.abstract: Automating repository-level software engineering tasks is a foundational challenge for autonomous code agents, largely due to the difficulty of configuring executable environments. However, manual configuration remains a labor-intensive bottleneck, necessitating a transition toward fully automated environment configuration. Existing approaches often rely on pre-defined artifacts or are restricted to specific programming languages, limiting their applicability to real-world repositories. In this paper, we first propose RAT (RunAnyThing), a language-agnostic framework for automated environment configuration on arbitrary repositories. RAT features a multi-stage pipeline that integrates semantic initialization, a planning mechanism, specialized toolset, and a robust sandbox for configuration. Furthermore, to enable rigorous evaluation, we propose RATBench, a benchmark that reflects the the distribution and heterogeneity of real-world repositories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RAT achieves state-of-the-art performance, improving the Environment Setup Success Rate (ESSR) by an average of 29.6% over strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: RAT提出全自动环境配置框架，无需预定义工件或语言限制，显著提升仓库级软件工程任务的环境配置成功率。

papers.title: DyABD: The Abdominal Muscle Segmentation in Dynamic MRI Benchmark
papers.abstract: This work introduces DyABD, a novel and complex benchmark dataset of dynamic abdominal MRIs from patients with abdominal hernias and associated high quality abdominal muscle annotations. DyABD is the first-of-its-kind in four key ways; (1) it proposes the first abdominal muscle segmentation task, (2) the dynamic MRIs are acquired whilst the patients perform various exercises, introducing extreme anatomical variability, making it one of the most challenging segmentation datasets to date, (3) it includes both pre and post corrective MRIs and (4) DyABD promotes clinical research into the high recurrence rates of abdominal hernias. Beyond dataset introduction, this work provides a comprehensive evaluation of the generalisation capabilities of existing segmentation models across Supervised, Few Shot and Zero Shot paradigms on the unseen DyABD dataset. This work reveals that there is still room for substantial improvement in the field of medical image segmentation, with the majority of techniques achieving a Dice Coefficient of 0.82. This work therefore sheds light on the true progress of the field and redefines the benchmark for progress in medical image segmentation.

papers.title: Designing escalation criteria for international AI incident response: criteria, triggers, and thresholds
papers.abstract: AI incident reporting requirements are emerging in regulation and policy, yet no operational criteria exist for determining when a detected AI incident warrants escalation beyond national handling to international coordination. This paper proposes an escalation framework to address this gap, intended as a common reference point across jurisdictions that enables aligned escalation while preserving flexibility in how actors respond within their own legal and policy contexts. We review SB 53, the EU AI Act, the GPAI Code of Practice, and incident frameworks from other industries to derive eight criteria for assessing whether an incident warrants escalation, translated into a sequential flowchart with gated decision points and threshold checks. For each criterion, we map how it interplays with these regulatory frameworks, identifying where their design choices support or undermine effective detection. We test the framework against ten documented AI incidents and structured variants to identify where criteria under-detect or misclassify incidents in practice. We find three design patterns that may lead to systematic under-detection in regimes where model developers are responsible for escalation: a. where escalation requires confirmed harm, events such as model weight exfiltration risk detection only after severe, irreversible harm has propagated; b. where incidents are assessed individually, systemic harms emerging from accumulation risk being under-detected; and c. where thresholds align with legal instruments rather than quantitatively testable terms, criteria risk being impractical to apply under time pressure. We also find that escalation rules are only one component of a broader framework: the underlying definitions against which thresholds are set, and the data available to the responsible actor, create interdependencies that can themselves drive under-detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI国际事件升级响应标准框架，识别系统漏检模式。

papers.title: Cooperative Informative Sensing for Monitoring Dynamic Indoor Environments via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Monitoring human activity in indoor environments is important for applications such as facility management, safety assessment, and space utilization analysis. While mobile robot teams offer the potential to actively improve observation quality, existing multi-robot monitoring and active perception approaches typically rely on coverage or visitation based objectives that are weakly aligned with the accuracy requirements of human-centric monitoring tasks. In this work, we formulate cooperative active observation as a decentralized control problem in which multiple robots adjust their motion to directly optimize monitoring accuracy under partial observability. We propose a learning-based framework for cooperative policies from decentralized observations using multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), supported by an architecture that handles variable numbers of humans and temporal dependencies. Simulation results across diverse indoor environments and monitoring tasks show that the proposed approach consistently outperforms classical coverage, persistent monitoring, and learning-free multi-robot baselines, while remaining robust to changes in the number of observed humans.

papers.title: Judging the Judges: A Systematic Evaluation of Bias Mitigation Strategies in LLM-as-a-Judge Pipelines
papers.abstract: LLM-as-a-Judge has become the dominant paradigm for evaluating language model outputs, yet LLM judges exhibit systematic biases that compromise evaluation reliability. We present a comprehensive empirical study comparing nine debiasing strategies across five judge models from four provider families (Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, Meta), three benchmarks (MT-Bench n=400, LLMBar n=200, custom n=225), and four bias types. Our key findings: (1) Style bias is the dominant bias (0.76-0.92 across all models), far exceeding position bias (<= 0.04), yet has received minimal research attention. (2) All models show a conciseness preference on expansion pairs, but truncation controls confirm they correctly distinguish quality from length (0.92-1.00 accuracy), suggesting quality-sensitive evaluation rather than a simple length bias. (3) Debiasing is beneficial but model-dependent: the combined budget strategy significantly improves Claude Sonnet 4 by +11.2 pp (p < 0.0001), with directionally positive trends for other models. Only 2 of 20 non-baseline configurations show decreased agreement. We release our evaluation framework, controlled dataset, and all experimental artifacts at https://github.com/sksoumik/llm-as-judge.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估 LLM-as-a-Judge 中九种去偏策略，发现风格偏见是主要问题，去偏效果因模型而异。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM-as-a-Judge 已成为评估语言模型输出的主流范式，但 LLM 裁判存在系统性偏见，损害评估可靠性，亟需系统研究去偏策略的有效性。
analysis.problem: 系统比较九种去偏策略在多种 LLM 裁判模型、基准和偏见类型上的效果，并揭示偏见的主导类型和模型行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 风格偏见是主导偏见（0.76-0.92），远超位置偏见（≤0.04）；所有模型在扩展对上表现出简洁偏好，但截断控制确认它们能正确区分质量与长度（准确率0.92-1.00），表明是质量敏感评估而非简单长度偏见。
analysis.method: 在五个裁判模型（来自 Google、Anthropic、OpenAI、Meta）、三个基准（MT-Bench、LLMBar、自定义）和四种偏见类型上，系统比较九种去偏策略（包括预算策略、交换、校准等），并分析偏见分布和去偏效果。

发现模型对简洁性的偏好并非简单长度偏见，而是质量敏感评估。

papers.title: One Identity, Many Roles: Multimodal Entity Coreference for Enhanced Video Situation Recognition
papers.abstract: Video Situation Recognition (VidSitu) addresses the challenging problem of "who did what to whom, with what, how, and where" in a video. It tests thorough video understanding by requiring identification of salient actions and associated short descriptions for event roles across multiple events. Grounding with VidSitu requires spatio-temporal localization of key entities across shots and varied appearances. We posit that coherent video understanding requires consistent identification of entities that play different roles. We propose Multimodal Entity Coreference (MEC) to unite entity descriptions in text with grounding across the video. Towards this, we introduce CineMEC, a multi-stage approach that unites event role mention groups with visual clusters of entities, without explicit grounding supervision during training. Our approach is designed to exploit the synergy between visual grounding and captioning, where improving one influences the other and vice versa. For evaluation, we extend the VidSitu dataset with grounding annotations. While previous work focuses primarily on descriptions, CineMEC improves consistency across both: captioning (+2.5% CIDEr, +7% LEA) and visual grounding (+18% HOTA).

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态实体共指方法CineMEC，统一视频中实体描述与视觉定位，提升视频情境识别的一致性。

papers.title: A Topology fixated Shape Gradient Framework for Non Simple Boundary Extraction for CIE Lab color images with Repulsive Energy
papers.abstract: A levelset free but a hybrid image segmentation approach based on a modified version of the piece wise constant shape gradient of an Mumford Shah shape functional and a repulsive function is considered. The segmentation is performed a non-local shape based through an evolution of discrete curves driven by a non local shape based energy to segment images containing disjoint regions and multiple boundaries. This formulation has a novel additional component as a multivariable function dependent on a few sampled points of the curves that handles the occurrence of self intersection during boundary curves evolution. The method is applied to a few gray scale and color images, including images with nested structures and astronomical objects. The results indicate effective segmentation in complex scenarios with absolute control on the topology of the segments and self-intersections of the boundaries

papers.title: A satellite foundation model for improved wealth monitoring
papers.abstract: Poverty statistics guide social policy, but in many low- and middle-income countries, censuses and household surveys that collect these data are costly, infrequent, quickly outdated, and sometimes error-prone. Satellite imagery offers global coverage and the possibility of predicting economic livelihoods at scale, yet existing approaches to predicting livelihoods with imagery or other non-traditional data often fail to reliably identify local-level variation and, as we show, degrade under temporal shift. Here we introduce Tempov, a satellite foundation model pretrained by self-supervision on three million bi-temporal Landsat pairs and adapted with parameter-efficient fine-tuning to sparse survey labels. The model enables large-scale, high-resolution wealth mapping and dynamic measurement, including zero-shot nowcasting up to a decade after observed labels, retrospective hindcasting, and decadal change tracking, while outperforming existing neural network and geospatial foundation-model baselines. In low-label regimes, Tempov achieves competitive accuracy with only 10% of survey samples, indicating substantially reduced dependence on expensive label collection. The model further generalizes across populous countries within and outside Africa, and scales to a unified Africa-wide model with strong continent-level performance ($R^2=0.63$, $r^2=0.68$), from which we generate high-resolution decadal maps of wealth and wealth changes for the African continent. Analysis of these maps shows large variation in recent economic performance both within and across countries. Our open-source approach provides a pathway to timely, scalable, low-cost monitoring of wealth and poverty from routinely collected satellite data.

analysis.tldr: 提出卫星基础模型Tempov，通过自监督预训练和参数高效微调，实现高分辨率财富监测和动态变化追踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 贫困统计指导社会政策，但传统普查和家庭调查成本高、频率低、易过时且易出错；卫星图像提供全球覆盖，但现有方法难以可靠识别局部变化且随时间退化。

analysis.experiments: 在非洲大陆统一模型上达到R²=0.63, r²=0.68；低标签场景下仅用10%样本即达竞争精度；零样本预测可外推至十年后。

papers.title: BSViT: A Burst Spiking Vision Transformer for Expressive and Efficient Visual Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Spiking Vision Transformers (S-ViTs) offer a promising framework for energy-efficient visual learning. However, existing designs remain limited by two fundamental issues: the restricted information capacity of binary spike coding and the dense token interactions introduced by global self-attention. To address these challenges, this work proposes BSViT, a burst spiking-driven Vision Transformer featuring a Dual-Channel Burst Spiking Self-Attention (DBSSA) mechanism. DBSSA encodes queries with binary spikes and keys with burst spikes to enhance representational capacity. The value pathway adopts dual excitatory and inhibitory binary channels, enabling signed modulation and richer spike interactions. Importantly, the entire attention operation preserves addition-only computation, ensuring compatibility with energy-efficient neuromorphic hardware. To further reduce spike activity and incorporate spatial priors, a patch adjacency masking strategy is introduced to restrict attention to local neighborhoods, resulting in structure-aware sparsity and reduced computational overhead. In addition, burst spike coding is systematically integrated across the network to increase spike-level representational capacity beyond conventional binary spiking. Extensive experiments on both static and event-based vision benchmarks demonstrate that BSViT consistently outperforms existing spiking Transformers in accuracy while maintaining competitive energy efficiency.

analysis.tldr: BSViT通过爆发脉冲编码和双通道自注意力机制，在保持低能耗的同时提升了脉冲视觉Transformer的表达能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲视觉Transformer（S-ViT）在节能视觉学习中具有潜力，但现有设计受限于二进制脉冲编码的信息容量有限和全局自注意力带来的密集token交互，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何提升脉冲视觉Transformer的表达能力，同时保持低能耗和神经形态硬件的兼容性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 二进制脉冲编码信息容量不足，全局自注意力导致密集交互和计算开销大。
analysis.method: 提出BSViT，包含双通道爆发脉冲自注意力（DBSSA），其中查询用二进制脉冲、键用爆发脉冲编码，值通路采用双兴奋/抑制二进制通道实现符号调制；引入补丁邻域掩蔽策略限制注意力到局部区域，减少脉冲活动并引入空间先验；在网络中系统集成爆发脉冲编码。
contributions: 提出DBSSA机制，通过爆发脉冲和双通道值编码增强表示能力，同时保持加法运算。
引入补丁邻域掩蔽策略，实现结构感知稀疏性并降低计算开销。
在静态和事件视觉基准上，BSViT在准确率和能效方面均优于现有脉冲Transformer。
analysis.experiments: 在静态和事件视觉基准上进行实验，BSViT在准确率上持续优于现有脉冲Transformer，同时保持有竞争力的能效。
limitations: 可能仅在特定神经形态硬件上验证能效优势。
爆发脉冲编码的额外延迟未在摘要中讨论。

papers.title: Scaling Multi-Node Mixture-of-Experts Inference Using Expert Activation Patterns
papers.abstract: Most recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) large language models (LLMs) use Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures to scale model capacity without proportional per-token compute, enabling higher-quality outputs at manageable serving costs. However, MoE inference at scale is fundamentally bottlenecked by expert load imbalance and inefficient token routing, especially in multi-node deployments where tokens are not guaranteed to be routed to local experts, resulting in significant inter-node all-to-all communication overhead. To systematically characterize these challenges, we profile SOTA open-source MoE models, including Llama 4 Maverick, DeepSeek V3-671B, and Qwen3-230B-A22B, on various datasets and collected over 100k real expert activation traces. Upon studying the expert activation patterns, we uncover various persistent properties across all the frontier MoE models: variable expert load imbalance, domain-specific expert activation where expert popularity shifts across task families (code, math, chat, general), and a strong correlation between prefill and decode expert activations. Motivated by these findings, we propose workload-aware micro-batch grouping and an expert placement strategy to maximize token locality to the destination expert, thereby reducing inter-node communication. Across models and datasets, these optimizations help reduce all2all communication data up to 20, resulting in lower MoE decode latency and better accelerator utilization.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析MoE专家激活模式，提出工作负载感知的微批分组和专家放置策略，减少多节点部署中的全对全通信开销。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE模型在多节点推理时面临专家负载不均和低效令牌路由导致的通信瓶颈，现有方法缺乏对真实激活模式的系统理解。
analysis.problem: 如何利用专家激活模式优化多节点MoE推理中的令牌路由和专家放置，以减少跨节点通信。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：专家负载不均、领域特定专家激活（专家流行度随任务类型变化）、预填充与解码阶段专家激活强相关。

contributions: 系统分析了前沿MoE模型（Llama 4 Maverick、DeepSeek V3-671B、Qwen3-230B-A22B）的专家激活模式，收集超10万条真实激活轨迹。
提出基于激活模式的工作负载感知微批分组和专家放置优化，减少全对全通信数据量达20倍。

papers.title: PhySE: A Psychological Framework for Real-Time AR-LLM Social Engineering Attacks
papers.abstract: The emerging threat of AR-LLM-based Social Engineering (AR-LLM-SE) attacks (e.g. SEAR) poses a significant risk to real-world social interactions. In such an attack, a malicious actor uses Augmented Reality (AR) glasses to capture a target visual and vocal data. A Large Language Model (LLM) then analyzes this data to identify the individual and generate a detailed social profile. Subsequently, LLM-powered agents employ social engineering strategies, providing real-time conversation suggestions, to gain the target trust and ultimately execute phishing or other malicious acts. Despite its potential, the practical application of AR-LLM-SE faces two major bottlenecks, (1) Cold-start personalization, Current Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods introduce critical delays in the earliest turns, slowing initial profile formation and disrupting real-time interaction, (2) Static Attack Strategies, Existing approaches rely on fixed-stage, handcrafted social engineering tactics that lack foundation in established psychological theory. To address these limitations, we propose PhySE, a novel framework with two core innovations, (1) VLM-Based SocialContext Training, To eliminate profiling delays, we efficiently pre-train a Visual Language Model (VLM) with social-context data, enabling rapid, on-the-fly profile generation, (2) Adaptive Psychological Agent, We introduce a psychological LLM that dynamically deploys distinct classes of psychological strategies based on target response, moving beyond static, handcrafted scripts. We evaluated PhySE through an IRB-approved user study with 60 participants, collecting a novel dataset of 360 annotated conversations across diverse social scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出PhySE框架，通过VLM预训练和自适应心理策略解决AR-LLM社交工程攻击中的冷启动延迟和静态策略问题。
analysis.research_motivation: AR-LLM社交工程攻击（如SEAR）对现实社交构成严重威胁，但现有方法存在冷启动个性化延迟和缺乏心理学基础的静态攻击策略两大瓶颈，亟需高效、自适应的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决AR-LLM社交工程攻击中实时交互的冷启动延迟和攻击策略静态化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前RAG方法在早期轮次引入关键延迟，且现有攻击策略依赖固定阶段的手工脚本，缺乏心理学理论支撑。
analysis.method: 提出PhySE框架，包含两个核心创新：1) 基于VLM的社会上下文训练，通过预训练消除画像延迟；2) 自适应心理智能体，根据目标响应动态部署心理学策略。
contributions: 提出PhySE框架，解决AR-LLM社交工程攻击的冷启动延迟和静态策略问题。
通过IRB批准的60人用户研究，收集了360个标注对话的新数据集，验证了框架有效性。
analysis.experiments: 通过IRB批准的60人用户研究，收集了360个标注对话数据集，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 用户研究规模有限（60人），可能影响泛化性。

analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对新兴安全威胁提出创新框架，方法结合VLM和心理学理论，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。

papers.title: UpstreamQA: A Modular Framework for Explicit Reasoning on Video Question Answering Tasks
papers.abstract: Video Question Answering (VideoQA) demands models that jointly reason over spatial, temporal, and linguistic cues. However, the task's inherent complexity often requires multi-step reasoning that current large multimodal models (LMMs) perform implicitly, leaving their internal decision process opaque. In contrast, large reasoning models (LRMs) explicitly generate intermediate logical steps that enhance interpretability and can improve multi-hop reasoning accuracy. Yet, these models are not designed for native video understanding, as they typically rely on static frame sampling. We propose UpstreamQA, a modular framework that disentangles and evaluates core video reasoning components through explicit upstream reasoning modules. Specifically, we employ multimodal LRMs to perform object identification and scene context generation before passing enriched reasoning traces to downstream LMMs for VideoQA. We evaluate UpstreamQA on the OpenEQA and NExTQA datasets using two LRMs (o4-mini, Gemini 2.5 Pro) and two LMMs (GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5 Flash). Our results demonstrate that introducing explicit reasoning can significantly boost performance and interpretability of downstream VideoQA, but can also lead to performance degradation when baseline performance is sufficiently high. Overall, UpstreamQA offers a principled framework for combining explicit reasoning and multimodal understanding, advancing both performance and diagnostic transparency in VideoQA in several scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出UpstreamQA模块化框架，通过显式推理模块提升视频问答的可解释性和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视频问答模型依赖隐式推理，缺乏可解释性，而大型推理模型虽能生成中间逻辑步骤但无法原生处理视频。
analysis.problem: 如何将显式推理与视频理解结合，提升视频问答的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 显式推理在基线性能较低时能显著提升效果，但在基线足够高时可能导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 构建模块化框架UpstreamQA，使用多模态LRM进行对象识别和场景上下文生成，再将丰富后的推理痕迹传递给下游LMM进行视频问答。
contributions: 提出UpstreamQA模块化框架，解耦并评估视频推理核心组件。
实验证明显式推理可提升视频问答性能和可解释性，但存在性能退化现象。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenEQA和NExTQA数据集上使用o4-mini、Gemini 2.5 Pro作为LRM，GPT-4o、Gemini 2.5 Flash作为LMM进行评估。
limitations: 显式推理在强基线场景下可能降低性能。

papers.title: UNSEEN: A Cross-Stack LLM Unlearning Defense against AR-LLM Social Engineering Attacks
papers.abstract: Emerging AR-LLM-based Social Engineering attack (e.g., SEAR) is at the edge of posing great threats to real-world social life. In such AR-LLM-SE attack, the attacker can leverage AR (Augmented Reality) glass to capture the image and vocal information of the target, using the LLM to identify the target and generate the social profile, using the LLM agents to apply social engineering strategies for conversation suggestion to win the target trust and perform phishing afterwards. Current defensive approaches, such as role-based access control or data flow tracking, are not directly applicable to the convergent AR-LLM ecosystem (considering embedded AR device and opaque LLM inference), leaving an emerging and potent social engineering threat that existing privacy paradigms are ill-equipped to address. This necessitates a shift beyond solely human-centric measures like legislation and user education toward enforceable vendor policies and platform-level restrictions. Realizing this vision, however, faces significant technical challenges: securing resource-constrained AR-embedded devices, implementing fine-grained access control within opaque LLM inferences, and governing adaptive interactive agents. To address these challenges, we present UNSEEN, a coordinated cross-stack defense that combines an AR ACL (Access Control Layer) for identity-gated sensing, F-RMU-based LLM unlearning for sensitive profile suppression, and runtime agent guardrails for adaptive interaction control. We evaluate UNSEEN in an IRB-approved user study with 60 participants and a dataset of 360 annotated conversations across realistic social scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出UNSEEN跨栈防御框架，通过AR访问控制、LLM遗忘和智能体护栏抵御AR-LLM社交工程攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: AR-LLM社交工程攻击（如SEAR）利用AR眼镜和LLM窃取目标信息并实施钓鱼，现有防御方法（如角色访问控制、数据流追踪）不适用于AR-LLM融合生态，亟需平台级技术防御。

contributions: 首次提出针对AR-LLM社交工程攻击的跨栈防御框架UNSEEN
结合AR访问控制、LLM遗忘和智能体护栏三种技术实现协同防御

papers.title: CNN-ViT Fusion with Adaptive Attention Gate for Brain Tumor MRI Classification: A Hybrid Deep Learning Model
papers.abstract: Early detection and classifying brain tumors using Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) images is highly important but difficult to extract in medical images. Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are good at capturing both local texture and spatial information whereas Vision Transformers (ViTs) are good at capturing long-range global dependencies. We propose a new hybrid architecture that combines a SqueezeNet-style CNN branch with a MobileViT-style global transformer branch, through an Adaptive Attention Gate mechanism, in this paper. The gate learns dynamically per-sample, per-feature weights to weight the contribution of each branch, allowing context-sensitive merging of local and global representations. The proposed model has a test accuracy of 97.60, a precision of 97.30, a recall of 97.50, an F1-score of 97.40, and a macro-average area under the curve (AUC) of 0.9946 with a trained and evaluated on the Brain Tumor MRI Dataset (Kaggle). These scores are higher than single CNN and ViT baselines, and current competitive fusion methods, showing that dynamic feature weighting is an effective way to classify medical images.

analysis.tldr: 提出CNN-ViT混合模型，通过自适应注意力门动态融合局部和全局特征，在脑肿瘤MRI分类上取得97.60%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑肿瘤早期检测对治疗至关重要，但MRI图像特征提取困难；CNN擅长局部纹理，ViT擅长全局依赖，但简单融合无法动态适应样本差异。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合CNN的局部特征和ViT的全局特征，实现脑肿瘤MRI图像的准确分类。

在脑肿瘤MRI数据集上达到97.60%准确率，优于单一模型和现有融合方法。

papers.title: Visual Chart Representations for Cryptocurrency Regime Prediction: A Systematic Deep Learning Study
papers.abstract: Technical traders have long relied on visual analysis of candlestick charts to identify market patterns and predict price movements. While deep learning has achieved remarkable success in image classification, its application to financial chart images remains underexplored. This paper presents a systematic study comparing different visual representations for cryptocurrency regime prediction. We evaluate three image encoding methods (raw candlestick charts, Gramian Angular Fields, and multi-channel GAF), five chart component configurations, four neural network architectures (CNN, ResNet18, EfficientNet-B0, and Vision Transformer), and the impact of ImageNet transfer learning. Through eight controlled experiments on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and S&P 500 data spanning 2018-2024, we identify optimal configurations for visual regime classification. Our results show that a simple 4-layer CNN on raw candlestick charts achieves 0.892 AUC-ROC, outperforming larger pretrained models. Surprisingly, simpler representations (price-only charts, 128x128 resolution) consistently outperform more complex alternatives. We provide interpretability analysis using GradCAM and demonstrate that transfer learning improves performance by 4-16% despite the domain gap between natural images and financial charts.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较加密货币K线图视觉表示方法，发现简单CNN在原始K线图上表现最佳，优于复杂模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 技术交易者依赖K线图视觉分析，但深度学习在金融图表图像上的应用尚未充分探索，缺乏系统比较不同视觉表示和架构的研究。

limitations: 仅针对加密货币市场状态预测，可能不适用于其他金融领域
