papers.title: Mechanistic Steering of LLMs Reveals Layer-wise Feature Vulnerabilities in Adversarial Settings
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can still be jailbroken into producing harmful outputs despite safety alignment. Existing attacks show this vulnerability, but not the internal mechanisms that cause it. This study asks whether jailbreak success is driven by identifiable internal features rather than prompts alone. We propose a three-stage pipeline for Gemma-2-2B using the BeaverTails dataset. First, we extract concept-aligned tokens from adversarial responses via subspace similarity. Second, we apply three feature-grouping strategies (cluster, hierarchical-linkage, and single-token-driven) to identify SAE feature subgroups for the aligned tokens across all 26 model layers. Third, we steer the model by amplifying the top features from each identified subgroup and measure the change in harmfulness score using a standardized LLM-judge scoring protocol. In all three approaches, the features in the layers [16-25] were relatively more vulnerable to steering. All three methods confirmed that mid to later layer feature subgroups are more responsible for unsafe outputs. These results provide evidence that the jailbreak vulnerability in Gemma-2-2B is localized to feature subgroups of mid to later layers, suggesting that targeted feature-level interventions may offer a more principled path to adversarial robustness than current prompt-level defenses.

analysis.tldr: 通过机制性操控LLM中间层特征，发现对抗性脆弱性集中在特定层特征子群。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对抗攻击揭示了LLM的安全漏洞，但缺乏对内部机制的理解，难以设计根本性防御。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM越狱成功是否由可识别的内部特征驱动，而非仅由提示词引起。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段流水线：1) 通过子空间相似性从对抗响应中提取概念对齐token；2) 应用三种特征分组策略（聚类、层次链接、单token驱动）识别SAE特征子群；3) 放大各子群顶部特征并测量有害性分数变化。
contributions: 提出一种机制性操控框架，定位LLM对抗脆弱性的内部特征层。
通过三种特征分组策略一致证明中间至后层（16-25层）特征子群对不安全输出贡献更大。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma-2-2B模型上使用BeaverTails数据集进行实验，通过标准化LLM-judge评分协议评估有害性变化。
limitations: 仅针对单一模型（Gemma-2-2B）和特定数据集（BeaverTails），泛化性未知。
特征分组策略可能依赖超参数，未讨论稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，聚焦机制可解释性，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过机制性操控LLM中间层特征，发现对抗性脆弱性集中在特定层特征子群。

papers.title: MindTrellis: Co-Creating Knowledge Structures with AI through Interactive Visual Exploration
papers.abstract: Knowledge workers face increasing challenges in synthesizing information from multiple documents into structured conceptual understanding. This process is inherently iterative: users explore content, identify relationships between concepts, and continuously reorganize their mental models. However, current approaches offer limited support. LLM-based systems let users query information but not shape how knowledge is organized; manual tools like mind maps support structure creation but lack intelligent assistance. This leaves an open opportunity: supporting collaborative construction where users and AI jointly develop an evolving knowledge representation. We present MindTrellis, an interactive visual system where users and AI collaboratively build a dynamic knowledge graph. Users can query the graph to retrieve document-grounded information, and contribute by introducing new concepts, modifying relationships, and reorganizing the hierarchy to reflect their developing understanding. In a user study where 12 participants created slide decks, MindTrellis outperformed retrieval-only baselines in knowledge organization and cognitive load, as measured by expert ratings of content coverage and structural quality.

analysis.tldr: MindTrellis通过交互式可视化知识图谱，支持用户与AI共同构建结构化知识，优于纯检索基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识工作者从多文档合成结构化理解时，现有LLM系统只支持查询而不支持知识组织，手动工具缺乏智能辅助，亟需人机协作的知识构建方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个交互系统，让用户和AI共同构建动态知识图谱，以支持迭代式的概念探索、关系修改和层次重组。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MindTrellis是一个交互式可视化系统，用户和AI协作构建动态知识图谱；用户可查询文档信息、引入新概念、修改关系、重组层次结构。
contributions: 提出人机协作构建动态知识图谱的交互范式
通过用户实验证明系统在知识组织和认知负荷上优于纯检索基线
analysis.experiments: 12名参与者使用MindTrellis制作幻灯片，专家评分显示其在内容覆盖和结构质量上优于纯检索基线。
limitations: 用户研究规模较小（12人），可能不具广泛代表性
未与更复杂的知识构建工具（如高级思维导图）对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但技术深度一般，实验规模小，适合关注人机协作知识构建的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MindTrellis通过交互式可视化知识图谱，支持用户与AI共同构建结构化知识，优于纯检索基线。

papers.title: Learning from Imperfect Text Guidance: Robust Long-Tail Visual Recognition with High-Noise Label
papers.abstract: Real-world data often exhibit long-tailed distributions with numerous noisy labels, substantially degrading the performance of deep models. While prior research has made progress in addressing this combined challenge, it overlooks the severe label-image mismatch inherent to high-noise settings, thereby limiting their effectiveness. Given that observed labels, though mismatched with images, still retain category information, we propose employing auxiliary text information from labels to address label-image inconsistencies in long-tailed noisy data. Specifically, we leverage the intrinsic cross-modal alignment in pre-trained visual-language models to correct the label-image inconsistencies. This supervisory signal, referred to as Weak Teacher Supervision (WTS), is unaffected by label noise and data distribution biases, albeit exhibits limited accuracy. Therefore, the activation of WTS is determined by evaluating the discrepancy between text-predicted labels and observed labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior performance of WTS across synthetic and real-world datasets, particularly under high-noise conditions. The source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/WTS-0F3C.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练视觉-语言模型的跨模态对齐，提出弱教师监督信号，解决长尾分布下高噪声标签的标签-图像不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实数据常呈现长尾分布并伴有大量噪声标签，严重降低深度模型性能；现有方法在高噪声场景下忽略了标签-图像严重不匹配的问题，效果有限。
analysis.problem: 长尾分布数据中高噪声标签导致的标签-图像不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到的标签虽与图像不匹配，但仍保留类别信息；预训练视觉-语言模型的跨模态对齐不受标签噪声和数据分布偏差影响，但精度有限。
analysis.method: 利用预训练视觉-语言模型的内在跨模态对齐能力，生成弱教师监督信号（WTS），通过评估文本预测标签与观测标签的差异来决定是否激活WTS，从而纠正标签-图像不一致。
contributions: 提出弱教师监督（WTS）方法，利用预训练视觉-语言模型解决长尾高噪声标签下的标签-图像不匹配问题。
在合成和真实数据集上，特别是在高噪声条件下，验证了WTS的优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上进行实验，特别关注高噪声条件，代码已开源。
limitations: WTS的精度有限，可能在某些场景下不够准确。
依赖预训练视觉-语言模型，可能受限于模型本身的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用VLM解决长尾噪声标签问题，实验充分，代码开源，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练视觉-语言模型的跨模态对齐，提出弱教师监督信号，解决长尾分布下高噪声标签的标签-图像不匹配问题。

papers.title: ArgRE: Formal Argumentation for Conflict Resolution in Multi-Agent Requirements Negotiation
papers.abstract: As software systems grow in complexity, they must satisfy an increasing number of competing quality attributes, making it essential to balance them in a principled manner -- for example, a safety requirement for sensor-fusion verification may conflict with a tight planning-cycle budget. Multi-agent large language model frameworks support this balancing process by assigning specialized agents to different objectives. However, their conflict resolution is typically heuristic. Requirements are aggregated implicitly without explicit acceptance or rejection, limiting auditability in regulated domains. We present ArgRE, a multi-agent requirements negotiation system that embeds Dung-style abstract argumentation into the negotiation stage. Each proposal, critique, and refinement is modeled as an argument, conflicts are represented as directed attack relations, and the accepted set of arguments is computed under grounded and preferred semantics. The pipeline further integrates KAOS goal modeling, multi-layer verification, and standards-oriented artifact generation. Evaluation across five case studies spanning safety-critical, financial, and information-system domains shows that ArgRE provides argument-level traceability absent from existing frameworks. Independent evaluators rated its decision justifications significantly higher than those of heuristic synthesis (4.32 vs. 3.07, p < 0.001), indicating improved auditability, while semantic intent preservation remains comparable (94.9% BERTScore F1) and compliance coverage reaches 84.7% versus 47.6%--47.8% for baselines. Structural analysis further confirms that the default pairwise protocol yields acyclic graphs in which grounded and preferred semantics coincide, whereas cross-pair arbitration introduces controlled cyclicity, leading to predictable divergence between the two semantics.

analysis.tldr: ArgRE将Dung式抽象论证嵌入多智能体需求协商，实现可审计的冲突消解。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM框架在需求协商中通常采用启发式冲突消解，缺乏显式的接受/拒绝机制，限制了在监管领域的可审计性。
analysis.problem: 如何为多智能体需求协商提供形式化、可审计的冲突消解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 默认成对协议产生无环图，接地语义和优先语义一致；跨对仲裁引入可控循环，导致两种语义可预测地分歧。
analysis.method: 将每个提议、批评和精炼建模为论证，冲突表示为有向攻击关系，在接地语义和优先语义下计算可接受的论证集，并集成KAOS目标建模、多层验证和标准导向工件生成。
contributions: 提出ArgRE系统，将形式论证理论嵌入多智能体需求协商。
在五个跨领域案例中验证了可审计性提升（决策理由评分4.32 vs 3.07）和合规覆盖率提升（84.7% vs 47.6%-47.8%）。
analysis.experiments: 在安全关键、金融和信息系统五个案例上评估，独立评估员对决策理由评分显著高于启发式综合（4.32 vs 3.07, p<0.001），语义保持相当（BERTScore F1 94.9%），合规覆盖率84.7% vs 基线47.6%-47.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量论证建模，对复杂需求表达能力有限。
计算开销可能随论证数量增加而增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ArgRE将Dung式抽象论证嵌入多智能体需求协商，实现可审计的冲突消解。

papers.title: Breaking Lock-In: Preserving Steerability under Low-Data VLA Post-Training
papers.abstract: Have you ever post-trained a generalist vision-language-action (VLA) policy on a small demonstration dataset, only to find that it stops responding to new instructions and is limited to behaviors observed during post-training? We identify this phenomenon as lock-in: after low-data, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), the policy becomes overly specialized to the post-training data and fails to generalize to novel instructions, manifesting as concept lock-in (fixation on training objects/attributes) and spatial lock-in (fixation on training spatial targets). Many existing remedies introduce additional supervision signals, such as those derived from foundation models or auxiliary objectives, or rely on augmented datasets to recover generalization. In this paper, we show that the policy's internal pre-trained knowledge is sufficient: DeLock mitigates lock-in by preserving visual grounding during post-training and applying test-time contrastive prompt guidance to steer the policy's denoising dynamics according to novel instructions. Across eight simulation and real-world evaluations, DeLock consistently outperforms strong baselines and matches or exceeds the performance of a state-of-the-art generalist policy post-trained with substantially more curated demonstrations.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeLock方法，通过保留视觉基础能力和测试时对比提示引导，解决VLA策略在低数据后训练中的锁定现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用VLA策略在少量演示数据上微调后，会过度特化于后训练数据，无法泛化到新指令，限制了其实际部署的灵活性。
analysis.problem: 解决VLA策略在低数据监督微调后出现的概念锁定和空间锁定问题，即策略对训练对象/属性和空间目标的固着。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 识别出锁定现象：后训练后策略不再响应新指令，仅能执行训练中见过的行为，表现为概念锁定和空间锁定。
analysis.method: DeLock：在后训练期间保留视觉基础能力，并在测试时应用对比提示引导来根据新指令调整策略的去噪动力学。
contributions: 识别并形式化了VLA策略在低数据后训练中的锁定现象。
提出DeLock方法，仅利用策略内部预训练知识，无需额外监督信号或增强数据集。
在8个仿真和真实世界评估中，DeLock优于强基线，匹配或超越使用更多演示数据训练的通用策略。
analysis.experiments: 在8个仿真和真实世界评估中，DeLock一致优于强基线，并匹配或超越使用更多精选演示数据训练的SOTA通用策略。
limitations: 方法依赖于预训练策略中已有的视觉基础能力，若预训练不足可能效果有限。
测试时对比提示引导可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，实验充分，与VLA方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DeLock方法，通过保留视觉基础能力和测试时对比提示引导，解决VLA策略在低数据后训练中的锁定现象。

papers.title: Mixture of Heterogeneous Grouped Experts for Language Modeling
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) based on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) are pivotal in industrial applications for their ability to scale performance efficiently. However, standard MoEs enforce uniform expert sizes,creating a rigidity that fails to align computational costs with varying token-level complexity. While heterogeneous expert architectures attempt to address this by diversifying expert sizes, they often suffer from significant system-level challenges, specifically unbalanced GPU utilization and inefficient parameter utilization, which hinder practical deployment. To bridge the gap between theoretical heterogeneity and robust industrial application, we propose Mixture of Heterogeneous Grouped Experts (MoHGE) which introduces a two-level routing mechanism to enable flexible, resource-aware expert combinations. To optimize inference efficiency, we propose a Group-Wise Auxiliary Loss, which dynamically steers tokens to the most parameter-efficient expert groups based on task difficulty. To address the critical deployment challenge of GPU load balancing, we introduce an All-size Group-decoupling Allocation strategy coupled with an Intra-Group Experts Auxiliary Loss. These mechanisms collectively ensure uniform computation distribution across GPUs. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that MoHGE matches the performance of MoE architectures while reducing the total parameters by approximately 20% and maintaining balanced GPU utilization. Our work establishes a scalable paradigm for resource-efficient MoE design, offering a practical solution for optimizing inference costs in real-world scenarios. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/UnicomAI/MoHGE.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合异构分组专家（MoHGE）架构，通过两级路由和分组辅助损失实现资源高效的MoE语言建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准MoE强制专家大小一致，无法根据token复杂度灵活分配计算资源；异构专家架构虽能调整大小，但面临GPU负载不均和参数利用率低等部署难题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能灵活组合异构专家、又能保持GPU负载均衡和参数高效的MoE架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准MoE的均匀专家大小导致计算资源与token复杂度不匹配；异构专家架构在系统层面存在GPU利用率不平衡和参数利用率低的问题。
analysis.method: 提出MoHGE，包含两级路由机制（先选专家组再选专家）、组级辅助损失（按任务难度引导token到参数高效组）、全尺寸组解耦分配策略和组内专家辅助损失（确保GPU负载均衡）。
contributions: 提出MoHGE架构，通过两级路由实现灵活的资源感知专家组合。
设计组级辅助损失和组内专家辅助损失，分别优化参数效率和GPU负载均衡。
实验表明MoHGE在保持性能的同时减少约20%总参数，并维持均衡GPU利用率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及广泛评估表明性能匹配MoE且参数减少20%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定规模或任务上验证，泛化性需进一步确认。
两级路由可能增加推理延迟，摘要未提及效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对MoE部署痛点提出系统解决方案，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合异构分组专家（MoHGE）架构，通过两级路由和分组辅助损失实现资源高效的MoE语言建模。

papers.title: No Test Cases, No Problem: Distillation-Driven Code Generation for Scientific Workflows
papers.abstract: Existing multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) frameworks for code generation typically use execution feedback and improve iteratively using Input/Output (I/O) test cases. However, this does not work for scientific workflows, where I/O test cases do not exist, and generating them requires solving the very problem at hand. To address this, we introduce MOSAIC, a training-free multi-agent framework for scientific code generation without I/O supervision. Instead of execution feedback, MOSAIC employs a student-teacher knowledge distillation framework that grounds generation through domain-specific examples and structured problem decomposition. To further mitigate hallucinations across chained subproblems, we introduce a Consolidated Context Window (CCW) for maintaining consistent reasoning across agents. Experiments on the SciCode benchmark show that MOSAIC improves accuracy, executability, and numerical precision over existing approaches while relying on lightweight models.

analysis.tldr: 提出无测试用例的多智能体代码生成框架MOSAIC，通过知识蒸馏和结构化分解提升科学工作流代码质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代码生成依赖I/O测试用例进行执行反馈，但科学工作流中不存在此类测试用例，生成它们本身就需要解决原问题，导致现有方法失效。
analysis.problem: 如何在无I/O测试用例监督的条件下，为科学工作流生成准确、可执行且数值精确的代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MOSAIC框架，采用学生-教师知识蒸馏，通过领域特定示例和结构化问题分解来引导生成，并引入Consolidated Context Window (CCW)维护跨智能体推理的一致性。
contributions: 提出首个无需I/O测试用例的多智能体科学代码生成框架MOSAIC
引入知识蒸馏和CCW机制，有效缓解子问题链中的幻觉问题
analysis.experiments: 在SciCode基准上评估，MOSAIC在准确率、可执行性和数值精度上优于现有方法，且使用轻量级模型。
limitations: 可能依赖领域特定示例的质量和覆盖度
未在更广泛科学领域验证泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对科学工作流代码生成的无测试用例问题提出创新蒸馏框架，实验验证有效，但技术细节和泛化性待进一步评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无测试用例的多智能体代码生成框架MOSAIC，通过知识蒸馏和结构化分解提升科学工作流代码质量。

papers.title: Transferable Physical-World Adversarial Patches Against Object Detection in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Deep learning drives major advances in autonomous driving (AD), where object detectors are central to perception. However, adversarial attacks pose significant threats to the reliability and safety of these systems, with physical adversarial patches representing a particularly potent form of attack. Physical adversarial patch attacks pose severe risks but are usually crafted for a single model, yielding poor transferability to unseen detectors. We propose AdvAD, a transfer-based physical attack against object detection in autonomous driving. Instead of targeting a specific detector, AdvAD optimizes adversarial patches over multiple detection models in a unified framework, encouraging the learned perturbations to capture shared vulnerabilities across architectures. The optimization process adaptively balances model contributions and enforces robustness to physical variations. It further employs data augmentation and geometric transformations to maintain patch effectiveness under diverse physical conditions. Experiments in both digital and real-world settings show that AdvAD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) attacks in performance and transferability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种针对自动驾驶目标检测的物理对抗补丁攻击方法，通过多模型联合优化提升跨模型迁移性。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理对抗补丁攻击对自动驾驶系统构成严重威胁，但现有攻击通常针对单一模型设计，迁移性差，无法有效攻击未见过的检测器。
analysis.problem: 如何生成具有高迁移性的物理对抗补丁，使其能同时欺骗多种目标检测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AdvAD框架，在统一优化过程中同时攻击多个检测模型，通过自适应平衡模型贡献、增强物理鲁棒性（数据增强和几何变换）来学习跨架构的共享脆弱性。
contributions: 提出一种基于迁移的物理对抗补丁攻击方法AdvAD，针对自动驾驶目标检测。
通过多模型联合优化和物理鲁棒性增强，显著提升了攻击的迁移性和实际效果。
analysis.experiments: 在数字和真实世界场景中进行了实验，AdvAD在性能和迁移性上持续优于现有最先进攻击方法。
limitations: 可能仅针对目标检测任务，未考虑其他感知模块（如语义分割）。
补丁的物理可实现性和隐蔽性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对自动驾驶安全关键问题，实验验证了迁移性提升，值得关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种针对自动驾驶目标检测的物理对抗补丁攻击方法，通过多模型联合优化提升跨模型迁移性。

papers.title: ProEval: Proactive Failure Discovery and Efficient Performance Estimation for Generative AI Evaluation
papers.abstract: Evaluating generative AI models is increasingly resource-intensive due to slow inference, expensive raters, and a rapidly growing landscape of models and benchmarks. We propose ProEval, a proactive evaluation framework that leverages transfer learning to efficiently estimate performance and identify failure cases. ProEval employs pre-trained Gaussian Processes (GPs) as surrogates for the performance score function, mapping model inputs to metrics such as the severity of errors or safety violations. By framing performance estimation as Bayesian quadrature (BQ) and failure discovery as superlevel set sampling, we develop uncertainty-aware decision strategies that actively select or synthesize highly informative inputs for testing. Theoretically, we prove that our pre-trained GP-based BQ estimator is unbiased and bounded. Empirically, extensive experiments on reasoning, safety alignment, and classification benchmarks demonstrate that ProEval is significantly more efficient than competitive baselines. It requires 8-65x fewer samples to achieve estimates within 1% of the ground truth, while simultaneously revealing more diverse failure cases under a stricter evaluation budget.

analysis.tldr: ProEval通过迁移学习和贝叶斯方法主动发现生成式AI模型的失败案例并高效估计性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI模型评估因推理慢、评分昂贵、模型和基准快速增长而资源消耗巨大，亟需更高效的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限评估预算下高效估计生成式AI模型性能并主动发现其失败案例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ProEval框架，使用预训练高斯过程作为性能评分函数的代理，将性能估计视为贝叶斯求积，失败发现视为超水平集采样，通过不确定性感知决策策略主动选择或合成高信息输入。
contributions: 提出ProEval，一种主动评估框架，结合迁移学习与贝叶斯方法高效估计性能并发现失败案例。
理论上证明基于预训练高斯过程的贝叶斯求积估计器无偏且有界。
实验表明在推理、安全对齐和分类基准上，ProEval比基线方法效率高8-65倍，且能发现更多样化的失败案例。
analysis.experiments: 在推理、安全对齐和分类基准上进行实验，ProEval比竞争基线显著更高效，达到1%误差内所需样本减少8-65倍，同时在更严格评估预算下发现更多样化的失败案例。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练高斯过程的质量，若预训练数据分布与测试分布差异大，性能可能下降。
框架主要针对连续性能指标，对离散或结构化输出可能需额外适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论有保证，实验效率提升显著，与生成式AI评估核心问题高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProEval通过迁移学习和贝叶斯方法主动发现生成式AI模型的失败案例并高效估计性能。

papers.title: INSIGHT: Indoor Scene Intelligence from Geometric-Semantic Hierarchy Transfer for Public~Safety
papers.abstract: Indoor environments lack the spatial intelligence infrastructure that GPS provides outdoors; first responders arriving at unfamiliar buildings typically have no machine-readable map of safety equipment. Prior work on 3D semantic segmentation for public safety identified two barriers: scarcity of labeled indoor training data and poor recognition of small safety-critical features by native point-cloud methods. This paper presents INSIGHT, a zero-target-domain-annotation pipeline that projects 2D image understanding into 3D metric space via registered RGB-D data. Two interchangeable vision stacks share a common 3D back end: a SAM3 foundation-model stack for text-prompted segmentation, and a traditional CV stack (open-set detection, VQA, OCR) whose intermediate outputs are independently inspectable. Evaluated on all seven subareas of Stanford 2D-3D-S (70{,}496 images), the pipeline produces Pointcept-schema-compatible labeled point clouds and ISO~19164-compliant scene graphs with ${\sim}10^{4}{\times}$ compression; role-filtered payloads transmit in ${<}15$\,s at 1\,Mbps over FirstNet Band~14. We report per-point labeling accuracy on 7 shared classes, detection sensitivity for 15 safety-critical classes absent from public 3D benchmarks alongside code-capped deployable estimates, and inter-pipeline complementarity, demonstrating that 2D-to-3D semantic transfer addresses the labeled-data bottleneck while scene graphs provide building intelligence compact enough for field deployment.

analysis.tldr: INSIGHT通过2D到3D语义迁移实现零标注室内场景理解，生成紧凑场景图用于公共安全。
analysis.research_motivation: 室内环境缺乏类似GPS的空间智能基础设施，导致应急响应人员无法获取机器可读的安全设备地图；现有3D语义分割方法受限于标注数据稀缺和对小目标识别能力差。
analysis.problem: 在零目标域标注条件下，从RGB-D数据生成3D语义点云和紧凑场景图，以支持公共安全场景的实时部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出INSIGHT流水线，通过注册的RGB-D数据将2D图像理解投影到3D度量空间；包含两个可互换的视觉栈（SAM3基础模型栈和传统CV栈），共享同一3D后端，输出Pointcept兼容的点云和ISO 19164兼容的场景图。
contributions: 提出零目标域标注的2D到3D语义迁移流水线，解决室内标注数据瓶颈。

papers.title: Toward Real-World Adoption of Portrait Relighting via Hybrid Domain Knowledge Fusion
papers.abstract: The real-world adoption of portrait relighting is hindered by dataset domain gaps, camera sensitivity, and computational costs. We address these challenges with Hybrid Domain Knowledge Fusion, a paradigm that fuses the specialized strengths of synthetic, One-Light-at-A-Time (OLAT), and real-world datasets into a compact model. Our approach features specialized prior models hardened by domain-aware adaptation, followed by augmented knowledge distillation into a lightweight student model with multi-domain expertise. Our method demonstrates a 6x to 240x inference speedup while maintaining state-of-the-art (SOTA) visual quality in the experiments. Additionally, we construct a massive, high-fidelity synthetic dataset with diverse ground-truth intrinsics to support our training pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合域知识融合范式，融合合成、OLAT和真实数据集，实现6-240倍加速的人像重光照。

papers.title: Latent Space Probing for Adult Content Detection in Video Generative Models
papers.abstract: The rapid proliferation of AI-powered video generation systems has introduced significant challenges in content moderation, particularly with respect to adult and sexually explicit material. Existing detection methods operate on either prompts or decoded pixel-space outputs. Therefore, both approaches are blind to the rich internal representations formed during generation. In this paper, we propose a novel latent space probing framework that intercepts the denoised latent representations produced by the CogVideoX video diffusion model during inference and attaches lightweight classifiers to perform real-time adult content detection. To support this work, we construct a large-scale binary dataset of 11039 ten-second video clips (5086 violating, 5953 non-violating) sourced from adult websites and YouTube respectively. We introduce two lightweight probing classifier architectures. We train and evaluate it on the dataset. Our work demonstrates that latent-space signals encode strong discriminative features for harmful content detection, achieving 97.29% F1 on our held-out test set with an overhead in the 4-6ms range. Our results suggest that probing the latent space results in improvements in both detection performance as well as cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出在视频扩散模型的潜空间嵌入轻量分类器，实现高效、低开销的成人内容实时检测。
analysis.research_motivation: AI视频生成模型快速普及，但现有成人内容检测方法只分析输入提示或解码后的像素输出，忽略了生成过程中丰富的内部表征，导致检测性能有限且成本较高。

papers.title: Towards Automated Ontology Generation from Unstructured Text: A Multi-Agent LLM Approach
papers.abstract: Automatically generating formal ontologies from unstructured natural language remains a central challenge in knowledge engineering. While large language models (LLMs) show promise, it remains unclear which architectural design choices drive generation quality and why current approaches fail. We present a controlled experimental study using domain-specific insurance contracts to investigate these questions. We first establish a single-agent LLM baseline, identifying key failure modes such as poor Ontology Design Pattern compliance, structural redundancy, and ineffective iterative repair. We then introduce a multi-agent architecture that decomposes ontology construction into four artifact-driven roles: Domain Expert, Manager, Coder, and Quality Assurer. We evaluate performance across architectural quality (via a panel of heterogeneous LLM judges) and functional usability (via competency question driven SPARQL evaluation with complementary retrieval augmented generation based assessment). Results show that the multi-agent approach significantly improves structural quality and modestly enhances queryability, with gains driven primarily by front-loaded planning. These findings highlight planning-first, artifact-driven generation as a promising and more auditable path toward scalable automated ontology engineering.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多智能体LLM架构，通过分解角色和前置规划提升非结构化文本的自动本体生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 从非结构化文本自动生成形式化本体是知识工程的核心挑战，现有LLM方法在架构设计选择和失败模式上缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计有效的LLM架构以从非结构化文本自动生成高质量的形式化本体，并理解不同设计选择的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单智能体基线存在本体设计模式遵循性差、结构冗余和迭代修复无效等关键失败模式；多智能体架构通过前置规划显著提升结构质量。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体架构，将本体构建分解为领域专家、管理者、编码者和质量保证者四个角色，采用工件驱动的方式协作生成本体。

提出了多智能体工件驱动架构，通过前置规划提升本体质量

limitations: 仅在保险合同领域验证，泛化性未知

papers.title: Code Broker: A Multi-Agent System for Automated Code Quality Assessment
papers.abstract: We present Code Broker, a multi agent system built on Google s Agent Development Kit ADK that analyses Python source code from individual files, local directory trees, or remote GitHub repositories and generates structured, actionable quality assessment reports. The system realises a hierarchical five agent architecture in which a root orchestrator coordinates a sequential pipeline agent that, in turn, dispatches three specialised agents concurrently a Correctness Assessor, a Style Assessor, and a Description Generator before synthesising their findings through an Improvement Recommender. Reports quantify four quality dimensions correctness, security, style, and maintainability on a normalised scale and are rendered in both Markdown and HTML for integration into diverse developer workflows. Code Broker fuses LLM based semantic reasoning with deterministic static analysis signals from Pylint, employs asynchronous execution with exponential backoff retry logic to improve robustness under transient API failures, and explores lightweight session memory for retaining and querying prior assessment context across runs. We frame this paper as a technical report on system design, prompt engineering, and tool orchestration, and present a preliminary qualitative evaluation on representative Python codebases of varying scale. The results indicate that parallel specialised agents produce readable, developer oriented feedback that complements traditional linting, while also foregrounding current limitations in evaluation depth, security tooling, large repository handling, and the exclusive reliance on in memory persistence. All code and reproducibility materials are publicly available: https://github.com/Samir-atra/agents_intensive_dev.

analysis.tldr: Code Broker 是一个基于多智能体架构的代码质量自动评估系统，通过分层协作与 LLM+静态分析融合生成结构化报告。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统代码质量工具（如 linter）缺乏语义理解和结构化反馈，而纯 LLM 方法在可靠性、可解释性和成本上存在局限，需要一种结合两者优势的自动化评估系统。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个多智能体系统，能够自动分析 Python 代码（单文件、目录或远程仓库），并生成涵盖正确性、安全、风格、可维护性四个维度的结构化、可操作的质量评估报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: Usable Agent Discovery for Decentralized AI Systems
papers.abstract: Large-scale agentic systems run on distributed infrastructures where many software agents share physical hosts and are discovered via peer-to-peer mechanisms. Discovery must handle node-level churn from failures and host departures and agent-level churn from demand-driven activation, deactivation, and state changes. Their interaction reshapes classic trade-offs between structured and unstructured overlays. We study decentralized agent discovery under this two-level churn, assuming nodes host multiple agents, overlays are structured or gossip-based, and agents switch between warm and cold states. Using Kademlia as a structured and Cyclon+Vicinity as a gossip baseline, we compare stable, node-churn-only, agent-cooling-only, and combined regimes to see when routing efficiency, resilience, and service readiness align or favor different designs. Structured overlays are more robust and efficient in stable and node-churn regimes, while gossip-based overlays remain competitive and can be faster when readiness dominates.

analysis.tldr: 研究去中心化AI系统中双层节点与代理变动下的代理发现机制，比较结构化与八卦式覆盖网络的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模去中心化AI系统中，代理发现需同时应对节点级故障和代理级状态变化，现有研究缺乏对双层变动的系统性分析。
analysis.problem: 在节点和代理双层变动下，如何设计高效的代理发现机制以平衡路由效率、鲁棒性和服务就绪度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 结构化覆盖网络在稳定和仅节点变动场景下更鲁棒高效，而八卦式覆盖网络在代理冷却主导时更具竞争力且可能更快。
analysis.method: 以Kademlia（结构化）和Cyclon+Vicinity（八卦式）为基线，在稳定、仅节点变动、仅代理冷却和组合变动四种场景下比较路由效率、鲁棒性和服务就绪度。

揭示了不同变动模式下结构化与八卦式覆盖网络的性能权衡
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅比较了两种特定协议，可能不适用于其他覆盖网络
未考虑代理发现的其他方面如安全性或延迟

papers.title: From Pixels to Explanations: Interpretable Diabetic Retinopathy Grading with CNN-Transformer Ensembles, Visual Explainability and Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: The quality of diabetic retinopathy (DR) screening relies on the ability to correctly grade severity; however, many deep-learning (DL) classifiers cannot be easily interpreted in the clinical context. This study presents a methodology that combines strong discriminative models with multimodal explanations, converting retinal pixels into clinically interpretable outputs. Using the APTOS 2019 benchmark, we evaluated six representative CNN- and transformer-based backbones under a controlled protocol with stratified five-fold cross-validation. We then compared ensembling strategies (hard voting, weighted soft voting, stacking) and investigated a hybrid class-level fusion variant to exploit grade-specific advantages. For interpretability, we produced Grad-CAM++ visual attribution maps and short textual rationales using vision-language models (VLMs) conditioned on the fundus image and classifier outputs under conservative prompting constraints. Modern CNN backbones (ResNet-50 and ConvNeXt-Tiny) provided the strongest single-model baselines, with cross-validated QWK up to 0.919 and 0.914, respectively. Ensembling improved ordinal agreement, and weighted soft voting was the most consistent across folds (QWK 0.934 +/- 0.017). Hybrid class-level fusion was competitive but did not yield a statistically reliable improvement over standard fusion in paired fold comparisons (Holm-adjusted p >= 1.000). For explanation quality, Grad-CAM++ offered plausible but coarse localization, and VLM rationales were generally grade-consistent. Quantitatively, VLM variants showed a trade-off between clinical completeness and template-level semantic similarity (coverage 0.700 vs. BERTScore 0.072), while image-text alignment was comparable (CLIPScore approximately 0.34).

analysis.tldr: 结合CNN-Transformer集成与VLM，实现可解释的糖尿病视网膜病变分级。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习分类器在临床中难以解释，限制了其在糖尿病视网膜病变筛查中的可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何将视网膜图像像素转换为临床可解释的分级输出，同时保持高分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代CNN骨干（ResNet-50, ConvNeXt-Tiny）在单模型中表现最佳；集成策略提升序数一致性；混合类级融合未显著优于标准融合；VLM解释在临床完整性与语义相似性间存在权衡。
analysis.method: 使用六种CNN和Transformer骨干，比较硬投票、加权软投票、堆叠等集成策略，并引入混合类级融合；利用Grad-CAM++生成视觉归因图，结合VLM生成文本解释。
contributions: 系统比较了多种CNN/Transformer骨干和集成策略在DR分级上的性能。
提出混合类级融合方法，并评估其有效性。
结合Grad-CAM++和VLM提供多模态可解释性，并量化解释质量。
analysis.experiments: 在APTOS 2019基准上使用分层五折交叉验证，报告QWK、CLIPScore、BERTScore等指标。
limitations: 混合类级融合未带来统计显著提升。
VLM解释的临床完整性有限（覆盖度0.700）。
仅使用单一数据集，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法系统但增量改进有限，实验充分但混合融合未显著提升，适合关注可解释医学图像分析的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合CNN-Transformer集成与VLM，实现可解释的糖尿病视网膜病变分级。
